Name: Dole Chile
Description:
Nuestra misión es "Hacer de un mundo, un lugar más saludable".

En Dole somos entusiasta de los productos frescos. Estamos comprometidos a ser defensores de la nutrición, la buena salud y el bienestar. Para ello, nos comprometemos a educar, inspirar y capacitar a los consumidores para que elijas un estilo de vida más saludable y encuentren la diversión en las frutas y verduras frescas.

Name: Agromercantil
Description:
SOLUÇÕES INTELIGENTES PARA O AGRO

Seja bem vindo(a) ao Grupo Agromercantil, uma aliança estratégica de três empresas especializadas que oferecem soluções abrangentes e inovadoras no campo do agronegócio. 

AGROMERCANTIL S/A: Compramos e vendemos commodities agrícolas, nos mercados spot, a termo e futuro; gerenciando os elos da cadeia e mitigando seus riscos, provendo liquidez ao mercado nacional e internacional de grãos, e dando fluidez a cadeia de valor da agroindústria.

AGRO-E: Desenvolvemos Tecnologia e Inteligência para aplicação em negócios, utilizando linguagens computacionais, Ciência e Análise de Dados.

AGROMERCANTIL TRANSPORTES: Transportamos mercadorias agrícolas, granéis e produtos acabados, em todo território nacional, alinhados às melhores práticas de gestão operacional e de risco, entregando pontualidade e segurança aos nossos clientes.

BCA EMPREENDIMENTOS: Administramos e executamos todas as obras de engenharia do Grupo Agromercantil, garantindo a qualidade técnica dos projetos, a eficácia operacional na execução das obras, sua viabilidade econômica, e a segurança das pessoas nelas envolvidas.

Name: Bee2Be
Description:
Our mission is to unlock the power of bees to promote biodiversity, as well as personal and community wellbeing while developing scalable apiculture solutions to foster environmental sustainability.

Bee2Be’s circular business model focuses on pollination services that bolster the agricultural output of farmers along with reforestation efforts in ecological risk areas, while simultaneously unlocking a high-yield supply chain of nutrient-rich bee byproducts for commercial usage, including pollen, honey, and red propolis.

Name: ТАС Агро
Description:
ТАС Агро – провідна аграрна компанія України, яка впевнено і динамічно розвивається. 

Ми досягаємо найкращих результатів у різних галузях агровиробництва – рослинництві, тваринництві та зберіганні зернових. 

Нині ТАС Агро обробляє понад 80 тис. га земель у Чернігівській, Сумській, Київській, Вінницькій, Кіровоградській, Волинській та Миколаївській областях і об’єднує майже 25 тисяч пайовиків. 

Впродовж останніх років у компанії проведено кластеризацію, таким чином, оптимізувавши управлінські та виробничі процеси й покращивши комунікацію у компанії. 

Нині кожен підрозділ здійснює самостійну виробничу діяльність та підпорядковується компанії «ТАС Агро».

Кластери компанії «ТАС Агро»:
ТОВ «ТАС Агро Захід»
ТОВ «ТАС Агро Північ»
ТОВ «ТАС Агро Центр»
ТОВ «ТАС Агро Південь»

Наша мета – впровадити єдині технології вирощування рослинницької продукції, централізувати забезпечення технікою, засобами захисту рослин, добривами, насінням та пально-мастильними матеріалами.

Name: Flocus
Description: Flocus is an industry leader in sustainable kapok fiber production, driven by a vision to transform the textile supply chain through ethical practices, environmental responsibility, and superior quality. Founded with a mission to elevate kapok as a viable, eco-friendly fiber, Flocus has pioneered advanced processing techniques and social standards that set it apart from traditional suppliers. Our purpose is to deliver a product that benefits both people and the planet. We don’t produce fibers; rather, we harvest them from regenerative trees, cherishing each tree and ensuring no harm is done. Instead, we plant and cultivate these trees to renew the land, empower local communities, and support a sustainable future, working with nature’s perfect creation to make it available for everyone to enjoy.

Name: Krishikan
Description:
Welcome to Krishikan: Pioneering Sustainable Agriculture

At Krishikan, we are driven by a clear and impactful mission – to empower farmers and transform agriculture for a sustainable future. With a farmer-first approach and innovative AgriTech solutions, we are addressing the challenges faced by India's 90 million farmers. Our commitment extends beyond combating soil depletion and includes reducing carbon emissions in agriculture through regenerative practices that revive soil health and restore ecological balance. We are focused on securing the world’s food future. Join us as we cultivate a spicier, healthier, and more prosperous world.  
#SustainableAgriculture #AgriTechInnovation #EmpoweringFarmers #Krishikan  #SoilRevival

Name: Comité de Promotion Hauts-de-France
Description:
Le Comité de Promotion est un service de la Chambre d’Agriculture, chargé de la promotion de la gastronomie et du développement de la filière agroalimentaire. Il bénéficie du soutien financier de la Région Hauts-de-France.
Il a été créé en 1971 avec pour mission initiale d’aider les entreprises à faire connaître leurs produits sur les salons grand public (salon de l’agriculture)et les salons professionnels (SIAL). Aujourd’hui, le Comité de Promotion est reconnu pour la qualité professionnelle de ses actions notamment dans sa capacité de mise en relation des acteurs. Au cœur de l’action publique en matière d’alimentation, il est en relation avec les autres consulaires et l’ensemble des acteurs de la filière.
Les objectifs stratégiques sont les suivants :
Pour les agriculteurs : pérenniser et développer les exploitations agricoles, répondre aux attentes de la société,
Pour l’agroalimentaire : préserver la notion de filières régionales, promouvoir la filière agricole et agroalimentaire, développer l’économie régionale tout en développant l’économie agricole,
Pour les consommateurs : faire connaître le patrimoine gastronomique, inciter le consommateur à manger équilibré, diversifié, local et de saison, et promouvoir le métier d’agriculteur et la filière agroalimentaire.

Name: Multi Dairy
Description:

With more than 5000 milking heads of the world’s finest Holstein cattle Multi Dairy has a production capacity of 60,000,000 Kgs of Fresh Milk per year.

Name: Marché d'Intérêt National et la Gare des Gros Porteurs
Description:
Le Marché d’Intérêt national est un service public de gestion des marchés dont l’accès est réservé aux producteurs et commerçants qui contribuent à l’organisation et à l’animation des circuits de distribution des produits agro-alimentaires, à l’instauration d’une concurrence saine et loyale dans ces secteurs économiques et participe à l’objectif de sécurité alimentaire des populations.

Les opérateurs présents sur le MIN sont des grossistes ou des importateurs de produits agricoles ; les clients, des restaurateurs privés ou collectifs, des comités d’entreprises et des centrales d’achat de la grande distribution. Il est un lieu de négoce de gros dont la mission est de proposer à l’ensemble des Sénégalais une alimentation sûre, diversifiée et en quantité suffisante, en droite ligne de la politique publique en la matière inscrite dans le programme du président de la République.

Name: SFI Agri Commodities
Description:
SFI Agri Commodities Ltd is a dynamic agricultural commodities trading company with a strong focus on the global cocoa market. Leveraging the deep industry expertise of its leadership team, SFI has quickly emerged as a trusted player in the sourcing and export of high-quality agro commodities, including cocoa beans, cashew nuts, sesame seeds, and soya beans.

At the heart of our operations is a commitment to responsible sourcing and sustainable trade practices. Through our partners, we work closely with farming communities to ensure fair value for their produce, while promoting ethical standards and prioritizing farmer welfare across our supply chains.

With a growing international footprint and a passion for excellence, SFI Agri Commodities is driving value, integrity, and impact in global commodity markets.

Name: Ploughman Agro Private Limited
Description:
Ploughman Agro Pvt. Ltd. (PAPL) is redefining India's agricultural landscape by integrating sustainability, farmer empowerment, and profitability. As a for-profit social enterprise, we work directly with farmers, helping them secure premium prices through strategic partnerships, processing, brand-building, and access to credit. Our mission is to create a scalable, sustainable model that benefits all stakeholders—from growers to corporate partners—fostering shared prosperity and social impact.

What We Do

 Organic Value Chain Development
We form Organic Producer Groups (OPGs) to enhance yields and incomes, improving seed quality, processes, brand partnerships, and market access.

 Seed Production & Marketing
In collaboration with Farmers’ Cooperatives, we engage in contract farming to produce high-quality field crop seeds, process them through custom units, and market them via cooperatives and regional dealers.

 Sustainable Input Management
We work with input suppliers to ensure farmers access top-quality seeds, organic fertilizers, and decentralized production models. Our farm development program trains and supports growers in sustainable practices
.
 Organic Crop Production & Marketing
We support farmers in producing and marketing organic crops, including Cotton, Wheat, Paddy, Soybean, Maize, Pigeon Pea, Bengal Gram, Ashwagandha, Green Gram, and Black Gram. Our team provides training and guidance to help Farmers’ Cooperatives transition to organic farming.

Name: Retaaza
Description:
Very simply: we keep local food local to meet local needs. 

Retaaza is a mission-driven company that makes local food more accessible and affordable through a model that meaningfully supports both Georgia’s farmers as well as Georgia families struggling with food insecurity, while also reducing food waste. Retaaza serves as a connector between farmers and a variety of consumers to ensure a steady, diverse supply of locally-produced food to communities across Georgia.

If you are an organization thinking about sustainability and corporate social responsibility (CSR), reach out to chat about our creative strategies tailored specifically for you. 

** hi @ retaaza.com **

Name: AlpGiri Seed Sciences Private Limited - India
Description:
We, AlpGiri Seeds represent the JOURNEY from SMALL (seed) to BIG (plant). We understand and value the importance of seed research to deliver quality products to farmers and strengthen the agriculture of the country.

We are a research & Development (R&D) based breeding company recognised by DSIR, Govt. of India. We believe in technology adaptation for sustainability. Looking forward to future demands, we have entered into strategic MOU with global institutes viz. CIMMYT, Mexico (Corn), ICRISAT, Hyderabad (Pearl Millet). Besides this, the company has also tied up with the Harvest Plus program (bajra having hi-zinc and hi-iron content) to fight against malnutrition. We closely work in collaboration with USDA, NBPGR for germplasm exchange and SAUs for evaluation and testing of new products. We also do third-party product evaluations at our R & D centre.

We are awarded as  "INDIA's BEST 5000 MSMEs and Best Seed Manufacturing Company.

Name: Mercoguadiana Grupo
Description:
Información
Información sobre Mercoguadiana Grupo
UN GRUPO 100% EXTREMEÑO

Mercoguadiana es un grupo empresarial con accionariado 100 % extremeño creado en 1991 con el objetivo de cubrir las necesidades de los agricultores y ganaderos extremeños.

La actividad principal de esta compañía desde sus orígenes ha sido la comercialización de cereales, proteaginosas, materias primas para la ganadería, fertilizantes, semillas, fitosanitarios, zoosanitarios y otros servicios agrícolas.

El Grupo Mercoguadiana cuenta con 20 centros de actividad en los que  se desarrollan todos los procesos que realiza la empresa, desde la recepción, almacenaje y acondicionamiento de los distintos productos cultivados en nuestra región (maíz, arroz, trigo, cacahuetes, cebada, etc), así como los procedentes de otras regiones o países según las necesidades del mercado.
Posteriormente, desde estos centros se realizará la comercialización de productos terminados (semillas, fertilizantes, piensos compuestos, fitosanitarios, zoosanitarios, material auxiliar, grits de maíz, sémola de trigo duro, etc.).

Name: Mystic Flowers
Description:
We are a proud Ecuadorian company, creating a new standard for the flower industry. We produce and commercialize sustainable, socially responsible premium quality roses and summer flowers since 1997.   

We help the flower industry promote premium Ecuadorian flowers; by reconnecting people to nature's essence and showing the world the story behind every flower. Our goal is to inspire the flower industry making people’s lives more colorful and joyful. 

Our legacy is planted by gifted hands, grown with sustainable processes, shown in our legendary beautiful flowers year-round and, spread by you.  
We have a true commitment to social and environmental responsibility, the well-being of our staff, and strengthening the communities in which we live and work to make a real change in our world, leaving it a better place, with everything we do.

Name: Béni Mellal Citrus
Description:
Beni Mellal Citrus is an exporter of citrus. Our orchards are located in the region of Beni mellal and are packaged in a station located in the same region. It has 500 employees and a packaging capacity of 50,000 tons.

We have the latest machines and tools on the market to meet the needs of our customers.

Caring for the strictest international criteria, Beni Mellal Citrus offers services including packaging, processing, cold storage and the export of citrus fruits.

Once the harvest is finished, the citrus fruits are taken to the station. To do this, we use digital imaging and manual sorting with a bluish lamp to highlight the flaws. The fruits are then washed, dried, polished, graded and packaged in various packages.

It is at this time that we make rigorous quality controls according to the workbooks of our different customers.

Our orchards are GLOBAL GAP certified and satiation is BRC certified.

Name: ZEOLITECH, S. DE R.L. DE C.V.
Description: ZEOLITECH, S. DE R.L. DE C.V. es una compañía mexicana, miembro de un grupo de empresas dedicadas a la extracción, proceso y comercialización de minerales no metálicos para agricultura y ganadería. Contamos con roca fosfórica, zeolita, magnesita, tierras diatomeas, leonardita, sulfato de calcio o yeso agrícola, carbonato de calcio y magnesio o dolomita, óxido de zinc y manganeso, entre otros. Name: Kilimo Fresh Foods Africa Inc.
Description:
Kilimo Fresh is a social enterprise that leverages technology to aggregate fresh produce from smallholder farmers and deliver it to B2B customers and thousands of informal retailers in Dar es Salaam. The company runs an online platform that offers its customers a simple ordering platform that enables them to purchase their daily needs of fresh produce, then through its efficient distribution model, the company sources fresh produce directly from smallholder farmers, adds value through cleaning, sorting, and packaging, then delivers it to its customers' locations. By streamlining the value chain, the company has been able to drastically lower its customers' daily costs of goods by exploiting untapped value in fragmented, informal, chains and wholesale providers. In addition, it offers farmers stable prices (20% higher than those offered by middlemen), direct market access for their crops, and reduced food waste through the use of cold chain and cold storage facilities. 

Kilimo Fresh Foods' retailers benefit from a reliable supply chain, while customers enjoy fresher products at lower prices delivered to their locations. The company leverages on usage of data to build and improve its technology innovation in the Agri value chain.

Name: SOCOOPEC GROUP

Le groupe SOCOOPEC diversifie et développe ses activités avec la création de six filiales outre la société mère, qui sont : la société SIMMA, TUNIMATEC, SOGEMI, CODEMAT MONDIAL EXPORT et NORD SUD SERVICE.

Name: Gustav Wegener u. Sohn GmbH u. Co. KG
Description:
Fruchtgroßhändler, Erzeuger & Importeur:

Obst aus dem Alten Land hat seit Jahrhunderten Tradition, denn Klima und Boden im hohen Norden an der Elbe sind ideal für den Obstanbau. Heute ist die Kulturlandschaft „Altes Land“ das größte geschlossene Obstbaugebiet Nordeuropas. Hier produziert das Unternehmen Gustav Wegener und Sohn GmbH und Co. KG seit über 90 Jahren in vierter Generation Früchte von A wie Apfel bis Z wie Zwetsche.
Der Lebensmitteleinzelhandel und die Obst verarbeitende Saft-, Konserven- und Backwarenindustrie verlassen sich auf Wegener, der jährlich im Inland und Ausland etwa 70.000 Tonnen Obst liefert, Tendenz steigend. Umfangreiche Kühl-, Lager – und Sortierkapazitäten, mehrere leistungsfähige Packanlagen, ein eigener moderner Fuhrpark von Kühlfahrzeugen und ein engagiertes Team sorgen für Pünktlichkeit, Flexibilität und frische Qualität bei jedem Auftrag.


Alles aus einer Hand:

Wir sind ein familiengeführtes Unternehmen in der 4. Generation mit nahezu 100 Jahren Erfahrung im Anbau und Handel von Kern, Stein- und Beerenobst. Wir steuern und kontrollieren alle Prozesse von der Lagerung bis zur Auslieferung selber. Wir lagern, sortieren, verpacken und liefern. Wir sind damit unabhängig von externen Dienstleistern. Unsere Besonderheiten ergeben sich aus unserer Unternehmensstruktur – „Alles aus einer Hand“.

 Direkter Bezug der Ware ohne Umwege

Wir und unsere angeschlossenen Erzeuger sind Mitglieder der „MAL“ Marktgemeinschaft Altes Land. Ersthändiger Warenzugriff durch eine große Erzeugergemeinschaft und eine zentralseitige Beschaffung garantieren eine transparente Supply Chain. Wir kennen unsere Partner von Ursprung bis zum Kunden und geben das auch an Sie weiter. Wir importieren Äpfel, Birnen und Steinobst direkt aus Argentinien, Chile, Neuseeland und Südafrika über den Seehafen Hamburg. Alles ohne Zwischenhändler. Wir bieten damit ein Alleinstellungsmerkmal, was es derart nur selten in Deutschland gibt.

Name: Obst vom Bodensee Vertriebsgesellschaft

Name: Agrows

Name: Terra
Description:
Erfahrung und Leidenschaft, die man fühlen und schmecken kann! 
Terra ist mehr als ein Lieferant – wir sind Hüter einer fast 90-jährigen Tradition. Verankert im Herzen von Bozen, Südtirol, sind wir stolze Produzenten und Großhändler von erstklassigen Obst-, Gemüse-, Zitrusfrüchten und Kräuterprodukten aus konventionellem, biologischem und biodynamischem Anbau in ganz Italien. 
Unsere Reise bei Terra ist geprägt von einem Bekenntnis zu Exzellenz, Fachkenntnissen und Verantwortung. Wir verstehen die Wünsche unserer Kunden in Zentral- und Osteuropa, und unsere Erfolgsgeschichte spiegelt diese tiefe Verbindung wider. Unsere unternehmenseigene Logistik und strenge Qualitätskontrolle ermöglichen es uns, Premiumprodukte schnell und zuverlässig zu liefern und die höchsten Standards für unsere Kunden sicherzustellen. 
Als Business-Plattform arbeiten wir nach den Prinzipien von FRISCH – SCHNELL – ZUVERLÄSSIG. Unser Produktangebot steht synonym für Natürlich – Bio – Biodynamisch und verkörpert die Essenz von gesunden, nachhaltigen Entscheidungen.

Name: lehmann natur GmbH
Description:
Mit unserer Arbeit wollen die Welt verändern, zumindest ein Stück weit: Indem wir soviel Obst und Gemüse aus biodynamischem Anbau wie möglich verkaufen und diesen damit fördern. Dabei haben wir es uns zum Ziel gesetzt, immer transparent und fair zu handeln. Wir möchten, dass alle gleichermaßen profitieren: die Lieferanten, die Kunden und auch unsere Mitarbeiter.

Unseren Kunden aus dem Lebensmittel- und Großhandel liefern wir täglich bestes, erntefrisches, gesundes und vor allem hundert Prozent biologisch angebautes Obst und Gemüse aus der ganzen Welt – ausschließlich aus kontrolliert ökologischem und nachhaltigem Landbau. 

Wir sehen uns dabei als Dienstleister der ökologischen Landwirtschaft. Dazu unterstützen wir unsere Bio-Bauern und  ermöglichen unseren Handelskunden eine direkte Verbindung zu den Erzeugern. Verschiedene Kulturen und Sprachen bilden den Kern im täglichen Kontakt zu unseren Landwirten weltweit. Wir leben und lieben diese Internationalität.

lehmann natur steht für eine natürlich gute Zukunft: Ohne Chemie, ohne Gentechnik, ohne große schwere Maschinerie – aber dafür mit ganz viel Köpfchen und Herz. Der Erhalt der Umwelt und der nachhaltige Schutz der Natur haben für uns oberste Priorität.

Dieleman Potatoes exists to empower farmers with premium certified seed potatoes, ensuring higher yields, sustainable agricultural practices, and prosperity for agricultural communities.

Certified Seed Potatoes
Farm Advisory

Objectives
- Ensure a consistent and diverse supply of premium certified seed potatoes through global sourcing.
- Uphold stringent quality control measures to guarantee disease-resistant and high-germination seed potatoes.

Erfahrung und Leidenschaft, die man fühlen und schmecken kann! 
Terra ist mehr als ein Lieferant – wir sind Hüter einer fast 90-jährigen Tradition. Verankert im Herzen von Bozen, Südtirol, sind wir stolze Produzenten und Großhändler von erstklassigen Obst-, Gemüse-, Zitrusfrüchten und Kräuterprodukten aus konventionellem, biologischem und biodynamischem Anbau in ganz Italien. 
Unsere Reise bei Terra ist geprägt von einem Bekenntnis zu Exzellenz, Fachkenntnissen und Verantwortung. Wir verstehen die Wünsche unserer Kunden in Zentral- und Osteuropa, und unsere Erfolgsgeschichte spiegelt diese tiefe Verbindung wider. Unsere unternehmenseigene Logistik und strenge Qualitätskontrolle ermöglichen es uns, Premiumprodukte schnell und zuverlässig zu liefern und die höchsten Standards für unsere Kunden sicherzustellen. 
Als Business-Plattform arbeiten wir nach den Prinzipien von FRISCH – SCHNELL – ZUVERLÄSSIG. Unser Produktangebot steht synonym für Natürlich – Bio – Biodynamisch und verkörpert die Essenz von gesunden, nachhaltigen Entscheidungen.

Name: HASPE COMPANY SAC
Description:
*Presentation of HASPE COMPANY*

We are HASPE COMPANY, a Peruvian company founded in 2022 with the objective of satisfying the growing demand for high-quality fresh fruits in the international market. We specialize in the agro-exportation of products such as blueberries, avocados, and mandarins, as well as other seasonal fruits.

*Our Mission*

To offer fresh and high-quality products to our customers, meeting the highest standards of quality and food safety. We focus on customer satisfaction and building lasting relationships with our partners and suppliers.

*Our Products*

- Blueberries: fresh and high-quality, ideal for direct consumption or for the food industry.
- Avocados: Hass and Fuerte varieties, selected for their exceptional taste and texture.
- Mandarins: fresh and juicy, perfect for direct consumption or for juice and preserve production.
- Other seasonal fruits: we adapt to market demands and offer a variety of fresh and high-quality fruits.

*Our Vision*

To be leaders in Peruvian agro-exportation, recognized for our quality, innovation, and commitment to sustainability and the environment. We seek to expand our presence in the international market and establish solid relationships with our customers and partners.

*Our Values*

- Quality: we focus on offering fresh and high-quality products.
- Innovation: we seek to continually improve our processes and products.
- Sustainability: we are committed to producing and exporting in a responsible and environmentally friendly manner.
- Teamwork: we value collaboration and teamwork to achieve our objectives.

We hope this presentation has allowed you to learn a bit more about our company and products. Thank you for your interest in HASPE COMPANY!

 Il servizio GREEN è dedicato ai prodotti e al supporto per la realizzazione, la manutenzione e la cura del verde urbano ed extraurbano, la floricoltura, il vivaismo e le giovani piante in genere.

Name: Coopérative des Sauniers de l’Ile de Ré
Description:
La Coopérative des Sauniers de l’île de Ré existe depuis plus de 80 ans : son but est la mise en commun de moyens humains et matériels permettant d’assurer les opérations nécessaires à la vente de nos productions de Gros Sel et de Fleur de Sel.

Aujourd’hui, nous sommes près de 70 producteurs de sel adhérents et environ 25 salariés à l’année.

Gérée par un Conseil d’Administration, composé de 15 producteurs, la Coopérative des Sauniers a aussi un rôle de référent auprès de différents interlocuteurs pour la défense de la profession, l’accès à la formation, l’installation et l’accompagnement de nouveaux sauniers, la réhabilitation d’anciens marais salants…

Par toutes ses actions et, notamment en valorisant au mieux le sel, la Coopérative des Sauniers de l’Île de Ré permet aux adhérents de vivre de leur métier et, ainsi, de pérenniser l’activité salicole. 

Véritable entreprise de l’agro-alimentaire, notre Coopérative développe une gamme variée de produits :  Gros Sel, Fleur de Sel, Sel Fin, Sels aux Aromates, ...  et travaille avec nombre de clients appréciant la qualité de notre sel et soucieux d'une origine de renom.

La Coopérative des Sauniers de l'île de Ré a engagé en 1997 une démarche qualité et de certification : Elle a mis en place un cahier des charges interne permettant d’assurer la qualité constante des produits livrés, dans des conditions d’hygiène et de sécurité optimales. Ainsi, la coopérative est certifiée IFS (International Features Standard) depuis 2008, certificat exigé par la Grande Distribution.

Elle continue d’écrire son histoire entre tradition et modernité.

Our product portfolio includes high-demand spices such as candlenut (kemiri), clove, lemongrass, white pepper, porang, elephant ginger, galangal, and premium-grade rice. Each spice is carefully sourced from trusted farmers, tested for quality, and processed with strict adherence to international standards, making us a reliable partner for food manufacturers, distributors, and exporters worldwide.

At PT Nusantara Spice Gemilang, we prioritize transparency and compliance, holding all necessary certifications including NIB, company registration, and tax identification to provide our partners with peace of mind and legal assurance. Our commitment extends beyond product excellence to include efficient logistics and tailored customer service, designed to meet the unique needs of both local and export markets.

Driven by innovation and deep industry knowledge, we continuously explore ways to enhance the value chain of Indonesian spices. We believe in the potential of local natural resources to create lasting impact globally, supporting sustainable farming practices and empowering local communities.

Partner with PT Nusantara Spice Gemilang to experience authentic Indonesian spices delivered with integrity, quality, and a vision for global growth.

Name: Ndugu Coffee
Description:
Buy our coffee here: www.ndugu.coffee/shop (only Netherlands)

Ndugu Coffee is a Ugandan coffee brand focused on producing high-quality Robusta coffee, with respect for both the environment and the communities that grow it. Our mission is to support small-scale coffee farmers in Uganda by offering fair prices and helping them improve their cultivation methods. We work closely with local farmers to promote sustainable, environmentally-friendly farming practices, while strengthening the local economy.

Our Robusta coffee grows primarily in the lowland regions of Uganda, where the tropical climate provides ideal conditions for cultivating these bold and flavorful beans. Ugandan Robusta is known for its strong, earthy flavor profile, with hints of chocolate and spices.

By investing in the future of farmers and the quality of their products, we aim to create a fair and transparent supply chain that benefits both our producers and our customers. At Ndugu Coffee, we believe that fair trade, sustainability, and quality go hand in hand in making a positive impact on both local communities and the global coffee market.

MediGran is al ruim 35 jaar gespecialiseerd in het verzamelen, telen en verwerken van zaden van inheemse planten. Door haar expertise is MediGran toonaangevend in de toepassing van inheemse kruidenmengsels, wilde bloemenmengsels, bermmengsels en weidemengsels voor een natuurvriendelijke leefomgeving en ecologische groenbeheer.

De soorten toegepast in de kruidenmengsels zijn gekozen op basis van ecologische en plantsociologische principes, terwijl de onderlinge verhoudingen zorgen voor een evenwichtig zaadmengsel. Wij geven u graag advies bij uw streven naar een natuurvriendelijke leefomgeving en ecologisch verantwoord groenbeheer.

Met een 40-tal kruidenmengsels en ongeveer 700 soorten zaden van inheemse planten helpt MediGran bij natuurontwikkeling en de ontwikkeling van een grotere biodiversiteit van de inheemse flora.

Name: Drakoulis Wholesales
Description:
Με ηγετικό ρόλο στον χώρο του κρέατος και ισχυρή παρουσία 60 χρόνων στην ελληνική αγορά, η εταιρεία Drakoulis συνεχίζει να εξελίσσεται, με στόχο να προσφέρει στους πελάτες της εξαιρετικά προϊόντα κρέατος κορυφαίας ποιότητας και αποκλειστικών κοπών. 

Στο πλαίσιο της επέκτασης των δραστηριοτήτων της, η ίδρυση της Drakoulis Wholesales, τον Ιούνιο του 2021, σηματοδότησε τη δυναμική είσοδο της εταιρείας στον τομέα της χονδρικής πώλησης, επεξεργασίας, μεταποίησης και τυποποίησης, προμηθεύοντας κρεοπωλεία, εταιρείες τροφοδοσίας, ξενοδοχεία, εστιατόρια, catering, executive chefs και ιδιωτικά σκάφη αναψυχής. Οι φουτουριστικές εγκαταστάσεις της εταιρείας στο Κορωπί πληρούν όλες τις ευρωπαϊκές πιστοποιήσεις, αντανακλώντας την πρωτοποριακή προσέγγιση, τόσο του ιδρυτή της Σταύρου Δρακούλη όσο και της έμπειρης και εξειδικευμένης ομάδας του. 

Ένα ισχυρό brand name στην ελληνική αγορά, συνώνυμο με premium προϊόντα και υπηρεσίες, η εταιρεία Drakoulis επαναπροσδιορίζει την έννοια της κατανάλωσης προϊόντων κρέατος μέσα από τα κρεοπωλεία της, όπου διατίθενται από τα πιο κλασσικά κρέατα υψηλής ποιότητας και premium επιλογές αποκλειστικής διάθεσης, έως και δημιουργικές προτάσεις αλλά και ιδιαίτερες κοπές. 

Ταυτόχρονα, τα εστιατόρια Drakoulis Dry & Raw προσφέρουν στους λάτρεις της καρνιβορικής κουζίνας μια μοναδική γαστρονομική εμπειρία σε ένα ατμοσφαιρικό  και πολυτελές περιβάλλον, όπου οι θαμώνες απολαμβάνουν μια ξεχωριστή εμπειρία, καθώς ο χώρος  μεταμορφώνεται υπό τους ρυθμούς ηλεκτρονικής μουσικής, καταθέτοντας τη δική του  ξεχωριστή  πρόταση στην εστιατορική διασκέδαση. 

Ο Στράτος Δρακούλης είναι από τους πρώτους στον χώρο που μύησε το ελληνικό κοινό στα καλύτερα προϊόντα κρέατος στον κόσμο, όπως το Kobe beef, το Wagyu αλλά και το Matsusaka.
Στα άμεσα σχέδια της εταιρείας είναι η επέκταση στον τομέα του Delcatessen, η παραγωγή του 1ου ελληνικού Wagyu με Έλληνες farmers και η ισχυροποίησή της στον τομέα του yachting ως εξειδικευμένος yacht provisioner με κρέατα κορυφαίας ποιότητα

Name: Fresh Dairy
Description:
Established in 2018, Fresh Dairy became one of the most significant milk producing companies in Egypt supplying fresh milk to some of the most significant and multinational companies in Egypt, Spread on 50 acres in the historically rich city of Ismailia.

Fresh Dairy operates four milk trucks on a daily basis to transport all milk produced from the farm right to the clients doorstep. Safely arriving with a badge of excellence and freshness.

 With more than 1000 milking heads of the world’s finest Holstein cattle Fresh Dairy has a production capacity of 12,000,000 tons per year. State of the art facilities is what highlights Fresh Dairy in the market. At Fresh Dairy farms only DeLaval’s most innovative automatic milking solutions are exclusively used.

De esta forma, Alif Agro logra posicionarse como referente en calidad premium en toda la provincia, brindando un producto delicioso en sabor, calibre y firmeza, reconocido mundialmente por sus beneficios para la salud

Name: Les Fruits de Madagascar
Description:
Les Fruits De Madagascar (FDM), fondée en 2011 et basée sur l’île de Nosy-Be, est une entreprise de surgélation de fruits tropicaux. La société propose des produits classique (IQF et purée), mais aussi du sur mesure, adaptés aux exigences de ses partenaires et collabore exclusivement avec des petits producteurs des régions Nord de Madagascar. En privilégiant une relation directe et équitable, FDM garantit une juste rémunération aux agriculteurs, contribuant ainsi à leur autonomie économique et au développement d’une communauté rurale.
Chaque fruit surgelé porte l’empreinte d’un territoire et d’un fort engagement humain. L’amélioration du niveau de vie des producteurs marginalisés, le développement économique durable et la protection de l’environnement, tel sont nos défis du quotidien.

Name: Breselow Family Farms LLC
Description: At Breselow Family Farms we pride ourselves on providing only the highest quality beef to our customers. Our all beef, no dairy crosses, are raised in the most stress-free way. Our livestock are fed only locally sourced grains and hay, are pasture raised and are hormone and antibiotic free. Additionally, we practice sustainable farming and natural harvesting. Natural harvesting is a stress-free way of dispatching animals keeping cortisol levels low giving our customers a flavorful/tender cut of beef. From our Farm to your table, we look forward to being your farmer.

Name: Seaweed Asia
Description:

With a trusted farmer network spanning Sulawesi, Bali, Java, and Sumatra, and over 100+ containers shipped, we solve the biggest challenges in seaweed procurement—inconsistency, seasonal risks, and quality variations.

Our investments in drying infrastructure, warehousing, and compliance systems ensure 3rd-party verified quality, reliable volumes, and smooth export compliance—so procurement managers, food & pet food manufacturers, biostimulant producers, and pharmaceutical companies never have to worry about supply chain disruptions.

Backed by 5+ years of experience, we make sure your supply chain never stops.

Name: SOPROCOPIV COOP CA
Description:
La SOPROCOPIV est une société coopérative qui offre à son environnement social et naturel d’innombrables opportunités devant tant soit peu contribuer au progrès socio-économique des paysans planteurs du café , quinquina et cacao en particulier et du pays tout entier en général.

Notre Mission est d’amener la Production du café, cacao et quinquina congolais à un niveau concurrentiel de celui des pays réputés en matière de produits agricole et industriels à travers le monde afin de valoriser les efforts des paysans en leur offrant des meilleurs prix et des primes d’excellence sur les certificats de qualité obtenus.

La SOPROCOPIV dispose actuellement de quatre certificats UTZ, ORGANIC et Fair For Life. UTZ est un programme de certification de durabilité pour le café, le cacao et le thé, collaborant avec les marques existantes.  Le certificat ORGANIC quant à lui, se penche sur le café biologique produit sans l’aide des substances chimiques artificielles, tel que certains additifs ou certains pesticides et  herbicides. Le Certificat Fair For Life est un programme de certification pour le commerce équitable et les filières responsables. cette certification se penche sur plus d’EQUITE, le respect de droit de l’homme et conditions de travail descentes, le respect de l’environnement, la biodiversité et le climat et agir pour un développement local durable.

Dans le cadre de l'amélioration de la vie socio-economique des ses membres, plusieurs projets sont réalisés en collaboration avec Plusieurs partenaires.

La coopérative dispose déjà de son propre laboratoire d'analyse du café, cacao et quinquina permettant ainsi de certifier la qualité de ces produits avant exportation

Name: Marin Agro
Description: Marin Agro es un proveedor lider de soluciones en proteccion vegetal. Somos fieles a nuestro lema corporativo que busca que los cultivos de nuestros clientes se desarrollen mas sanos y vigorosos generando bienestar en las comunidades donde operamos. Estamos comprometidos en implementar innovacion en agroquimicos, semillas, maquinaria, fertilizantes y manejo agronómico de cultivos.

Name: Kandima Farm Harvest
Description:
Kandima Farm Harvest is a Zimbabwe-based fresh produce export company supplying export-standard fruits and vegetables to the UAE and other international markets.

We work directly with farms and manage the full export process, from agronomy support and quality control through to cold-chain logistics and export documentation, ensuring consistent quality, compliance, and reliable delivery for our buyers.

Our operations are built to meet the expectations of UAE importers, wholesalers, retailers, and hospitality buyers who value predictability, clear specifications, and professional execution.

What we supply

Blueberries | Fine Beans | Sugar Snaps | Mange Tout | Avocados | Prickly Pears | Macadamia Nuts
(Seasonal produce available based on buyer demand)

What buyers can expect

Export-standard grading and packaging

Cold-chain managed handling from origin to shipment

Full export documentation for smooth UAE clearance

Traceability and quality assurance at farm level

Clear communication on specifications, volumes, and timelines

We are focused on long-term supply partnerships, not transactional shipments. Our priority is to be a dependable sourcing partner that integrates smoothly into our buyers’ supply chains.

For sourcing discussions, specifications, or partnership inquiries, we welcome professional engagement.

Name: SA PECANS
Description:
SA Pecans has been active in pecan processing and exporting since 2007 and is one of the fastest growing pecan processers in South Africa. We process in-shell and shelled pecans and manage exports to the United States, Europe and China and are in fact the current leader in Pecan Export in SA. SA Pecans is situated in the heart of pecan producing areas in South Africa, in a town called Hartswater in the Northern Cape Province.

Our processing facility has top of the range machinery to ensure only the best pecan product to our buyers, and our team assists our farmers with orchard management, internal knowledge on pecans and various different market strategies.

SA Pecans is an active member of the South African Pecan Producers Association (SAPPA)

Our Pecans are 100% South African.

Name: FLY AWAY MULTISERVICES LDA
Description: A FLY AWAY MULTISERVICES SU LDA (FAM), é uma empresa Moçambicana. Que actua no sector do comércio de produtos alimentares e prestação de serviços. Name: Starmilk Benelux

Name: Oskondi-Agro
Description:
Oskondi-Agro LLC is a modern company in the grain market of Ukraine, founded by professionals with many years of experience working with the largest grain exporters in Ukraine and the world.

The main area of activity is the purchase and sale of grain and oil crops for export in ship consignments, as well as trading in mineral fertilizers produced in Ukraine. Accumulation, storage, and shipment are carried out through our own warehouse facilities located in the port of Izmail. 

We operate our own sea grain terminal in Mykolaiv with a grain storage capacity of 190,000 metric tons, as well as a terminal in the Danube River area in Izmail with a storage capacity of 16,000 metric tons. All grain receiving points have certified laboratories.

Our team organizes purchases on EXW and FCA terms for partners. It also purchases DAP and CPT in the ports of Chornomorsk, Izmail, Odesa, Pivdenny, and Mykolaiv. 

We supply grain (on CIF terms) to more than 11 countries. Our strategic plans include expanding the geography of our presence and exploring markets in East, Central Asia, and China.

Our goal is to provide customers with world-class products and services at competitive prices.

Name: Alterans Foods & Beverages
Description:
Alterans Foods and Beverages SARL est une entreprise agroalimentaire spécialisée dans la production et transformation de piments. 
Nous disposons d’une plantation de 20 Ha dans la localité de Ndokama dans le département du Nkam, région du Littoral au Cameroun. Nous produisons principalement : 
-Le piment frais Habanero principalement ainsi que des produits dérivés notamment les fruits de piments secs et la poudre de piment 

Notre entreprise se spécialise dans la culture de piments biologiques. En effet, nous croyons en la puissance de la nature pour offrir des produits sains et savoureux. En produisant et commercialisant des piments, nous nous engageons à promouvoir une alimentation saine, à soutenir des pratiques agricoles durables et à contribuer positivement à la communauté locale à Douala et environnante.
Notre mission est de fournir des piments biologiques de haute qualité pour promouvoir une alimentation saine et durable et notre vision est devenir d’ici 5 ans, le leader du marché des piments biologiques en Afrique centrale, tout en soutenant les pratiques agricoles durables.

Name: Agrícola Agrial
Description: Nuestro compromiso es con el agricultor y productor nacional, suministrándole los mejores productos que puedan ayudarle a solucionar los problemas que encuentre en su labor productiva, y es con este propuesto, que nos hemos dado la tarea de completar un paquete de productos de la mejor calidad para los cultivos de mayor importancia a nivel nacional como lo son los granos, las frutas, hortalizas y ornamentales entre otros; de forma que podamos satisfacer las necesidades de nuestro agricultor y de los diferentes cultivos, con una cualidad que ha sido contar con personal que cree en la innovación tecnológica, procurando así mayor efectividad con responsabilidad ambiental.

Name: Global Organic Food (Global kuruyemiş) Turkiye
Description:
We, as a Global Organic Food, are one of the well-known players in organic trade based in Mersin, Türkiye. We know the responsibility of being one of a major organic sector, and we work with all our strength by using our expertise and passion in the supply of organic food to our customers around the globe. Our primary goal is to contribute to a more sustainable planet. We believe in the power of long term relationships with our customers, that’s why we know each and every customer deserve the best expertise and best organic products.

VISION & MISSION
Sourcing Excellence:  We aim to curate a diverse and high-quality selection of organic products from reputable farmers and suppliers globally, ensuring the integrity of our products and meeting the highest organic standards.

Customer Commitment: Our mission is to provide our customers with a reliable source of nutritious and organic products, fostering a healthier lifestyle and contributing to the well-being of communities worldwide.

Environmental Stewardship: We are committed to promoting sustainable agricultural practices by partnering with farmers who prioritize soil health, biodiversity, and water conservation. 

Ethical Trading: Upholding the principles of fair trade, we strive to create mutually beneficial relationships with our partners. 

Global Impact: Our mission extends beyond profit margins; we aspire to be a positive force for global change. By promoting organic agriculture and ethical trade practices, we seek to contribute to the global movement towards a more sustainable and equitable food system.

Quality Assurance: Committed to delivering excellence, we implement rigorous quality control measures to ensure that our customers receive organic products that meet the highest standards of purity, freshness, and nutritional value.

Name: SIP GLOBAL HUB
Description:

Name: Aegten nv
Description:
Al meer dan 85 jaar is de naam Aegten een vaste waarde in het landbouwleven. Aanvankelijk in Meeuwen (Oudsbergen) en omstreken, vandaag tot ver over de Nederlandse grenzen. Nu de vierde generatie van de familie Aegten actief is in het team, staan we klaar voor de toekomst. 

Ontdek onze gemeenschappelijke visie:

- We zijn en blijven een gezond bedrijf. 
- We stellen in al ons handelen denken de klant centraal. 
- Onze mensen maken het verschil, daarom blijven we investeren in hun welbevinden en ontwikkeling. Aegten is een bedrijf waar medewerkers zich goed en veilig voelen. 
- We zijn een onafhankelijke schakel tussen de producent/de multinational en de eindklant met een eigen productie en opslagcapaciteit. We kiezen onze leveranciers met zorg uit, zodat we betrouwbare en loyale partners zijn. 
- We gaan voor gedifferentieerde en gecontroleerde groei en uitmuntendheid in elke tak. 
- We bouwen onze positie in de Euroregio verder uit. 
- We brengen steeds toegevoegde waarde aan onze klanten, waarbij we zorgen voor een optimale groei van plant, dier en omgeving, zodat u als klant uitgroeit tot een duurzame onderneming die klaarstaat voor de uitdagingen van morgen.

Name: IMPORTCOMERS S.A.S
Description: VENTA AL POR MAYOR Y MENOR DE MATERIAS PRIMAS E INSUMOS ACUICOLAS, AGRICOLAS Y NITRUCION

Name: Whiskey Sisters Supply
Description:
We’re Stephanie and Felicia, the craft spirits-obsessed sibling duo behind Whiskey Sisters Supply.

We believe what’s in the bottle and how it gets there matters. That grain-to-glass distillers can, and will, become tomorrow's spirits industry leaders. And we’re on a mission to make it possible by providing grains grown with integrity. 

We supply our partners with premium-quality grain grown on small local farms, including some of the same fields where we played as kids. We champion the spirits brands we serve, supporting your every effort to deliver a product you’re proud to print your name on. Not because it’s our job, but because we believe in your booze, and your brand, as much as you do.

Together, we can evolve craft spirits by valuing quality, transparency, and an origin story above all else. The consumer appetite for authenticity is already there. Let’s serve them a bottle of something even better—and have a little fun while we do it. 

(It is whiskey after all.)

Name: SA PEANUTS
Description: SA Peanuts, the largest processor of peanuts in South Africa. With a state-of-the-art, commercial and seed plant for peanuts, in Hartswater, Northern Cape. SA Peanuts offers a competitive advantage! We add value to your product. Our extensive experience enables us to explore all opportunities for both business and farmer. You can be assured that product quality and safety is our first priority. SA Peanuts processes around 15 000 tonnes of groundnuts per year. The plant has the capacity to process 30 000 tons per year, which is 50 % of South Africa's total peanut production Not only are we the largest processor of peanuts in South Africa, for the last 15 years, SA Peanuts has continued to conduct trials to improve cultivars by importing and testing varieties from the USA. Over time, SA Peanuts has developed a High Oliec Spanish variety that performs impeccably under irrigation and also areas of dry land farming. This places the farmer in a better financial position due to better yield and grading. These trials are expanded annually and will remain part of SA Peanuts’ vision for the future.

Name: Manifértil
Description:
Na Manifértil, não apenas fornecemos fertilizantes – cultivamos soluções que transformam o campo. Somos uma empresa jovem, movida pela paixão pelo agronegócio e pelo compromisso com um futuro mais produtivo e sustentável.

Combinamos a expertise de quem entende do mercado com a energia de quem está sempre inovando. Aqui, você encontra mais que produtos de alta qualidade; encontra um parceiro que entende suas necessidades e está ao seu lado em cada etapa do caminho.

O que nos move?

Sustentabilidade: Acreditamos que cuidar da terra hoje é garantir colheitas abundantes amanhã.

Inovação: Buscamos constantemente novas tecnologias e soluções para elevar a produtividade do seu negócio.

Qualidade: Nossos fertilizantes são desenvolvidos com rigor técnico e certificações que garantem resultados excepcionais.

Parceria: Somos mais que um fornecedor – somos um aliado que cresce junto com você.

Seja você um produtor rural, uma indústria, um distribuidor ou uma misturadora, a Manifértil tem a solução certa para o seu desafio. Description:
L’Ail Drômois is an Economic Interest Group (Groupement d’intérêt économique: GIE) created in 1995 thanks to the impetus of farmers specialized in the cultivation of garlic and shallot, with the aim of joining their efforts for the marketing and development of the sector. Thus, our group controls the quality of its production, from planting to consumption. 
A know-how, enriched with more than 50 years of experience, combined with the passion of our producers, the sun and the “Provençal mistral”, guarantees you a product with exceptional terroir. Moreover, the use of varieties adapted to the local climate is an additional guarantee of quality. Our involved producers favour the direct link with the buyer by participating in the marketing of their products in France and abroad. In this way, L’Ail Dromois exports part of its production to more than 30 countries around the world, while being involved in maintaining short sales channels and with local French partners.

تعمل الشركة على تحقيق التكامل في صناعة الدواجن من خلال إدارة وتشغيل مزارع أمهات الدواجن الموصلة، مزارع تربية دواجن التسمين.
في سعيها للتكامل أسست شركة طيبة لجدود الدواجن المتخصصة في إنتاج كتاكيت أمهات التسمين، والتي استطاعت الحصول على وكالة سلسلة التسمين "هبرد" (Hubbard) في مصر من شركة أفجان العالمية.
وأنشأت عدة كيانات متخصصة تشمل معامل تفريخ، مصانع أعلاف، منشآت لتجارة الحبوب، والماء، والمستلزمات، وتجارة الخامات البيطرية.
تواصل الشركة في صناعة الدواجن من خلال طرح منتجات جديدة، وتوسّعها في تطبيق أحدث التقنيات العالمية لضمان أعلى مستويات الجودة والكفاءة.

“Atameken-Agro” is growing and developing, but always keeps its focus on the main mission: “Cultivating the land of our ancestors and employing innovative agricultural practices, we preserve and nurture the wealth of our native soil, thereby contributing to the food security and prosperity of the country”. 

The company is one of the leaders of the Kazakhstani agricultural sector, whose land fund is more than 440 thousand hectares, located in the North Kazakhstan and Akmola regions. During the year, the holding companies produce about 400 thousand tons of various crops. The produced crops are sold both on the domestic and world markets. Name: TRECIA Enterprise
Description:
Trecia Enterprise is an innovative company that connects farmers directly with consumers, retailers, and food vendors.

Our mission goes beyond profit; we aim to reduce food costs, increase profit margins for our partners, and provide affordable food options for high and low income earners.

HOW IT WORKS

We source fresh produce directly from farmers and sell it to:

1. Consumers:
At affordable prices, regardless of quantity.

2. Retailers:
Enabling them to increase their profit margins.

3. Food Vendors:
Providing high quality ingredients at lower costs, helping them maintain profitability.

IMPACT 

By cutting out intermediaries, we:

1. Empower farmers:
By providing a direct market for their produce.

2. Support low income earners:
By offering affordable food options.

3. Create investment opportunities:
In agriculture, generating profits while contributing to social impact.

INVESTMENT OPPORTUNITY 

Join us in making a positive impact while generating returns. Invest in Treasure Enterprise and contribute to:

1. Agricultural development:
Supporting farmers and sustainable agriculture practices.

2. Food security:
Helping to provide affordable food options for low-income earners.

3. Social responsibility:
Investing in a business that prioritizes social impact alongside financial returns.

Description:
AJOS BASCÓN ROLDÁN está ubicado en Montalbán de Córdoba, una tierra con eminente tradición familiar con el cultivo y la comercialización del ajo.
Nuestra capacidad productiva es de más de 2 millones de kilos y contamos con unas modernas instalaciones de 5.500 m2 para almacenamiento y manipulado, además de varias cámaras frigoríficas.
En nuestras instalaciones se realiza una importante labor de manipulado y selección de los ajos más óptimos. Posteriormente se procesa el ajo para su correspondiente empaquetamiento. 

EXPORTACIONES: 
Llevamos más de 5 años exportando a diversos países europeos como Francia, Chequia, Alemania, Italia….El 60% de nuestra producción está destinada al mercado internacional, mercados europeos muy exigentes con el producto y que demandan ajo español. Esto ha sido posible debido al gran compromiso con la calidad de nuestros productos 
CALIDAD 
Ofrecemos un ajo de máxima calidad y un servicio altamente cualificado. Apostamos por la diferenciación en lo referente a la manipulación y selección del ajo, realizándose casi todo el proceso de forma manual. La manipulación y selección óptima del ajo garantiza un producto de calidad a nuestros clientes.

Desde un comienzo, Xeax Alimentos ha tenido claro que como empresa, su compromiso más importante ha sido y siempre será con cada familia del país, y por eso dentro de nuestra fábrica trabajamos día tras día con el objetivo de poder llegar a todos los hogares venezolanos y brindar así alegría, calidad y tranquilidad con cada uno de nuestros productos, hechos de venezolanos… para venezolanos.

Sostenibilidad y Desarrollo Responsable
Preservamos suelos, agua y ecosistemas, asegurando un modelo agropecuario sostenible y un legado productivo para futuras generaciones.

Alianzas y Comercialización

Inversión Inteligente en el Agro
Transformamos el potencial del campo en inversiones seguras y rentables, optimizando riesgos y maximizando retornos con datos e innovación.

Name: Semmis Harvest
Description:
Welcome to our family-run farm, where we cultivate a harmonious blend of corn, strawberries, and watermelons.

At our farm, we take pride in nurturing the bounties of nature with love and care. As a close-knit family, we have dedicated ourselves to sustainable farming practices and delivering the highest quality produce to our customers.

Our cornfields stretch as far as the eye can see, with golden ears bursting with flavor and nutritional goodness. Our strawberries, hand-picked with precision, offer a burst of sweetness that captivates the senses. And our luscious watermelons, grown under the warm sun, provide a refreshing treat that epitomizes summer.

With a deep respect for the land and a commitment to environmental stewardship, we strive to cultivate our crops in a way that preserves our natural resources and ensures the long-term sustainability of our farm. We prioritize responsible water usage, soil health, and integrated pest management to minimize our ecological footprint.

As a family-run enterprise, we believe in the power of community and the importance of supporting local agriculture. We engage with our customers, forging strong relationships built on trust and transparency. By sharing our farming journey and the stories behind our products, we aim to connect people with the origins of their food and inspire a greater appreciation for the hard work that goes into each harvest.

Join us on LinkedIn as we continue to grow and cultivate not only exceptional crops but also a thriving agricultural community. Together, let's celebrate the beauty of farming, the flavors of our harvest, and the enduring legacy of family values in agriculture.

Name: Fenix Agro
Description:
Fenix Agro – це Компанія, яка впроваджує та розвиває бізнес-модель «сервіс, як продукт», через надання нашим партнерам якісних послуг на аграрному ринку у сфері постачання сировини.

Основні напрямки діяльності:
- постачання кормової сировини;
- зернотрейдинг;
- постачання мінеральних добрив;
- транспортна логістика.

Наша мета - розвивати сервіс Компанії у якісний продукт для наших партнерів. В результаті, стати одним із найкращих сервісів на аграрному ринку із зручною та зрозумілою системою обслуговування, до послуг якого, наші партнери зможуть повертатись знову і знову та рекомендувати іншим. 

Основними принципами Компанії є:
- Сервіс. Fenix Agro – це налагоджена система сервісних рішень для наших партнерів. Компанія надає партнерам комплекс логістичних та супутніх сервісів.
- Акредитація. Ваша довіра – наша репутація. Ми працюємо тільки із перевіреними контрагентами. Всі партнери проходять акредитацію, яка підтверджує правомірність відповідної діяльності в рамках закону України. 
- Якість. Вся продукція від постачальників перевіряється у незалежних лабораторіях, що дає гарантії якості доставленого продукту. 
- Фінанси. Маючи стабільну фінансову систему, Компанія Fenix Agro може гарантувати своїм партнерам точну та своєчасну оплату товару та послуг.

Name: POLECKI TRADING
Description:
Firma H.J.C Polecki Trading jest zlokalizowana w centrum Polski. Nasz kraj od wieków jest łącznikiem pomiędzy wschodem i zachodem; w geopolityce określany jako „pomost bałtycko-czarnomorski”.

W Polsce spotykają się drogi wschód – zachód , północ- południe. To tu łączą się drogi z Rosji, Ukrainy, Kazachstanu. Dziś nawet istnieje bezpośrednie połączenie kolejowe z Chinami wożące towary z Państwa Środka do Łodzi. Połączenie to dzięki intensywnemu wsparciu wzrasta na znaczeniu i staje się jednym z najważniejszych wyzwań ekonomicznych dla chińskiej administracji jako część tzw. Nowego Jedwabnego Szlaku.

Pomimo tego wymiana handlowa w sektorze agro pomiędzy Polską, Rosją Ukrainą i Kazachstanem wrasta z roku na rok. Branża rolna jest również bardzo mocna w innych krajach Europy Środkowej Takie kraje jak Czechy, Słowacja, Węgry, Rumunia, Bułgaria również aktywnie uczestniczą w wymianie towarów z logiem EU, oferując dobra w przystępnych cenach i wysoką jakością.

Nasza firma pomaga w pozyskaniu i utrzymaniu owocnej współpracy pomiędzy partnerami z Europy Środkowej i Wschodniej. Dzięki naszej rozległej bazie kontaktów w całym regionie jak również w Azji Wschodniej naszym klientom wyszukujemy najlepsze oferty. Dzięki temu możliwe jest osiągnięcie wyższego poziomy wymiany handlowej dla każdej ze stron. Rozumianego jako optymalizacja kosztów do jakości, minimalizacja kosztów transportów, ułatwienie komunikacji poprzez skrócenie drogi decyzyjnej. Innymi słowy współpraca z nami się opłaca.

Description:
نهادینو چیست؟
نهادینو یک استارتاپ جوانمحور و دانشبنیان است؛ تیمی متشکل از متخصصان کشاورزی، فناوری و بازرگانی که به دنبال ساخت آیندهای پربارتر برای کشاورزی ایران هستند.

ما باور داریم که تغییر از دل جوانان برمیآید، از ذهنهای خلاق و جسور. به همین دلیل نهادینو نه فقط یک پلتفرم، بلکه یک حرکت است؛ حرکتی به سوی کشاورزی پایدار، هوشمند و سودآور برای همه.

نهادینو، پلتفرمی نوآورانه برای خرید و فروش آنلاین تجهیزات و نهادههای کشاورزی (مانند کود، سم، بذر، تجهیزات آبیاری و ...) است که با هدف تحول در زنجیره تأمین این حوزه طراحی شده است. ما در نهادینو به دنبال تسهیل، شفافسازی و دیجیتالیسازی فرایند تأمین نهادهها برای کشاورزان، فروشندگان و تولیدکنندگان هستیم.

نهادینو با تکیه بر زیرساختهای فناورانه، امکان دسترسی مستقیم کشاورزان به محصولات باکیفیت، قیمتگذاری منصفانه و اطلاعات دقیق فنی را فراهم میکند و به فروشندگان کمک میکند بازار خود را توسعه دهند.

ما با باور به آینده کشاورزی هوشمند، تلاش میکنیم ارتباطی پایدار و ارزشآفرین بین تکنولوژی و زمین برقرار کنیم

در نهادینو، ما به رشد ریشهها فکر میکنیم

Name: Dieckmann Futtermittel GmbH & Co.KG
Description:

Heute sorgen über 100 Mitarbeiter in der Unternehmensgruppe unter anderem dafür, dass vor allem flüssiges Futtermittel an die Landwirtschaft geliefert wird. Name: Raiffeisen-Warengenossenschaft Niedersachsen Mitte eG
Description:
Die Raiffeisen-Warengenossenschaft Niedersachsen Mitte eG gehört zu den größten Produktions- und Handelsunternehmen für Agrargüter in Niedersachsen. Mit einem Jahresumsatz von 450 Mio.€ und mehr als 450 Beschäftigten in der Unternehmensgruppe leben wir jeden Tag unseren Slogan: ECHT. STARK. NAH.

Wertschöpfung vor der eigenen Haustür zu ermöglichen, den ländlichen Raum im Ganzen zu stärken und nicht zuletzt ein Stück Lebensqualität in unseren Dörfern und Städten zu erhalten, ist unsere Verpflichtung und Herausforderung als Genossenschaft.

Und dies seit über 100 Jahren.

BERATUNG UND PRODUKT
Mit unseren 13 Vertriebs- und Geschäftsstellen, 3 Obst- und Gemüsezentren, 17 Raiffeisen-Märkten, 23 Tankstellen sowie zahlreichen Dienstleistungsangeboten sind wir leistungsstarker Partner sowohl des landwirtschaftlichen Profis als auch des Hobbyfarmers und der ländlichen Bevölkerung. Im Wissen, Qualitätsprodukte mit erstklassiger Beratung vereinen zu können, lässt uns jeden Tag aufs Neue unsere Devise „Nähe zum Kunden“ unter Beweis stellen. Ein eigener Fuhrpark und ein kontinuierlich optimiertes Netz aus Geschäfts- und Vertriebsstellen sowie Lagerplätze im Geschäftsgebiet ermöglichen für unsere landwirtschaftlichen Kunden optimale Flexibilität in ihrer täglichen Arbeit. Die Raiffeisen-Warengenossenschaft Niedersachsen Mitte besitzt damit nicht nur eine große Bedeutung für die landwirtschaftlichen Betriebe und Kunden, sondern weitaus mehr für die integrierte und damit nachhaltige Entwicklung der Wirtschaft in der Mittelweser-Region.

NÄHE ZUM KUNDEN
Wir unterstützen die Landwirte bei der Bewältigung ihrer komplexen Anforderungen und den damit immer größer werdenden Dokumentationsaufwand mittels Einsatz modernster Technologien und Programme. Dieses Versprechen wird die Raiffeisen Mitte durch Investitionen in Mitarbeiter und Standorte auch in Zukunft erfüllen.

Name: Haldimand Hazelnuts
Description:
Welcome to Haldimand Hazelnuts, your premier source for delicious, fresh, and locally grown hazelnuts! Since our establishment in 2016, we have been dedicated to providing top-quality nuts to both individuals and wholesale customers. Here's why you should choose Haldimand Hazelnuts for your nutty needs:

Quality You Can Taste: At Haldimand Hazelnuts, we believe that quality is key. That's why we take great care in cultivating and harvesting our hazelnuts to ensure that every bite is bursting with flavor and freshness. Our commitment to quality extends to every aspect of our operations, from planting and growing to processing and packaging.

Locally Grown, Locally Loved: We are proud to be a local hazelnut farm, nestled in Cayuga, Ontario. By choosing Haldimand Hazelnuts, you're not only getting exceptional nuts but also supporting local agriculture and sustainable farming practices. Our hazelnuts are grown with care and respect for the environment, ensuring a product that is both delicious and eco-friendly.

Versatile and Nutritious: Hazelnuts are not only delicious but also packed with essential nutrients. They are a rich source of healthy fats, protein, vitamins, and minerals, making them a nutritious addition to any diet. Whether you enjoy them as a snack, in baking, or as part of your favorite recipes, our hazelnuts are sure to delight your taste buds and nourish your body.

Wide Range of Options: We offer a variety of hazelnut products to suit your needs and preferences. In-shell, raw, or roasted, we have everything you need to create culinary masterpieces or simply enjoy a healthy snack. Name: Vanille Labelle
Description:
At Vanille Labelle, we specialize in cultivating and supplying premium Madagascar vanilla around the world, celebrated for its depth of flavor and aromatic richness.  Rooted in the rich soil of Madagascar and founded in 2009 by Prislin Billet, Vanille Labelle is a story of excellence, ethics, and commitment.

We work with local communities to support over 1000 family producers in Madagascar, harnessing their ancestral knowledge to cultivate the finest vanilla beans. With a deep respect for traditional methods, we pride ourselves on using organic, sustainable farming practices upholding the highest standards of ethical sourcing and production.

Certified by Ecocert and proudly participating in the Fair For Life program, our environmentally conscious practices stand at the forefront of ethical vanilla cultivation. From the gentle hands of our farmers in Madagascar to the sophisticated laboratories in France, we've instituted rigorous quality control processes, ensuring that our vanilla pods are nothing short of perfection.

Experience the true essence of Madagascar vanilla with Vanille Labelle.

Name: ID Grain
Description:
At ID GRAIN, we are an innovative and committed SME, specialized in varietal selection, production and marketing of special crops and seeds for the agricultural and industrial markets, in France and internationally. Our expertise extends to the specific sectors of pet food (bird feed), oilseed crushing and human food. 

Sustainability, traceability, quality and economic efficiency are at the heart of our model. We master all the stages of the sector, bringing together the seed and crops professions, from varietal creation to the contractualization of production and the sale of seeds. We work in partnership with cooperatives and agricultural traders, and meet the needs of our industrial customers, in France, Europe and internationally. 

Our research station in Beauce and our experimental network in Europe allow us to develop varieties that meet agricultural and industrial requirements in terms of agronomic, technological and environmental quality.

Our goal is to shorten the link between the researcher, the producer, the distributor, the collector and the processor by developing new varieties and organizing seed production contracts that combine economic performance and environmental sustainability. 
ID GRAIN is innovation at the service of high value-added plant production.
Guided by strong values such as respect, transparency and trust, ID GRAIN builds lasting relationships with its partners, while adapting to market changes. From seeds to crops, we offer innovative and tailor-made solutions to growers, multipliers, distributors and manufacturers.

Join us to discover how we are shaping the future of high value-added plant production!

Name: VerseBox
Description:
𝗕𝗼𝗼𝘀𝘁 𝗱𝗲 𝗴𝗲𝘇𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗲𝗶𝗱 𝘃𝗮𝗻 𝗷𝗼𝘂𝘄 𝘁𝗲𝗮𝗺 𝗺𝗲𝘁 𝗩𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗲𝗕𝗼𝘅
Onze missie is om alle ongezonde snacks te verbannen van de werkvloer. Fruit zorgt ervoor dat medewerkers zich gewaardeerd voelen en verhoogt tegelijkertijd de productiviteit. Win-win dus. Dit bereiken we door fruit met extra voordelen beschikbaar te stellen voor organisaties. Daarbij geloven we in fruit met impact: elk stuk fruit moet niet alleen gezond zijn voor degene die het eet, maar ook betekenisvol bijdragen aan de maatschappij. Daarom geven we terug aan de samenleving door meerdere goede doelen te steunen. Meer over hoe wij impact maken, lees je op onze website onder het kopje ‘Fruit met impact’. In onze ogen zie je over 10 jaar alleen nog maar gezonde snacks, blije medewerkers die productiever zijn en organisaties die samen een positieve impact maken.

𝗟𝗼𝗸𝗮𝗮𝗹 𝗴𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗲𝗹𝗱. 𝗗𝘂𝘂𝗿𝘇𝗮𝗮𝗺 𝗴𝗲𝗹𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿𝗱. 𝗔𝗹𝘁𝗶𝗷𝗱 𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘀. 
Bij VerseBox draait alles om kwaliteit. Wat we leveren, sluit aan op het seizoen — zo is het fruit altijd vers, smaakvol en op z’n best. Door het jaar heen bieden we een gevarieerd aanbod van verschillende fruitsoorten aan, dat zo lang mogelijk houdbaar is. Al ons fruit wordt zorgvuldig geselecteerd op basis van een paar duidelijke criteria: vers en kwalitatief fruit, duurzaam verpakt en makkelijk te pakken tijdens het werk, uit onze unieke fruitkisten en displays. 

𝗪𝗮𝗮𝗿𝗼𝗺 𝗩𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗲𝗕𝗼𝘅 𝗵𝗲𝘁 𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗹 𝗺𝗮𝗮𝗸𝘁
 Vers fruit op het werk

Description:
CERES Agropecuaria S.A. fundada el 1 de noviembre de 1991, se encuentra ubicada en la Ciudad de 9 de Julio, Provincia de Buenos Aires, y sus acitvidades principales son:

Acopio de Cereales y Oleaginosas
Multiplicación y comercialización de Semillas Fiscalizadas
Fabricación y Comercialización de Alimentos Balanceados
La firma se encuentra asociada y participa del directorio de la Cámara de Comercio, Industria y Bienes Raíces de Nueve de Julio, así como también a la Sociedad Rural de Nueve de Julio.

Es decisión del directorio tener un activo compromiso social en la comunidad, motivo por el cual, sus directores integran diferentes movimientos de ayuda social: Comedor de barrio Los Cruza Vías, Cooperadora del Jardín 909, Cooperadora de escuelas CETP El Chajá, Fundación Los Ceibos (Colegio Los Ceibos), Consejo permanente de ayuda para niños carenciados.

CERES forma parte en la actualidad del Centro de Acopiadores de Cereales de Buenos Aires, Federación de Centros de Acopiadores de Cereales, Cámara Argentina de Empresas de Nutrición Animal, Cámara de Empresas de Semillas y Agroquímicos, Centro de Acopiadores del Centro de la Provincia de Buenos Aires, entre otras instituciones.

Mantiene sólidas relaciones con importantes firmas Exportadoras y Corredores de granos, se encuentra inscripta y habilitada en todos los Organismos Oficiales relacionados con las actividades que desarrolla.

A fin de transparentar sus operaciones, CERES cumple desde el año 1996 con la Declaración Informativa del CITI Compras y Certificación Contable Exportadores.

Y no menos importante: CERES Agropecuaria S. A. continua transitando el camino ideado por sus iniciadores, transformando a través de la industrialización las materias primas en productos.

Name: CLTV Zundert
Description:
CLTV Zundert (Coöperatieve Land- en Tuinbouwvereniging Zundert U.A.) is in 1904 opgericht met als doel de "bevordering van de land- en tuinbouw in Zundert en Rijsbergen".  

De betrokkenheid bij onze agrarische leden en het belang van het leveren van meerwaarde aan de organisaties van onze klanten staat voorop. We zijn niet alleen een toeleverancier van agrarische producten maar bieden ook teeltadvies en ondersteunende diensten als koeling van producten, afzet en transport. 

Ons werkgebied beslaat geheel West- en Midden-Brabant en de Noorderkempen (België). De activiteiten van CLTV Zundert zijn verdeeld in 4 werkgebieden:

1. CLTV Handel BV is actief als toeleverancier in de agrarische sector. Boomteelt, aardbeienteelt, vollegrondstuinbouw en veeteelt zijn de belangrijkste takken waarin CLTV Handel BV opereert. Maar ook hoveniers, overheden, bedrijven en particulieren zijn welkom voor hun benodigdheden. Onze CLTV Winkel is geopend voor zowel de professional als particuliere klant.

2. CLTV Veiling BV verzorgt de logistiek en keuring van de afzet van de groenten- en fruitproducten van de aangesloten tuinders. Met name de afzet van aardbeien, in samenwerking met Coöperatie Hoogstraten, is het specialisme van CLTV Veiling BV, maar ook alle soorten groenten kunnen via CLTV Veiling BV afgezet worden.

3. CLTV Koeling BV is actief met het koelen van aardbeienplanten en boomkwekerijproducten.

4. Transportbedrijf Erik Tax is per 2020 onderdeel van CLTV Zundert. Onze specialisatie ligt in het verzamelen, verladen en transporteren van boomkwekerijproducten. Daarnaast wordt het wagenpark ingezet voor overige producten als groenten en/of charterdiensten

CLTV Zundert kenmerkt zich door de platte organisatie en korte communicatielijnen. Klantvriendelijkheid, collegialiteit en (zeker in het groeiseizoen) dynamische werkomgeving omschrijft de sfeer van CLTV Zundert waar circa 60 medewerkers werkzaam zijn.

Name: Synergic Sustainability
Description:
At Synergic Sustainability, we believe that business success and ethical responsibility go hand in hand. 

Based in West Africa, we are a forward-thinking company committed to transforming the agricultural supply chain. From farm to global markets, we deliver premium raw agricultural products like cocoa beans, raw cashew nuts, and raw coffee beans, as well as processed by-products such as cocoa mass, cocoa butter, and cocoa powder.

Our approach is rooted in three core principles: ethical sourcing, sustainability, and community empowerment.

Why Choose Synergic Sustainability? 

1. Quality You Can Trust 

Every product we deliver meets stringent international standards, ensuring quality and consistency. 

2. Ethical and Sustainable Practices 

Our business model is designed to create a positive impact—on farmers, the environment, and society at large. 

3. Expertise and Reliability 

With deep roots in West Africa’s agricultural sector and a global outlook, we are a trusted partner for businesses seeking premium agri-commodities. 

4. Tailored Solutions 

Whether you’re a trader, manufacturer, or distributor, we work closely with you to meet your specific needs. 

Our Vision for the Future 

At Synergic Sustainability, our vision is to lead the charge in creating a world where business success is synonymous with environmental stewardship and community development. As we continue to grow, we are committed to building stronger partnerships, scaling our impact, and driving innovation in the agricultural sector. 

Together, we can redefine what’s possible in agriculture and create a legacy of sustainability, empowerment, and excellence. 

Connect with Us
Join us on this transformative journey. Follow our LinkedIn page to learn more about our work, products, and impact. Let’s build a sustainable future together.

Name: Esguerra Foods Agriventures
Description:
The world-renown Kurobuta of Japan, sought after by chefs and people with sophisticated taste for its tender, moist, juicy and flavor-rich characteristics is now locally produced in the Philippines. Kurobuta is a Japanese term which means “black pig”. But not all black pigs are considered Kurobuta. Kurobuta is designated only to pure-bred Berkshire (heritage breed of pigs originated from the UK) raised on a regimented farming method which Esguerra Farms strictly adheres to.

Nestled in Lipa, Batangas, Esguerra Farms is home of hundreds of pure-bred Berkshire pigs. These are raised in pasture in the sprawling acreage of the farm allowing them to roam freely while faraway and isolated from the pollutions of the city. The pigs enjoy fresh air and abundant sunlight emulating their natural habitat.

Name: NutriEarth Foods India Pvt Ltd
Description:
NutriEarth is devoted to producing food that is in harmony with nature & our well being
Our products encourage practices of the past with the goodness of hand pounded natural processes

Our Mission is to bring healthy food options focused on nutrition, wellness and healing
Natural farming is a method in which agricultural practices are guided by natural laws. This strategy works in tandem with the natural biodiversity of each farmed area, allowing the complexity of living species, both flora, and fauna, that create each ecosystem to thrive alongside food plants.

Natural farming is "a farming approach that imitates the way of nature." It's referred to as "do-nothing farming" or "the natural approach of farming."

Natural farming does not use chemical or organic fertilizers on the soil. In reality, no additional nutrients are put into the soil or given to the plants.

Natural farming encourages the breakdown of organic matter by microorganisms and earthworms right on the soil surface, gradually adding nutrients to the soil over time.
There is no ploughing, no soil tilting, no fertilisers, and no weeding in natural farming, precisely as it would be in natural ecosystems.

Natural agriculture is an extremely low-cost farming method that completely moulds local wildlife.

Name: Agricola Marvic
Description:
Welcome to Agricola Marvic, We are the largest Organic Vegetable Producer, in Spain, where agriculture meets innovation and sustainability. We are a leading agricultural company dedicated to nurturing the land, producing high-quality crops, and contributing to a sustainable future.

At Agricola Marvic, we blend traditional farming practices with cutting-edge technologies to optimize productivity while preserving the environment. Our commitment to sustainable agriculture drives every aspect of our operations, from seed selection to harvesting techniques. We prioritize soil health, water conservation, and biodiversity, ensuring that our practices leave a positive impact on the land for generations to come.

With a focus on innovation, we continually research and implement the latest advancements in agricultural science and technology. Our team of experts works tirelessly to develop efficient farming methods, improve crop yields, and minimize resource usage. By embracing innovation, we aim to stay at the forefront of the industry and lead the way towards a more sustainable agricultural future.

Quality is at the heart of everything we do at Agricola Marvic. From seed to shelf, we maintain strict quality control measures to ensure that only the finest produce reaches our customers. 

As a socially responsible company, we are deeply committed to supporting our local communities and promoting rural development. We prioritize fair labor practices, invest in community initiatives, and engage in partnerships that empower farmers and enhance livelihoods.

Join us on our journey to cultivate excellence in agriculture. Explore our website to learn more about our company, our products, and our commitment to sustainability. Together, we can build a brighter future for agriculture and the planet.

Name: Pineta srl
Description:
Pineta s.r.l. è una realtà agricola che nasce in agro di Cerignola nel 1997, dalla volontà di un gruppo di Imprenditori Agricoli di valorizzare i prodotti del nostro territorio.
L’agro di Cerignola (FG) è il terzo più vasto d’Italia per estensione, ed abbraccia in gran parte il tavoliere delle Puglie, zona di eccellenza per la coltivazioni di ogni specie.
L’idea dell’azienda, si concentra sin da subito nella commercializzazione e nella valorizzazione di cereali e leguminose, su tutti il GRANO DURO, vera ricchezza ed eccellenza del nostro territorio. Pineta srl preside in un bacino che abbraccia tutta la provincia di Foggia, per circa 7000 ettari di coltivazioni di cereali. Questi importanti volumi sono gestiti nel sito di stoccaggio di Borgo Tressanti – Cerignola (FG) , dove sorge un’importante struttura di ricezione, la cui capacità di stoccaggio cereali è pari a circa 22000 Tn, con diversi impianti di scarico, che permettono di differenziare i prodotti in ingresso secondo le caratteristiche qualitative, e fornire ad i migliori Molini e Pastifici Nazionali, l’eccellenza della nostra materia prima a seconda delle loro esigenze di lavorazione.
Da anni, siamo partner con progetti di filiera per lo sviluppo del grano duro 100% ITALIANO con i più grandi brand del settore; 
i Molini più importanti del territorio, su tutti il Gruppo Casillo,  Molino Grassi, e Moderne Semolerie Italiane, 
i Pastifici più importanti del territorio, su tutti : De Matteis Agroalimentare, Divella, La Molisana, De Cecco , Garofalo , Pasta Sgambaro,
Circa il 10% dei nostri clienti, ha intrapreso la conversione in Biologico, che ci assicura importanti quantitativi di merci Bio (circa il 15%) da collocare sul mercato;










E’ stato possibile raggiungere questi importanti risultati, e continuare di anno in anno un trend in constante crescita, grazie ad un’attenzione  verso l’agricoltura e l’agricoltore a 360°
