Name: nxtfood
Description:
NXTFOOD.IN is on a mission to transform Bihar’s agricultural landscape by building a direct bridge between farmers and buyers. We are not limited to a single product like makhana  our vision is to create a reliable marketplace and supply chain for all raw materials grown in Bihar, including fox nuts, moringa, flax seeds, pulses, spices, and region-specific superfoods.

Our core belief is simple: Bihar produces exceptional crops, but farmers often lose value to middlemen and fragmented supply chains. At NXTFOOD.IN, we ensure fair prices for farmers while delivering high-quality, traceable raw materials to food manufacturers, exporters, wholesalers, and retailers across India and beyond.

What We Do :

We work at both ends of the chain with farmers on the ground and buyers across markets. Our services include:
Sourcing and aggregation of raw materials directly from farmer clusters.
Quality checks and traceability systems for predictable supply.
Primary processing, packaging, and B2B-ready consignments.
Logistics coordination and documentation support for smooth movement.
This end-to-end approach makes procurement seamless for buyers and profitable for farmers.

Why It Matters :

Bihar is uniquely positioned to be a hub for high-value crops, yet many farmers face distress sales and inconsistent demand. By creating transparent pricing, faster payments, and local collection centers, NXTFOOD.IN strengthens farmer incomes. At the same time, buyers benefit from consolidated supply, assured quality, and timely deliveries  reducing risk and procurement headaches.

Líneas de negocios:

Industrial.- 
Nos dedicamos a la importación y comercialización de materias primas químicas para las industrias: Textil, Curtiembre, Metalúrgica, Minería, Tratamiento de Aguas, Pinturas, Solventes,  Papel, Petróleo, Construcción, entre otras. 

Acuícola.- 
La División Salud Animal (DSA) es una línea de la compañía CHEM-TECH S.A. dedicada a la investigación, desarrollo, producción y mercadeo de aditivos y alimentos NO CONTAMINANTES para especies acuícolas en general. 

Nuestra tecnología asegura una gran calidad de aditivos PROBIOTICOS, ANTIBACTERIANOS, ACIDIFICANTES, ANTIPARASITARIOS, PROMOTORES DE CRECIMIENTO Y EN EL CONTROL DE ENFERMEDADES (EVENTOS) para que el medio ambiente esté resguardado sin que se contamine. 

Somos representantes exclusivos para el Ecuador de las reconocidas marcas Alemanas: DOSTOFARM GmbH – LEIBER GmbH.

Agrícola.- 
Contamos con una amplia gama de Plaguicidas, Herbicidas, Insecticidas, Fertilizantes, Bioestimuladores y demás productos para la enmienda de suelos. 
Cada producto desarrollado ha sido creado según las necesidades de los agricultores. Se investigan causas y se proponen soluciones que garantizan la eficiencia económica y el manejo amigable al ambiente.

Por eso nuestro lema ‘’COSECHAMOS JUNTOS”

Name: Power Legends B.V.
Description:
Power Legends is known for selling and restoring the most iconic tractors between 20 and 35 years old. We started as a young company specializing in legendary John Deere models, but quickly saw growing demand for iconic machines from other brands and as true enthusiasts, we embraced that expansion.
We believe the community of young‑timer fans is growing fast, driven by people who once worked with these tractors in their youth. For them, we bring back the ultimate nostalgic feeling of the past fully restored, authentic, and better than ever. 
The result is a unique collection of the most sought‑after models under one roof machines that are not only iconic, but also proven long‑term investments whose value continues to grow.

Our collection isn’t just made up of investment‑worthy classics. These machines are true crowd‑pullers. Online, we’re known for our unique models, demonstrations, and striking videos that reach a large and engaged community.
Companies use our iconic tractors and videos for marketing, events, and campaigns. Why? Because they instantly attract attention, spark emotion, and tell a story that sticks. With these machines, we create content and activations that make brands stand out and genuinely connect with their audience.
We offer collaborations for brands looking to leverage the power, nostalgia, and visibility of these legendary machines.

Name: Veljekset Kitola Oy
Description:
Meistä

Veljekset Kitola Oy on vuonna 2007 perustettu suomalainen perheyritys, joka toimii tuoretuotteiden pakkauksen ja tukkukaupan parissa. Palvelemme vähittäiskauppaa, HoReCa-sektoria ja elintarvikeketjua laajalla HeVi-valikoimalla sekä vahvalla käytännön osaamisella.

Tuotevalikoimamme kattaa laajasti juurekset, vihannekset ja hedelmät sekä muut tuoretuotteet. Toimimme tiiviissä yhteistyössä viljelijöiden ja toimittajien kanssa ja hallitsemme laajoja kokonaisuuksia aina hankinnasta pakkaukseen ja toimituksiin.

Kitolan vahvuuksia ovat korkea ja tasainen laatu, toimitusvarmuus sekä lyhyt ja läpinäkyvä ketju pellolta asiakkaalle. Pitkä kokemus elintarvikealalta näkyy tavassa toimia: asiat tehdään järjestelmällisesti, yhteistyö on sujuvaa ja lupaukset pidetään myös muuttuvissa tilanteissa.

Kitola on luotettava kumppani, kun tarvitaan osaamista, mittakaavaa ja toimivaa arkea elintarvikeketjussa.


 About us

Veljekset Kitola Oy is a Finnish family-owned company founded in 2007, operating in fresh produce packing and wholesale. We serve retail, HoReCa and food industry customers with a broad fresh produce offering and strong hands-on expertise.

Our product range spans a wide selection of root vegetables, fresh vegetables, fruit and other fresh products. We work closely with growers and suppliers and manage end-to-end processes from sourcing and packing to reliable deliveries.

Kitola’s strengths lie in consistent quality, dependable supply and a short, transparent chain from field to customer. Long-standing experience in the food sector is reflected in structured operations, smooth cooperation and the ability to deliver on commitments even in changing conditions.

Kitola is a trusted partner when scale, competence and operational reliability matter.

La autogestion y el empoderamiento de los y las trabajadoras. Recuperar el cooperativismo como herramienta organizativa que nos pone a discutir la renta que genera la distribución de alimentos. La lectura del territorio argentino como una geografía que tiene que generar acceso al bienestar del pueblo (alimentos, salud, educación, dispersion) a la vez que protege y salvaguarda su identidad cultural y biológica Para lograr todo esto es necesario construir experiencias en la cadena productiva que reformulen las reglas del juego desde una lógica no mercantilista, al contrario en función del bienestar integral. Name: Liubcom International SRL
Description:
**Liubcom International SRL – Natürliche Rohstoffe in höchster Qualität**  

Liubcom International SRL ist ein führender Anbieter von biologischen und konventionellen Heil- und Aromapflanzen aus der Republik Moldau. Seit 2018 haben wir uns auf den Anbau, die Wildsammlung sowie das Trocknen von hochwertigen Pflanzen, Blumen und Früchten spezialisiert. Unsere Produkte – darunter Lindenblüten, Kamille, Johanniskraut, Hagebutten und viele weitere Kräuter – finden weltweit Anwendung in der Lebensmittel-, Tee-, Pharma- und Kosmetikindustrie.  

Mit höchster Sorgfalt geerntet und verarbeitet, bewahren unsere Kräuter ihre natürlichen Wirkstoffe und Aromen. Nachhaltigkeit und Qualität stehen für uns an erster Stelle – deshalb sind wir bio-zertifiziert durch **Kiwa BCS Öko-Garantie GmbH (MD-BIO-141)** und erfüllen höchste internationale Standards.  

Durch unsere enge Zusammenarbeit mit Landwirten und Sammlern vor Ort garantieren wir eine transparente und nachhaltige Wertschöpfungskette. Ob in der EU, Russland oder weltweit – Liubcom International SRL steht für natürliche Qualität, auf die Sie sich verlassen können.  

 **Unsere Stärken:**  
 Bio- und konventionelle Kräuter von höchster Qualität  
 Nachhaltige und umweltfreundliche Produktion  
 Sorgfältige Trocknung und Verarbeitung  
 Internationale Zertifizierungen und Standards  
 Zuverlässige Exportpartnerschaften  

Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam die Kraft der Natur nutzen!  **Kontaktieren Sie uns für maßgeschneiderte Lösungen.**

Description:
Ramniklal Bhavanji Trading Co Pvt Ltd is a long-established trading house anchored in the cattle feed supply chain of India.

For over five decades, we have served as a high-volume sourcing partner for manufacturers, primary processors, and regional aggregators. We bridge the gap between origin and consumption, providing predictable off-take and market liquidity to our supplier network.

Our business is built on discipline, not opportunism. We work with a select group of partners who value clarity over noise, focusing on three core pillars:

- Consistent Execution: We provide steady demand for by-products (Chunni, Pellets, Cakes) across market cycles, helping manufacturers manage inventory efficiently.

- Clear Terms: We believe that clarity upfront prevents friction later. Our relationships are defined by transparent contracts and dependable settlement.

- Trade Integrity: We honor every booking we make, regardless of market volatility. We believe that standing by a contract is more important than short-term margin.

We value relationships that compound over time. Our network is built for decades, not just for the season.

Name: Marstall AG
Description:
Marstall, ein bekannter Name, wenn es um die Ernährung Ihrer Pferde geht. Wir beraten Sie vom rekonvaleszenten Pferd bis zu den Pferden, die eine maximale Leistung erbringen müssen! Eine artgerechte Beratung für jedes Bedürfnis steht im Mittelpunkt unserer Bemühungen, denn das Wohlbefinden Ihres Pferdes ist uns wichtig.

Unsere Auswahl an Futtermitteln wird ständig an die neuesten Erkenntnisse angepasst und bewährte Methoden werden beibehalten. So können wir alle Bedürfnisse abdecken, ob getreidefrei, haferfrei, mit oder ohne Zusatz von Aminosäuren, Vitaminen und vielem mehr.

Wir bieten nicht nur Pferdefutter an, sondern auch ein breites Sortiment an Ergänzungsfuttermitteln, Pflegeprodukten, Raufutter-/Heuersatzprodukten und ausgewählten Einstreuprodukten.

Ihr Vorteil: Alles aus einer Hand, vom Versand eines einzigen Pakets bis zum ganzen Lastenzug. Wir beliefern die ganze Schweiz und das Fürstentum Liechtenstein.

Name: Rochester Microgreens
Description:
Our Premier Urban Farm supplies year-round toxin and contaminant free microgreens (and more) through a complete 100% organic and renewable growing process, from seed to packaging.

Vertical hydroponic gardens like Rochester Microgreens grow 50% more produce indoors, than the same amount of space could horizontally on the ground, and with a fraction of the water consumption.

Our produce taste better, and is better for you! Even the smallest amounts of microgreens are packed with vitamins and minerals, making them ideal for a variety of meal plans and nutritional therapy.
 
We believe indoor farming offers a new innovative way to acquire high quality local produce. We’re apart of the coalition of urban farmers dedicated to revolutionizing the way we grow and distribute produce in urban communities.

Rochester Microgreens currently operates inside a home-based farm in one of Rochester NY’s historic districts. We’re currently exploring expansion into a larger location, with a dream of having an entirely solar powered operation. Thanks for being with us!

Name: ANISOL
Description:
ANISOL, une entreprise de négoce agricole fondée en 2013 par Sophie Hauguel et David à Gonneville-la-Mallet.
Se consacre à la promotion d'une agriculture respectueuse de l'environnement et à la réduction des intrants. 
En tant que société à taille humaine, ANISOL offre une expertise et des conseils en agronomie, notamment en fertilisants, semences et élaboration de produits, avec un suivi personnalisé. 
Notre objectif est de diminuer l'utilisation des intrants pour obtenir des résultats optimaux, tout en préservant l'équilibre écologique. 
De plus, ANISOL se spécialise dans l'élaboration de rations animales équilibrées, contribuant ainsi à une alimentation saine et durable pour les animaux. 
Nous menons également des recherches approfondies sur l'eau et sa qualité pour une pulvérisation responsable sur le sol, afin de minimiser les impacts environnementaux. 
Avec des valeurs fortes axées sur l'environnement, la durabilité et l'efficacité, ANISOL s'engage à fournir des solutions complètes et innovantes à ses clients. 
ANISOL travaille en étroite collaboration avec nos partenaires de l'industrie agricole pour offrir des solutions sur mesure, adaptées aux besoins spécifiques de chaque exploitation. 
Nous sommes fiers de notre contribution à une agriculture plus respectueuse de l'environnement et nous continuons à développer de nouvelles technologies et approches pour soutenir une agriculture durable et prospère.

Name: Fire Ring Farm
Description:
Fire Ring Farm is dedicated to growing tasty and nutritious produce using bio-dynamic and sustainable methods of farming. We do not use synthetic fertilizers, herbicides, or pesticides. Our farming methods do not deplete our natural resources of land and water. Additionally, we rotate our crops, plant cover crops, apply organic compost, introduce beneficial insects, use mechanical and hand cultivation for weed control, utilize proper irrigation methods, consistently care for our soil, and grow seasonally!

Here at our community-supported farm, we support local food along with healthy eating and food access to everyone. People pick up a share of our crops once a week, and we also give away food. Additionally, our organization offers educational programs for nature connections and teaches people about food and how to grow their own.

Established in 2009, Fire Ring Farm is a community-supported farm in Portland, CT, recognized by the Northeast Organic Farming Association (NOFA). It sits on roughly 4 acres of land overlooking the Connecticut River and is surrounded by the Palmer Taylor Preserve managed by the Middlesex Land Trust. Both Fire Ring Farm and Palmer Taylor Preserve are on the original land of the Wangunk and Quinnipiac first people.

At Fire Ring Farm, we believe that food and plants are medicine and water and soil are life. This is why we strive to be an inclusive, environmentally focused, and socially just organic farm. We bring together people from the community to help them create a connection to where their food comes from. Our organization welcomes individuals from all walks of life and helps them get connected to the soil. We do this because we believe that we need to act locally and think globally.

L’accurata conoscenza del territorio, della produzione ortofrutticola e la passione per il mercato, ha fatto si che negli anni ’70 si sviluppasse in Verona una realtà che sapesse di Sicilia, cresciuta con l’umiltà e l’amore del proprio lavoro.

Oggi Leonardi si è sviluppata mantenendo stretto il rapporto con le produzioni locali, tipiche di ciascuna regione italiana, offrendo ai clienti prodotti ortofrutticoli freschi che conservano la storia e garantiscano sicurezza e qualità.

Name: BROCCAGRI
Description:
BROCCAGRI | Cultivons la qualité, récoltons la santé

Bienvenue sur la page officielle de BROCCAGRI ! Située dans la région du Grand Casablanca au Maroc, BROCCAGRI est une entreprise pionnière spécialisée dans la culture de légumes de haute qualité. Nous nous engageons à fournir des produits frais et nutritifs qui répondent aux normes les plus strictes de l'agriculture durable.

Notre Mission
Chez BROCCAGRI, notre mission est de promouvoir une alimentation saine en cultivant des légumes riches en nutriments. Nous nous concentrons sur trois légumes principaux : le brocoli, la pomme de terre et le chou vert. Notre engagement envers l'excellence agricole nous permet de garantir des produits frais, savoureux et bénéfiques pour la santé.

Nos Valeurs

Qualité : Nous mettons un point d'honneur à produire des légumes qui respectent les plus hauts standards de qualité.
Durabilité : Nous adoptons des pratiques agricoles respectueuses de l'environnement pour assurer la pérennité de nos ressources naturelles.
Innovation : Nous utilisons des techniques agricoles modernes et innovantes pour améliorer constamment nos méthodes de culture.
Engagement : Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec nos partenaires locaux et internationaux pour fournir les meilleurs produits à nos clients.
Nos Produits

Brocoli : Cultivé avec soin, riche en vitamines et minéraux.
Pommes de terre : De différentes variétés, parfaites pour toutes vos recettes.
Chou vert : Frais et croquant, idéal pour une alimentation équilibrée.
Pourquoi Nous Choisir ?
En choisissant BROCCAGRI, vous optez pour des légumes de haute qualité, cultivés de manière responsable. Notre équipe dévouée s'assure que chaque produit qui quitte nos champs est à la hauteur de vos attentes.

Name: Agrivénus International Inc.
Description:
Once upon a time, in the heart of the vast fertile fields of the world, there existed a company dedicated to agricultural growth, quality, and prosperity. This company is Agrivénus International Inc. Guided by an unwavering passion for agriculture and a commitment to excellence, Agrivénus has emerged as a leading player in the import-export of agricultural commodities.

Over the years, Agrivénus International Inc has forged strong bonds with dedicated farmers and exceptional producers across the globe. It is within these partnerships that the magic of the land comes to life, where fields of canola, pepper, soybeans, oats, sesame seeds, rapeseeds, wheat, vanilla, and transformed cashew nuts flourish with care and expertise.

Agrivénus International Inc. stands out as a top-tier supplier, placing a particular emphasis on the impeccable quality of its agricultural products. Every grain, every spice, every nut is carefully selected to meet the highest standards, thus providing an outstanding taste experience to its customers worldwide.

But Agrivénus International Inc's story does not end there. Beyond its commitment to agricultural commodities, the company broadens its horizon by also offering a range of cutting-edge agricultural machines. These quality equipment contribute to optimizing agricultural processes, ensuring increased productivity and uncompromising efficiency.

Agrivénus International Inc embodies the vision of a world where the land is respected, farmers are supported, and quality is at the heart of every harvest. Whether through the supply of superior-quality raw materials or through innovation in the field of agricultural machinery, Agrivénus remains determined to cultivate a flourishing future for global agriculture. Join us on this adventure where soil, passion, and expertise come together to create a fertile and prosperous world.

» The Institute is an interdisciplinary research center that works for agriculture, environment protection, construction, transport, food and pharmaceutical industries, and medicine.

We offer for sale high-quality elite and qualified sowing seeds of industrial hemp varieties Białobrzeskie, Tygra, Henola, and Rajan.

We offer four varieties – Białobrzeskie, Tygra , Henola and Rajan.  All four varieties were bred at the Institute of Natural Fibres and Medicinal Plants.

We offer technologies, know-how, and patented solutions developed at the Institute of Natural Fibres and Medicinal Plants for the hemp processing and use of hemp fiber. These solutions are available at various levels of technological development and readiness for implementation.

Origine France :

Fidèles à notre savoir-faire, nous défendons et préservons notre terre de tradition.

Environnement :

Respect des bonnes pratiques, économies d’énergie, nous avons pour ambition de limiter les impacts de notre activité sur l’environnement : une éthique partagée par nos équipes au quotidien.

Fondée sur des indicateurs de résultats relatifs à la biodiversité, la stratégie phytosanitaire, la gestion de la fertilisation et de l’irrigation, l’exploitation est en cours de certification HVE3 « Haute valeur environnementale » niveau 3.

Welcome to Amaizim Faming, a visionary leader in sustainable agriculture in Zimbabwe, specializing in the cultivation of turmeric, the revered "golden spice." Our journey transcends mere agricultural practice; we're nurturing opportunities, fostering growth, and crafting a healthier future. 

Turmeric, with its rich history and myriad health benefits, stands at the heart of our agricultural endeavors. Revered as a healing herb in ancient cultures and now embraced globally as a superfood, turmeric's journey is as colorful as the spice itself. 

Our approach to farming combines time-honored traditions with modern innovation. We employ sustainable farming practices that respect the environment while yielding high-quality produce. We continuously explore new technologies and practices to enhance efficiency and sustainability, ensuring that our turmeric is not only of the highest quality but also produced responsibly

Our presence in the global turmeric market is a testament to our strategic approach and dedication to excellence. We understand the dynamics of the market and position ourselves to meet the evolving needs of our customers. Our export strategy focuses on reaching key markets where the demand for high-quality turmeric is growing. We pay close attention to customer demographics and preferences, tailoring our offerings to meet their needs. Our market analysis and strategic planning ensure that we remain competitive and continue to expand our reach.
Looking to the future, Amaizim Farming is poised for growth and innovation. Our vision is to expand our operations, explore new markets, and continue to lead in sustainable agriculture. We are committed to staying at the forefront of the industry, setting new standards in quality and sustainability. 

Join us in our journey to unlock the full potential of turmeric.

Name: Kolagri
Description:
Proponiamo piani di coltivazione valutando tessitura e composizione del terreno e/o letto di semina/piantumazione di un vegetale, scelta varietale, sesti e densità di impianto. Creiamo ad hoc piani di interventi fitoiatrici con metodologie convenzionali e/o di lotta biologica e integrata per il controllo degli attacchi parassitari. 

Realizziamo piani di concimazione andando a definire, tra la gamma disponibile sul mercato, quale tipologia è opportuna (chimici, minerali, organici, organico-minerali, correttivi, specialistici, ammendanti), la forma ideale (liquidi, idrosolubili, granulari), le epoche di utilizzo (pre/post-raccolta, autunnale, primaverile e estiva) e il meccanismo d’azione (radicali o fogliari). Consigliamo sulle attrezzature necessarie alla lavorazione del terreno e delle colture, nonché sulla realizzazione di impianti di forzatura (serre, tunnel) e su ausili come film plastici per coperture orticole.

Siamo accreditati dal Servizio fitosanitario della Regione Veneto per la commercializzazione del materiale di propagazione. Ne gestiamo la crioconservazione al fine di preservarne la vitalità e lo accompagniamo con documentazione che ne attesta la garanzia sia fitosanitaria che genetica. Ci rivolgiamo a vivaisti con i quali abbiamo instaurato collaborazioni consolidate nel tempo, attenti a rispettare scrupolosamente standard qualitativi imposti dalle leggi comunitarie e nazionali.

Per i concimi valutiamo attentamente l’efficacia nutrizionale, privilegiando prodotti che abbinano tecnologie differenti di rilascio dei principi nutritivi. Nella scelta consideriamo il loro impatto ambientale, la loro lisciviazione ed eventuale dispersione nelle falde acquifere. Privilegiamo concimi di origine naturale e siamo attenti alle proposte innovative che si affacciano sul mercato.

Description:
Bagur, es un socio estratégico en el comercio internacional y nacional de materias primas. Con una amplia experiencia en importación y exportación, contamos con una red de proveedores de confianza a nivel global.

Nos especializamos en el trading físico de commodities, con un enfoque principal en el sector bioenergético, pero también proveemos una amplia variedad de materias primas de sector agroalimentario.

En Bagur, trabajamos cada día con el compromiso de proporcionar un servicio profesional, eficiente y confiable, buscando siempre el éxito y el crecimiento conjunto con nuestros socios estratégicos.

Nos posicionamos como un aliado clave tanto para las empresas que buscan adquirir materia prima de alta calidad como para los productores que desean expandir su alcance comercial. Nuestra filosofía se basa en simplificar los procesos de compra y venta, siempre con un enfoque a largo plazo, construyendo relaciones comerciales sólidas y duraderas.

Colaboramos estrechamente con otros brokers y traders, lo que nos permite ofrecer soluciones personalizadas que se ajustan a las necesidades específicas de nuestros clientes y proveedores. Además, estamos presentes en otros sectores a través de nuestras empresas asociadas, lo que nos permite diversificar nuestras oportunidades de negocio.

Au-delà du commerce, nous sommes résolus à favoriser une croissance équitable et durable dans toutes nos régions d'opérations. Pour ce faire, nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec nos partenaires locaux pour soutenir les agriculteurs, favoriser les pratiques agricoles durables et stimuler le développement économique local.
Suivez-nous pour rester informés de nos activités, de nos engagements et de nos initiatives en matière de durabilité. Ensemble, nous cultivons un avenir plus vert et plus juste pour tous.

We set out to bring unadulterated, pure, and locally sourced produce straight to your doorstep so you can spend less time searching for quality ingredients and more time enjoying wholesome meals with the people you love.

We go beyond being just an organic grocery provider. At EATORGANIX, our mission is to champion food justice, protect nutritional integrity, drive climate action, and promote food literacy across Pakistan. Every product we offer is carefully sourced to ensure purity, sustainability, and respect for both people and the planet.

By partnering with communities, farmers, and nonprofits, we aim to create a positive social impact, supporting undernourished communities, reducing our carbon footprint, and encouraging conscious food choices.

With our online store, stocking up on monthly groceries is not only simple, convenient, and reliable, it is also a step toward a healthier, fairer, and more sustainable food future for all.

Our journey is about more than food. It is about making healthier choices effortless for your family while making a difference in the world we share.

With roots in both Asia and Europe, we have a true passion and deep understanding for both market dynamics, resulting in a unique blend offering the highest quality products, at a good price, while offering peace of mind and security in adhering to all current international standards, like sustainability and legislation.

Immer Inc has ISCC and INS Sustainability certificate and is a member of MVO, Netherlands. 

We aim to be your trusted partner that masters the complete supply chain.

Name: Abundish
Description:
Abundish is a transformative digital platform in Nigeria that connects farmers directly with consumers, aiming to make fresh agricultural produce accessible, affordable, and convenient. Founded by Adetunji Adegboyega, the platform addresses the inefficiencies in Nigeria's traditional food distribution system, which is often plagued by middlemen, inflated prices, and post-harvest losses.

By eliminating intermediaries, Abundish empowers farmers to sell their produce directly to consumers, ensuring better profit margins and reduced waste. The platform operates on a just-in-time inventory system, delivering produce at peak freshness and offering competitive prices lower than traditional markets. Additionally, Abundish provides farmers with access to market data, training, and resources to optimize their operations.

Abundish also focuses on food security, providing fresh, high-quality produce to all Nigerians, including low-income households through various community initiatives. The platform leverages technology, including real-time inventory tracking, data analytics, and a decentralized delivery network, to streamline the supply chain and enhance the overall shopping experience.

Despite challenges like scaling in rural areas and ensuring sustainability as it grows, Abundish is committed to continuous innovation and expansion. The company has plans to broaden its product range, introduce new services like subscription boxes and meal kits, and explore opportunities to expand its model to other African countries.

Abundish is not just a marketplace; it's a catalyst for change in Nigeria's agricultural sector, fostering economic empowerment, rural development, and a more sustainable future. By directly connecting farmers with consumers, AbunDish is revolutionizing food accessibility and contributing to a brighter future for Nigeria.

Il calendario agronomico prevede la disponibilità di prodotti durante tutti i mesi dell’anno: da gennaio a dicembre, produciamo e forniamo kiwi, albicocche e prugne in base alla stagione. We explore the four corners of the globe to bring you the world’s finest and most interesting selection of the rarest, most uncommon and dankest cannabis religious souvenir genetics preservation specimens & Farm Bill-compliant organic non-GMO terpy hemp seed strains (aka cultivars/ chemovars/ heirloom varieties) available ~

We focus on old-school favorites, stable reliable genetics (including inbred lines aka IBLs) by solid breeders who know their stuff, unique & novel cannabinoid and flavor/terpene/ terpenoid profiles (including high- CBD and high-CBG low-THC state-certified reliably-tests-under-limit organically-grown hempseed), industrial (fiber/ grain/ oilseed/ manufacturing-input) hemp strains, autoflowering and feminized seeds, beginner-friendly strains, regeneratively-bred seeds, and landraces aka local ecotypes.

Our mission here at Motor City Seeds is to supply & support a sustainable ecologically-optimized cannabis hemp industry with genetics, gear and resources that promote biodiversity & resilience, locally-adapted cultivars/ecotypes, the conservation of germplasm & genetic material, healthy soils, and cultivation practices that integrate & harmonize with the surrounding ecosystem and landscape.

Name: DPSFLow
Description:
DPSFlow is an innovative tool for decentralized production, empowering rural communities in the Global South (Africa, Asia, Latin America). It enables physical goods production by breaking tasks into smaller units, creating income opportunities for individuals with limited market access and fostering economic inclusion.

Designed for small businesses seeking cost-effective production and for marginalized groups in rural areas, DPSFlow reduces logistical costs by eliminating travel needs. It empowers women, youth, and underserved populations to work from home, overcoming barriers like limited infrastructure.

Unlike gig platforms focused on digital work, DPSFlow uniquely targets physical goods production, tailored for regions with minimal internet and resources. Its inclusivity bridges gaps for those previously excluded from economic participation.

DPSFlow addresses extreme poverty by creating income streams. In Nigeria, over 10M children miss school due to financial constraints (UNICEF). The platform enables families to earn and improve living standards, including education access. With 691M people living in extreme poverty globally (World Bank, 2023), DPSFlow offers a pathway to financial stability and empowerment.

By facilitating home-based work, it reduces challenges like lack of infrastructure and combats employment exclusion, particularly for women in the Global South. This promotes gender equality and inclusive economic growth.

Key Benefits

Increased Incomes: Creates jobs in rural areas, supporting families.
Lower Unemployment: Opens job markets to remote communities.
Equal Opportunities: Offers work access regardless of location, breaking the cycle of poverty.
DPSFlow drives inclusive development, empowering communities and innovatively addressing barriers to employment and resources.

Description:
GPPW Group (Generate peace and pleasure in the world) is a Swiss holding company founded in 2006 by Dr. Mohammad Hosseini from the agricultural industry. The company created the brand CELWAS to produce healthy, high-quality products, harvest more products, and increase the quality of agricultural products used in other food industries. Furthermore, GPPW GROUP uses natural, organic, and high-quality agricultural products to produce cosmetic, hygienic, and pharmaceutical products under the BERONAL name using natural, organic, and healthy products.
GPPW Academy offers training in all of these industries and other management areas essential for growth and advancement.
GPPW GROUP has the biggest and best production network system and is available to anyone anywhere in the world to order and produce goods from any GPPW brand.
The company also has the best and most extensive distribution network that allows professionals to earn money from anywhere globally without being employed by the company or investing in any of the brands.

Our goal :
We strive to update our world with different goods, new and efficient products to meet the needs of all society members and create a happy and healthy world.

Our vision :
We want to be active in all parts of the world and create value for all people.

L’azienda agricola si occupa della produzione e vendita di agrumi e tanti altri prodotti tipici siciliani coltivati con cura e maestria.

Name: N'AAM
Description:
Nous sommes spécialisés dans la production et la transformation du beurre de karité, nous aidons les femmes productrice de  beurre de karité à prospérer. 
Dans cette préfecture du nord-togo , le fief du karité, l'extraction du beurre de karité est l'activité principale des femmes.
Notre choc fut de constater que lorsque nos mères de cette préfecture produisent leur beurre, elle n'ont pas suffisamment de clients à qui le revendre. Elles se retrouvent donc obligées à vendre plutôt les noix de karité(plus facile à écouler et moins rentable),aux étrangers.
Nous nous sommes engagés à y remédier. Dans ce monde où, les produits cosmétiques naturels sont en vogue, où le beurre de karité est de plus en plus utilisé dans le domaine du cosmétique et de la chocolaterie , nous avons donc décidé de réunir ces femmes vaillantes en coopérative afin de produire massivement le beurre de karité destiné à la consommation locale et à l'exportation.
Une partie de notre beurre est vendu aux sociétés cosmétiques et l'autre partie est transformée en produits cosmétiques naturels (savons, huiles de massages,crèmes corporelles...)

Acheter nos produits ou notre beurre de karité, c'est contribuer au développement économique et social de ces braves femmes de la savane.

Name: Woodland Worm Co.
Description:
Founded in 2022 by the Kline Family.  This small town farm is dedicated to the growth of healthy worms and their production of high quality Earth Worm Castings.

In the spring of 2022 Jon Kline stumbled upon the topic of earthworms.  He instantly became hooked to the little wigglers.  So he purchased a book and started diving deep into largely unknown benefits that earthworms provide the earth.  

The farm was started in the summer and worm production began.  The Earthworms are fed with aged horse manure and used hay that is the waste from the horses on the farm.  

The end goal of Wiggle Worm Farms is to create a self sustaining, full cycle environment where the soil, plants, and animals all benefit from the little worms found beneith the suface.

Name: Guerreiro Agro
Description:
Na Guerreiro Agro, nossa missão transcende a simples oferta de insumos agrícolas; nós nos dedicamos a proteger as colheitas dos agricultores com soluções inovadoras e eficientes, assegurando a prosperidade das plantações e fortalecendo a segurança alimentar global. Como verdadeiros guerreiros do agronegócio, empregamos destreza e inteligência para combater pragas e doenças, promovendo um crescimento saudável e sustentável que ressoa em cada hectare cultivado.

Visamos ser a primeira escolha dos agricultores, liderando o caminho para uma agricultura mais produtiva e ecologicamente responsável. Em cada semente plantada, vemos uma promessa de proteção e cuidado, garantindo que cada planta floresça sob a vigilância de um guerreiro dedicado.

Nossos valores fundamentais — Integridade, Inovação, Sustentabilidade, Excelência e Comprometimento — são o solo fértil no qual cultivamos confiança e construímos parcerias duradouras. Agimos com honestidade e transparência, buscando continuamente soluções criativas para os desafios da agricultura moderna. Nosso compromisso com a sustentabilidade reflete o respeito profundo que temos pelo meio ambiente, enquanto nossa dedicação à excelência nos impulsiona a superar as expectativas dos nossos clientes a cada passo.

Na Guerreiro Agro, estamos comprometidos não apenas com o sucesso dos agricultores, mas também com a segurança alimentar da sociedade como um todo. Protegemos as colheitas com vigor e determinação, pavimentando o caminho para um futuro onde a prosperidade e a sustentabilidade caminham lado a lado.

Name: Ets Monseu s.a.
Description: Monseu s.a. est une société fournissant des produits agricoles, les différents investissements réalisés permettent à Monseu s.a. d'être producteur d’une majorité de sa gamme de produits. Monseu s.a. produit des engrais type bulk, des semences de céréales et fourragère, des minéraux et seaux à lécher à destination des animaux. En 2003, Monseu s.a. devient propriétaire du site de Rochefort qui va lui permettre de stocker engrais et céréales. Ce site va également permettre de produire les mélanges d'engrais. En 2018, le site de Lavaux Sainte Anne est modifié afin de pouvoir produire des minéraux en semoules et des seaux à lécher. L’installation permet de faire des produits à façon suivant la demande des clients. En 2018 et 2021, le site de Rochefort est modernisé pour sécher et trier des céréales. En 2022, une nouvelle ligne d’ensachage automatique haut débit est installée à Rochefort pour les engrais et semences. Monseu s.a. est toujours à la recherche de produits innovants tel que ses engrais avec micro-organismes, ses semences fourragères avec micro-organismes et ses formulations spécifiques en minéraux.

Name: Millennium srl
Description:
Millennium s.r.l. è una società commissionaria ed è leader nella produzione e lavorazione ortofrutticola del centro Italia, principalmente nel sud pontino.

Qualità e stagionalità sono i punti chiave della produzione, grazie al controllo costante della filiera produttiva, affiancando le aziende agricole operanti sul territorio nel processo di produzione, raccolta e selezione, eseguito nei periodi di giusta maturazione e nel rispetto della stagionalità. 

Vista la forte crescita avvenuta negli ultimi 10 anni l'azienda è costantemente alla ricerca di nuovi fornitori locali e nel resto d'Italia per alzare ulteriormente il livello qualitativo dei prodotti e poter aumentare i clienti fidelizzati.

Ad oggi è' alla 3° generazione con l'obiettivo di commercializzare prodotti
italiani di qualità sui mercati internazionali e investendo nell'apertura di nuovi canali distributivi con la finalità di creare maggiori posti di lavoro, attirando giovani talenti dando loro la possibilità di creare le loro fortune in provincia.

Millennium negli anni si è allargata fino a creare nel 2016 la cooperativa di agricoltori Soc.Coop.Agripppe, con la finalità di servire direttamente la grande distribuzione organizzata (GDO), rifornendo parte delle catene più importanti d'italia e d'Europa.

Name: Assodaunia
Description:
Nata nel 1988 a Foggia, Assodaunia è una Società Cooperativa agricola composta da 44 Soci rappresentata sia da cooperative che da coltivatori singoli di Puglia e Basilicata. Le principali produzioni sono rappresentate dal pomodoro da industria e da ortaggi da consumo fresco in base alla stagionalità. 

Questa tipologia di offerta risponde alle esigenze sempre più variegate del mercato nazionale e internazionale. Infatti, la nostra azienda è ormai da anni presente anche sul mercato estero, con una vocazione per l'export dei prodotti Made In Italy.

Mediante l’utilizzo di diverse tecnologie per la lavorazione e la commercializzazione di prodotti ortofrutticoli freschi, ci occupiamo di tutte le fasi, dalla produzione, al confezionamento, fino al mantenimento dei prodotti nelle celle frigo. 

Affinché ogni prodotto venga controllato in ogni fase, ci avvaliamo di un sistema di identificazione e tracciabilità che parte dalla codifica dal campo del  produttore sino alla consegna del prodotto finito.

Il rispetto dell’ambiente è un tema fondamentale, per questo motivo nel 1992 abbiamo sviluppato il “Centro di Lotta Integrata” in cui operano esperti agronomi che forniscono assistenza ai produttori e li aiutano a ridurre l'uso di fitofarmaci e si impegnano ad utilizzare dei mezzi non chimici per controllare i parassiti delle piante.

Per Assodaunia è importante prendersi cura di ogni consumatore fin dai primi anni. Per questo motivo ci impegniamo nel progetto Fruit Salad School Game che si pone l’obiettivo di informare i ragazzi della scuola dell’obbligo ai comportamenti giusti da attuare per una vita sana.

Name: Initiative Entwaldungsfreies Soja
Description:
Die Sektorinitiative Soja (SIS) setzt sich ein für die nachhaltige Transformation von Soja-Lieferketten.

Dabei fokussieren wir uns auf alle Unternehmen, in denen Soja innerhalb der Lieferkette eine tragende Rolle spielt, insbesondere in den Branchen Drogerie, Futtermittel sowie Lebensmittel- und Einzelhandel in Deutschland.

Unser Ziel: ein sektorweites Statement entsprechend der Accountability Framework Initiative (AFi) Richtlinien. 

Der Sojaanbau stellt insbesondere in Südamerika einen der Haupttreiber von Entwaldung und drastischer Naturzerstörung dar. Wir von der Sektorinitiative Soja (SIS) möchten zeigen, dass der wirtschaftliche Anbau von Soja auch ohne Abholzung und teils irreversible Umwandlung von Ökosystemen wie Wiesen und Graslandschaften gelingen kann.
Entstanden ist unsere Initiative im Rahmen des Projekte "Tackling the Main Drivers of Deforestation and Conversion in Brazil" in Zusammenarbeit des WWF Deutschland und des WWF Brasilien. Das Projekt findet im Auftrag der Gesellschaft für Internationale Zusammenarbeit (GIZ) satt, welches aus Mitteln des Bundesministeriums für wirtschaftliche Zusammenarbeit (BMZ) gefördert ist.

Name: #kenniskracht
Description:
Kennis is kracht, zorg dat ze behouden blijft

De vergrijzing, ontgroening en krapte op de arbeidsmarkt stelt de sector voor een aantal grote uitdagingen. Hoe zorgen we ervoor dat medewerkers in de bloembollengroothandel fit en gemotiveerd kunnen blijven werken tot aan hun pensioen? Hoe zorgen we ervoor dat de kennis van medewerkers die met pensioen gaan, behouden blijft voor het bedrijf? En hoe blijven bedrijven aantrekkelijk voor nieuwe instroom?

Sociale partners hebben #kenniskracht in het leven geroepen om werkgevers en werknemers in de sector te ondersteunen bij bovengenoemde vraagstukken. Kijk voor het aanbod op deze website of stel je vraag via kenniskracht@actor.nl

#kenniskracht is een initiatief van Koninklijke Anthos, CNV Vakmensen en FNV Agrarisch Groen. Het project wordt gefinancierd door Colland Arbeidsmarkt.

Name: Tiro Tres Farms
Description:
4 generations of family farming, producing raw bulk conventional and organic baby leaf items such as spinach, lettuces, arugula and chard. Our growing season begins in November and wraps up in April/May. Processors seeking additional sourcing can contact us for further information. We would be happy to supply you!

Tiro Tres Farms incorporates Good Agricultural Practices (GAPs) and Good Manufacturing Practices (GMPs) as part of an overall Food Safety Management System using procedures customized for our farming, packing and cooling operation that is based on industry guidelines, customer recommendations, and self set standards. We are accountable for implementing a functional and successful operation. *Primus GFS certified & Certified Organic by QCS
 
Our team strives to maintain a food safe environment by continuously implementing the latest changes in the industry and remaining transparent with our customers.  Food safety is an integral part of our entire operation and is taken very seriously.  Our food safety program includes a set of standard operating procedures (SOP’s), worker training programs, and documentation which address several areas of our agricultural operation, including but not limited to: worker health and hygiene, proper cleaning and sanitation, irrigation water, soil management, pesticide use, preventative maintenance, pathogen testing, and trace back procedures.

Tiro Tres Farms’ goal is to make certain that we are consistently providing a quality and safe product for consumers to enjoy. Not only is this achieved through food safety and safe work practices, but through strenuous research in conjunction with Universities, Extension Services, seed companies and plant breeders to ensure sustainability. Name: SORIANO APARICIO SL
Description:
Soriano Aparicio, S.L. es una empresa familiar fundada en 1974 por D. Salvador Soriano. Actualmente está gestionada por la segunda generación de la familia. Nuestro negocio comprende el cultivo, envasado y comercialización de Ajos, Cebollas, Patatas y Nueces.

Contamos con puestos en Mercabarna y Mercaxátiva. Estos puntos de venta nos permiten atender de manera cercana y familiar a nuestros clientes. 

Nuestras instalaciones de almenamiento y envasado se ubican en Chinchilla de Montearagón, junto a la autovía A-31. Tienen una superficie de 24.000 m2, contando con cámaras frigoríficas para 13.000 Toneladas de Ajos y Cebollas. 

En nuestras instalaciones contamos con el equipamiento necesario para realizar desde paquetes de ajos de 200 gramos hasta sacas de 1.200 kgs, pasando por nuestros formatos más emblemáticos, como son las cajas de 10 kilogramos, este formato permite al cliente apreciar la calidad del producto ofertado.

Con respecto al origen de nuestros productos, actualmente cultivamos directamente, o en colaboración con nuestros proveedores de confianza, 170 hectáreas de ajos y 160 hectáreas de cebollas. Asimismo contamos con nuestra propia explotación de nogales de 27 hectáreas. Contamos con equipamiento de última generación para llevar a cabo las tareas de cosecha de ajos, cebollas y nueces de manera mecanizada pero delicada con el producto. 

La producción propia se complementa con la importación del producto necesario con el fin de tener disponibilidad de producto 52 semanas al año.

Description:
O Grupo Atlantic é uma empresa brasileira que atua com excelência em três frentes: tecnologia agrícola com drones, soluções práticas para ambientes com pisos de aplicação rápida, e importação estratégica de produtos que facilitam e aceleram o dia a dia dos nossos clientes.

Na divisão Atlantic Drones, somos referência em vendas, manutenção e peças para drones agrícolas DJI AGRAS. Atendemos todo o Brasil com um dos maiores estoques do país, entregando agilidade, suporte técnico especializado e operação própria de pulverização, com alto desempenho e precisão.

Com o projeto Pisos Click Atlantic, levamos tecnologia também para dentro de casa. Desenvolvemos pisos de fácil aplicação, à prova d’água e com isolamento acústico, ideais para quem busca sofisticação sem sujeira, com instalação rápida e sem quebra-quebra.

Através do braço de importação, oferecemos veículos, equipamentos e componentes com segurança, transparência e agilidade, tanto para o consumidor final quanto para revendas e parceiros comerciais. Atuamos com condições diferenciadas para o atacado e entregas programadas para todo o país.

A Atlantic cresce com foco em resultado e compromisso com quem busca eficiência, tecnologia e confiança para investir com segurança.

Inovação que conecta o agro, o lar e o mercado.
Esse é o jeito Atlantic de fazer acontecer.

Siloking, yapısal bütünlüğü korumak, uzun ve kısa, kuru ve nemli malzemeyi doğru bir şekilde karıştırmak ve homojen ve hassas rasyonlar oluşturmak için tasarlanmış bir teknoloji sunar. Ürünlerimiz, 365 gün boyunca güvenilirlik ve konfor gözetilerek kullanıma sunulmuştur.
Siz de modern yem teknolojisi konusunda ileri düşünen bir girişimciyseniz, Siloking’in yenilikçi ürünleri ve akıllı çözümleriyle sürdürülebilir bir gelecek için katkıda bulunabilirsiniz. İşbirliği ve güvene dayalı uzun vadeli bir ortaklıkla, yem karıştırma makineleri ve silaj tırmıkları konusundaki ihtiyaçlarınızı karşılamak için buradayız.

Name: The Aurox Meat Company
Description:
The Aurox Meat Company is a meat wholesaler based in the South West of England. We specialise in rare and traditional breed mature British meats. Our unique selling point is the sale of animals raised on regenerative livestock farms, given the time to mature slowly on wild pastures, with full traceability. This additional time to develop means our meats have a much richer flavour profile, not rushed to size on a cocktail of grains to fatten them up quickly.

Originally everything we sell came from Lyons Hill Farm, which we have now outgrown. However, Lyons Hill Farm remains the embodiment of our ethos of excellent meat reared in the time-honoured traditions. We still use the rare breed animals from that farm to provide our best customers with produce that has a true provenance and a real point of difference.

We now utilise a number of suppliers who follow our strict specifications on ageing, fat content, food source and other factors. This allows us to offer our growing customer base consistent quality and maintain our brand’s integrity.

Our customers pay a serious premium for our meats for two reasons: its quality and because we provide full traceability. A typical catering butcher will provide average-quality boxed beef that will get the job done, however, we set ourselves apart by giving the customer the ability to inform their patrons the complete provenance of their order.

This focus on full traceability is totally unique to our business. It is the cornerstone of what drives how we operationalise The Aurox Beef Company. It means we don’t order beef the same way other wholesalers do, we don’t store it the same way as other wholesalers do, and we don’t sell it the same way as other wholesalers do.

We think this is crucial for giving context to customers on why we’re a different, better meat provider. We care deeply about the story behind what we sell, we don’t expect our customers to simply buy our produce because we say it’s superior. We believe in educating

Description:
At Sahyoga Organics, we’re building a farmer-led ecosystem that bridges the gap between traditional wisdom and modern market needs.

Our focus is on cultivating medicinal and organic crops, not just as commodities, but as a way to improve livelihoods, restore soil health, and bring trust back into the agricultural value chain.

We work directly with farmers through structured partnerships that offer support in cultivation, training, inputs, and traceable procurement. For buyers, we offer access to ethically grown, quality-assured produce with full transparency, from field to final dispatch.

Our work revolves around three core areas:
• Collaborative farming partnerships
• Trade and procurement of medicinal crops
• Practical, experience-based training and consulting

We don’t claim to have all the answers but we’re learning with every season, every farmer, and every conversation.

If you’d like to know more about how we work or explore a partnership, we invite you to visit our website.

Sahyoga means ‘working together’ in Hindi and we take that to heart.

Name: Hysolv GmbH
Description:
Hysolv GmbH is an animal health and hygiene company which supplies farmers, vets and wholesalers with high quality hygiene products and premixes to help you safeguard animal health, prevent diseases and improve performance. 

Furthermore, we place great value on an extensive consultation in the selection of suitable products and their application.

The effectiveness of our offered products is confirmed by the DVG (German Veterinary Medical Society).


- We believe that less is more - 

Years of careful research and development have resulted in a range of products that are proven to be more effective than others in their class.
Our provided products are able to exhaust their full effectiveness even with low concentration. It is not the quantity of active ingredients that is important, it is how the various components are blended.

In this way less product has to be used to achieve the same effect – true to the motto “Less is more”.

Less product saves you costs, effort and time – in a safer work environment with less environmental damage. 


- Let's make the world a little safer - 

Due to their lower concentration our offered products are more environmentally friendly than comparable products.
Additionally, all products are free of formaldehyde.

We are all custodians of the future – this is why we promote the responsible and sustainable use of hygiene products to protect our environment as far as possible.


- Count on the support of a reliable partner -  

Our employees advise you in full detail on the selection of suitable products and their proper use. 
We even support you in case of a parasite infestation of an animal or similar challenges.
Hysolv operates internationally, so most likely one of our consultants also speaks your language.


Are you seeking to safeguard animal health and hygiene like we do? We will be happy to connect with you!
If you have any queries, feel free to contact us. 
We look forward to hearing from you!

Learn more at www.hysolv.eu

Product-Based Segment: In our product-based segment, we specialize in the export and import of a diverse range of agricultural products, including fresh fruits, vegetables, grains, and organic goods sourced from India. We are committed to ensuring that all products meet stringent quality standards, providing consumers with fresh and nutritious options while supporting farmers in accessing international markets.

Service-Based Segment: At Bharat Farm Connect, we believe in nurturing the earth while cultivating sustainable futures. Our service model empowers landowners to transform their available land into thriving green spaces, focusing on the cultivation of eco-friendly hardwood products. We offer a comprehensive solution that includes land acquisition, expert guidance on planting and maintaining hardwood crops, and a guaranteed buy-back program for harvested products. Our commitment extends beyond cultivation; we aim to create vibrant community spaces that foster biodiversity, improve air quality, and enhance the overall well-being of our communities.

Through partnerships with local communities, NGOs, and environmental organizations, we are dedicated to reclaiming degraded lands and transforming them into lush landscapes that benefit both people and the planet. Our educational programs and community engagement initiatives inspire individuals to take an active role in environmental conservation, ensuring that future generations inherit a healthier, greener world.

Vision: To become a leading platform in the agricultural trade sector, promoting sustainable farming practices

Name: Bäuerliche Erzeugergemeinschaft Schwäbisch Hall
Description:
„Hilf dir selbst, so hilft dir Gott“: Das Sprichwort haben wir Hohenloher Bauern uns zu Herzen genommen und 1988 die Bäuerliche Erzeugergemeinschaft Schwäbisch Hall gegründet. Wir arbeiten nach dem Prinzip der bäuerlichen Selbsthilfe und engagieren uns für die bäuerliche Regionalentwicklung in Hohenlohe.

Mit Hilfe von alten heimischen Landrassen erzeugen wir Fleisch, das Verbraucherinnen und Verbraucher mit gutem Gewissen zubereiten und mit viel Genuss essen können. Unsere Tiere bekommen nur bestes und gesundes Futter zum Fressen. Verboten sind Wachstumsförderer, Tiermehl und andere bedenkliche Stoffe. Das ist gut für die Tiere, gut für die Umwelt und gut für die Qualität unserer Produkte, denn das schmeckt man.

Wir bringen unsere gemästeten Tiere selbst zum eigenen Erzeugerschlachthof nach Schwäbisch Hall, damit sie nicht bei langen Tiertransporten leiden müssen. Dort werden sie unter Aufsicht von Veterinären tierschutzgerecht geschlachtet und verarbeitet.

Anschließend wird jedes Tier auf seine Fleischqualität hin geprüft und erhält den Kontrollstempel der Bäuerlichen Erzeugergemeinschaft Schwäbisch Hall. Erzeugung, Schlachtung und Vertrieb sind in einer Hand. Transparenz ist oberstes Gebot. Fleisch der Bäuerlichen Erzeugergemeinschaft Schwäbisch Hall stammt eben direkt vom Bauern.

Vertrauen ist gut, Kontrolle ist besser: Freiwillig unterziehen wir uns von der Zucht bis zur Schlachtung einer neutralen Kontrolle. In den Erzeugerrichtlinien sind alle Anforderungen und Kontrollstufen genau festgeschrieben.

Wir sind der führende Erzeuger und Vermarkter von Bio-Fleisch. Unsere Qualitätsfleischprogramme wurden allesamt von Öko-Test mit „sehr gut“ bewertet. 2005 haben die führenden Umwelt- und Tierschutzverbände der Bäuerlichen Erzeugergemeinschaft Schwäbisch Hall den Förderpreis Pro Tier verliehen.

Name: Green Lush
Description:
At Green Lush, we are revolutionizing the way crops are grown, bringing sustainable and high-yield cultivation to indoor hydroponic farming. Our mission is to provide fresh, nutritious, and pesticide-free produce to local communities while minimizing our environmental impact.

With our state-of-the-art indoor farming facility, we combine innovative technology and automation to optimize plant growth and ensure consistent, top-quality harvests. By harnessing the power of hydroponics, we eliminate the need for soil, allowing us to grow crops vertically and maximize space utilization.

Our commitment to sustainability is ingrained in every aspect of our operations. We employ energy-efficient LED lighting systems, cutting-edge climate control technology, and precise nutrient delivery systems to minimize resource consumption. By utilizing water recirculation and efficient water management practices, we significantly reduce water waste compared to traditional farming methods.

At Green Lush, we believe that healthy farming leads to healthy plants, which in turn leads to healthy communities. That's why we focus on organic, pesticide-free cultivation practices. Our crops are carefully nurtured using organic nutrients, ensuring that every bite of our produce is packed with flavor, vitamins, and minerals.

We are proud to be a part of the local community, supporting local farmers and businesses. By growing our crops locally, we reduce transportation emissions and provide fresh produce year-round. Our commitment to community extends beyond providing nutritious food. We actively engage with educational institutions, offering workshops and tours to inspire the next generation of farmers and environmental stewards.

Join us in our journey towards sustainable agriculture and a greener future. Together, we can transform the way we grow and consume food, ensuring a healthier planet for generations to come.

#IndoorFarming #SustainableAgriculture #FreshProduce #Hydroponics #GreenLush

Inshell ( NC ), Inshell ( GR ) ,Kernel,Kernel.
The peanut, or groundnut (Arachis hypogaea), is a species in the legume or "bean" family (Fabaceae).
The peanut was probably first domesticated and cultivated in the valleys of Paraguay.

It is an annual herbaceous plant growing 30 to 50 cm (1.0 to 1.6 ft) tall.
The leaves are opposite, pinnate with four leaflets (two opposite pairs; no terminal leaflet), each leaflet 1 to 7 cm (⅜ to 2¾ in) long and 1 to 3 cm (⅜ to 1 inch) broad. 

The flowers are a typical pea flower in shape, 2 to 4 cm (0.8 to 1.6 in) (¾ to 1½ in) across, yellow with reddish veining.
Hypogaea means "under the earth"; after pollination, the flower stalk elongates causing it to bend until the ovary touches the ground.

Continued stalk growth then pushes the ovary underground where the mature fruit develops into a legume pod, the peanut – a classical example of geocarpy. 

Pods are 3 to 7 cm (1.2 to 2.8 in) long, containing 1 to 4 seeds.

Peanuts are known by many other local names such as earthnuts, ground nuts, goober peas, monkey nuts, pygmy nuts, and pig nuts.

Despite its name and appearance, the peanut is not a nut, but rather a legume.

Hermes Agri-Company Ltd is a Ukrainian manufacturer of organic fertilizers made from vermicompost under the trademark Humiplus. 
The company has almost 30 years of experience in the fertilizer market, unique production and own certified laboratory. Hermes Agri-Company has over two decades of experience in exporting high-quality products.

Humiplus fertilizers are different from the others owing to their unique nature. They are made from vermicompost (biohumus), the product of the cattle manure processing by the Red Californian Worms (Eisenia fetida) also known as Red Wigglers. 

Hermes Agri-Company Ltd has been cooperating with research institutes and conducts production experiments in the fields of customers for many years. Thanks to scientific and practical research, we have developed our own unique technology to reduce the level of mineral nutrition without loss of yield. The transition to organic farming has never been as profitable as with Humiplus fertilizers. 

Humiplus fertilizers are approved for use in organic agriculture in accordance with the International Accredited Certification Bodies Standard for organic production and processing, which is equivalent to European Union regulations No. 834/2007 and no. 889/2008.

Name: EVERBOUNT
Description:
About Us


EVERBOUNT – Harvesting hopes, sustaining lives.

Everbount is an agritech startup solving Nigeria’s ₦3 trillion post-harvest losses by integrating industrial-scale farming, smart storage, and an online marketplace. We empower smallholder farmers, optimize food distribution, and ensure fresh, affordable food for consumers.


The Problem

Nigeria loses 30-40% of its harvested food due to poor storage, fragmented supply chains, and limited farmer access to markets. Smallholder farmers struggle with post-harvest losses, while consumers face high food prices and inconsistent supply.


Our Solution

Everbount bridges this gap by:

  1. Trade hubs – Physical marketplaces where farmers sell directly to buyers

  2. Smart storage – Reducing spoilage and improving food availability

  3. Digital marketplace – Expanding market reach with seamless transactions

By integrating agriculture, technology, and logistics, we cut food waste, increase farmer earnings, and lower costs for consumers.


How It Works

 1. Farmers register with Everbount to access storage & trade hubs.
 2. Buyers purchase produce physically or via our online platform.
 3. Everbount earns revenue from direct sales and transaction commissions.

Our Impact & Market Opportunity

 •	Supporting smallholder farmers with better market access
 •	Cutting food waste and stabilizing prices
 •	Addressing Nigeria’s multi-billion-naira agricultural sector


Why Everbount?

 End-to-end solution: Farming, storage, and direct sales hubs
 Tech-driven efficiency: Shorter supply chains, lower costs
 Scalable growth: Expansion into new regions with sustainable impact


Join Us in Reshaping Agriculture

We are seeking funding, partnerships, and stakeholders to scale Everbount into a leading force in food distribution across Nigeria and beyond.


 Contact us

Name: rebio - Regionale Bioland Erzeugergemeinschaft GmbH
Description:
Die rebio GmbH ist eine regionale Bioland Erzeugergemeinschaft in Baden-Württemberg mit über 100 Mitgliedsbetrieben.
1991 schlossen sich 39 Bioland-Landwirte in den Regionen Neckar-Alb, Schwarzwald-Baar und Staufen-Teck zusammen, um das Bioland-Getreide gemeinschaftlich zu vermarkten, mit dem Ziel langfristig faire Preise für die Erzeuger*innen und eine möglichst große Wertschöpfung in Erzeuger-Hand zu generieren. Die rebio versteht sich seitdem als Bindeglied zwischen dem Bioland-Verband, den Erzeuger*innen und den Verarbeiter*innen, und hat eine Struktur geschaffen, die regionales Angebot und Nachfrage zusammenbringt. Seit 2006 betreiben wir ein eigenes Getreidelager mit rund 3.200 t Lagerkapazität.  Seit 2011 organisiert die rebio die Bio-Zuckerrübenkampagne für die Schweizer Zucker AG in Frauenfeld. Die Zuckerrüben dafür werden nach den Richtlinien der Verbände Bioland, Demeter, Naturland und Biokreis angebaut. Im Jahr 2013 hat die rebio begonnen, Zucker aus der Schweiz zurückzuholen und als Bioland-Zucker an Verarbeiter*innen und Handel zu vermarkten. Zum Zweck der Schlachtviehvermarktung haben wir 2009 eine weitere Erzeugergemeinschaft gegründet, die Bio-Landgut Fleisch EZG GmbH. Als Bündler in der Vermarktung von Rindern und Schweinen an regionale Metzgereien und Verarbeiter*innen steht auch die Bio-Landgut-Fleisch EZG GmbH im ständigen Austausch mit ihren Landwirte*innen. Sie versteht sich zudem als Ansprechpartner für die Erzeugerbetriebe in Süddeutschland im Bereich Zuchttiere, Ferkel und Absetzer. Seit 2014 vermarkten wir über die gemeinsame Tochterfirma Landmacher GmbH ein Trockensortiment an den Naturkostfachhandel. Im Jahr 2019 haben beide Erzeugergemeinschaften die Getreidemühle, mit der wir seit Anfang der 1990er Jahre partnerschaftlich zusammenarbeiten, als Tochterfirma übernommen. Sie stellt aus dem Bioland-Getreide hochwertige Mehle und Vollkornprodukte her und beliefert im Auftrag der rebio Bäckereien in der Region mit Bioland-Rohstoffen.

Name: Агро Експерт
Description:

Всі рішення спрямовані на покращення якості продукції, підвищення врожайності, і при цьому зменшенні негативного впливу на навколишнє середовище на рівні міжнародних стандартів. Наша мета - забезпечення виробників  найсучаснішими високоякісними матеріалами для виробництва (насінням, засобами захисту рослин, добривами, сільгосптехнікою тощо).

Компанія «Агро Експерт» є постачальником оригінальних засобів захисту рослин, високопродуктивних посівних матеріалів, мінеральних добрив, регуляторів та біостимуляторів росту рослин, мікробіологічних препаратів та адювантів. З 2019 року портфель компанії поповнився ґрунтообробною технікою – важкими боронами - канадської компанії Kello-Bilt, комплексними системами для обробки насіння американської компанії USC, та змішувачами робочих сумішей - Handler IV. З 2020 року ми доповнили пакет наших послуг інноваційними цифровими рішеннями сумісно із партнерами Yara Digital.

Наші клієнти - це малі та середні господарства в Україні.

Основні партнери: KWS, Bayer, Limagrain, Ахрохімічні технології, Нуфарм, IGrow, Nando, Vitazyme, Yara

Name: Parinama Ortofrutta Srl
Description:
Parinama Ortofrutta S.r.l. è un’azienda consolidata che opera nel commercio all’ingrosso di prodotti ortofrutticoli, vantando un’esperienza pluriennale nel settore e diventando un punto di riferimento per la commercializzazione dei migliori prodotti di stagione provenienti dal nostro territorio.
All'inizio degli anni '80 anno il capostipite della famiglia, Mario, intraprese un'attività di vendita di prodotti ortofrutticoli all’ingrosso all'interno del M.O.F. il più grande e moderno centro italiano di concentrazione, condizionamento e smistamento di prodotti ortofrutticoli freschi.
Grazie alla continua esperienza, col passare degli anni l’azienda cresce anno dopo anno fino ad arrivare all'inserimento nella società di altre due solide figure socie, il figlio Davide ed il genero Giovanni, che contribuiscono ad alzare gli standard qualitativi dell'azienda con l'obiettivo di porre la soddisfazione del cliente al centro di tutto, a partire dalle alte competenze di una solida struttura operativa e di collaboratori che selezionano attentamente le migliori aziende produttrici ed i prodotti, controllano e certificano la qualità, garantiscono una distribuzione organizzata ed un costante rifornimento di prodotti freschi e sicuri.
I prodotti freschi ed appena raccolti raggiungono il nostro magazzino, ad attenderli ampie celle frigorifere ed aree climatizzate che garantiscono una perfetta conservazione della catena del freddo e delle proprietà organolettiche dei vari prodotti. 
Parinama pone molta attenzione alla tracciabilità dei prodotti, a partire dai trattamenti di difesa e concimazione utilizzati dai produttori, alle materie prime ed i macchinari impiegati. 
I prodotti finali devono presentare residui di fitofarmaci o di contaminazione ambientale sempre al di sotto dei limiti previsti dalla legge e dai nostri specifici accordi commerciali e devono rispettare i requisiti normativi ed i criteri definiti dalla nostra etica e quella dei nostri clienti.

Our expertise lies in combining traditional know-how with sustainable sourcing, built on long-term partnerships with local farmers. Each product reflects the authenticity, purity, and natural richness of Madagascar’s land.

Committed to quality, sustainability, and full traceability, PHAEL FLOR EXPORT promotes responsible trade while supporting fair and environmentally conscious local development.

Fondée au début des années 1980, PHAEL FLOR EXPORT est une entreprise familiale malgache spécialisée dans la production et l’exportation de produits naturels et certifiés biologiques.
Depuis plus de quarante ans, nous mettons en valeur les richesses exceptionnelles de Madagascar à travers une large gamme de produits : épices biologiques, huiles essentielles, fruits et feuilles séchés, ainsi que des extraits naturels obtenus par oléorésine ou extraction au CO₂.

Notre savoir-faire repose sur une maîtrise artisanale des procédés d’extraction, un approvisionnement responsable et des partenariats durables avec les producteurs locaux. Chaque produit incarne l’authenticité, la pureté et la diversité de la nature malgache.

Engagée dans une démarche de qualité, de durabilité et de traçabilité, PHAEL FLOR EXPORT s’attache à préserver l’environnement tout en soutenant une économie locale équitable et respectueuse des communautés rurales.

Name: Genusswerkstatt Herisau
Description:
«Ich möchte, dass unsere Produkte wegen der Qualität gekauft werden.» Mit diesem Satz beginnt die Geschichte der Genusswerkstatt Herisau und die Reise zu einem kleinen Stück Glück – für Sie.

2016 hatte Urs Stuker, damals Leiter der sozialen Einrichtung Hof Baldenwil, die Idee, einen «Produktionsbetrieb für alltägliche Lebensmittel» zu schaffen, der Arbeitsplätze für Menschen mit einer Beeinträchtigung bietet. 2018 wurde die Idee Wirklichkeit. Die Genusswerkstatt Herisau, die als Marke aus der Idee hervorging, ist bereits jetzt eine kleine Erfolgsgeschichte, die mit wunderbaren Produkten kleine Glücksmomente in den Alltag bringt.

Wir produzieren Salze, Gewürzmischungen, Essig, Senfe, Backmischungen, Wellnessartikel und viele weitere Produkte für den täglichen Bedarf. Der Anspruch ist: höchste Qualität. Wichtig sind uns ausserdem: Regionalität, Menschen, Handwerk, Genuss und Wirkung. Dass unsere Produkte neben Privatkunden auch Metzger, Chefeinkäufer und Spitzenköche begeistern, bestätigt uns, dass wir mit unserer Arbeit goldrichtig unterwegs sind.

Sozialer Grundgedanke
Wir sind kein klassischer Produktionsbetrieb, sondern ein professioneller Betrieb mit sozialem Auftrag. Bei uns arbeiten Menschen mit einer Beeinträchtigung. Sie arbeiten leidenschaftlich, sorgfältig, höchst fachmännisch und tun das, was sie tun mit so viel Herzblut, dass man das spürt – in jedem Produkt.

Die Genusswerkstatt Herisau ist ein Betrieb vom Verein Werkplatz. Der Verein bietet Arbeitsplätze für Menschen mit Beeinträchtigungen im Produktions- und Dienstleistungsbereich und leistet damit einen wichtigen sozialen Beitrag zur Inklusion.

Основна сфера діяльності Спектр-Агро – дистрибуція насіння, засобів захисту рослин, мінеральних макро - та мікродобрив, сільгоспмашин (HARDI, Kockerling, Deutz-Fahr, Dieci, SOLA, FALC, ARBOS, MADARA, QUIVOGNE) тощо від провідних світових та українських виробників.

Спектр - Агро – це високоякісний сервіс та консультації, це інноваційні технології і широкий асортимент товарів, які відповідають сучасним вимогам сільгоспвиробників. Спектр-Агро - це згуртована команда професіоналів високого класу, працюючих для зростання і розвитку аграрного бізнесу в Україні.

Так як ми є національною компанією, це дає нам певні переваги. З географічним покриттям усієї території України та кількістю продавців більш ніж 120 менеджерів та директорів ми володіємо глобальним розмахом і можемо відповідати потребам наших клієнтів.

Як справжня національна компанія, Спектр-Агро керується сформованими цінностями етики бізнесу та здійснює вагомий вплив на суспільство. Наша стратегія партнерства, заснованого на довірі та безумовному виконанні забов´язань, надає нам унікальний потенціал для безпосереднього сприяння ефективному та екологічно-раціональному розвитку сільського господарства України та етичному веденню бізнесу.

Name: Rajput Farms
Description:
The Essence of Nature: Rajput Farms Bringing Freshness to Your Plate
**Introduction:**
In a world that's constantly moving towards convenience, there's something genuinely magical about connecting with nature's bounty. At Rajput Farms, we believe in this connection deeply. Nestled in the heart of Unnao on Pariyar Road, Rajput Farms is more than just a name—it's a testament to the timeless art of farming. We're dedicated to cultivating the purest, freshest, and most delectable produce that nature has to offer.

**A Glimpse into Our Farm:**
Picture this: rolling fields stretching as far as the eye can see, adorned with vibrant crops that sway gently with the breeze. At Rajput Farms, this picturesque scene is our daily reality. With a legacy spanning 85 years, we've nurtured the land, embracing organic farming practices that prioritize sustainability and the environment.

**Experience the Flavorful Journey:**
From the moment our seeds are sown to the day our produce graces your table, it's a journey filled with dedication and care. We specialize in a diverse range of crops, from the freshest fruits to the most vibrant vegetables. Each bite tells a story of wholesome goodness that stems from our farm's rich soil.

**Our Must-Have: Mangoes Beyond Compare:**
Summer is synonymous with the arrival of mangoes, and at Rajput Farms, our mangoes are a true testament to the season's bounty. Bursting with flavor and juiciness, our mangoes are a celebration of nature's sweetness. The golden hues and intoxicating aroma make every mango a treasured delight.

Name: Integral Trading
Description:

Por un lado, ofrecemos a nuestros productores condiciones justas dentro de la compra del algodón, dando valor al esfuerzo del cultivo y cosecha de lo que se considera como el “oro blanco” de la industria textil. Los apoyamos a que su trabajo sea rentable, no solo a colocar su algodón en el mercado a un precio justo, sino también atendiendo sus necesidades desde el inicio de cada temporada de cultivo.

Name: Indian Cow Promotion Breeding Center Pune
Description:
About Us:

The Indian Cow Promotion Breeding Center in Pune is dedicated to the preservation, promotion, and scientific breeding of indigenous cow breeds. Established with a vision to enhance the quality and productivity of native cows, our center integrates traditional knowledge with modern technology to achieve sustainable development in cattle farming.

Our Mission:

To conserve and promote indigenous cow breeds by utilizing advanced breeding techniques and fostering awareness about the significance of native cattle in agriculture and ecology.

What We Do:

Scientific Breeding Programs: Implementing advanced breeding techniques to improve the genetic quality and productivity of native cow breeds.

Conservation Efforts: Dedicated to the preservation of endangered indigenous cow breeds through various conservation programs.

Research and Development: Researching nutrition, healthcare, and breeding practices to enhance the well-being and productivity of native cattle.
Farmer Support: Providing training and resources to farmers to promote sustainable and profitable cattle farming practices.

Awareness Campaigns: Organizing workshops, seminars, and campaigns to educate the public about the importance of indigenous cow breeds.

Our Achievements:

Successfully bred and conserved multiple endangered indigenous cow breeds.
Collaborated with leading agricultural universities and research institutions for advanced studies and projects.

Provided extensive training programs benefiting hundreds of farmers in the region.

Connect With Us:

Join us in our mission to preserve and promote the invaluable heritage of indigenous cows. Follow our page for updates on our programs, achievements, and upcoming events. Let's work together towards a sustainable and prosperous future in cattle farming.

Name: Ashidoo Agro Exports Limited
Description:
Ashidoo Agro Exports Ltd is a Nigerian agro-export company specializing in the cultivation, sourcing, semi-processing, and global export of premium agricultural commodities. Founded in September 2019 and headquartered in Abuja, the company operates extensively across rural Nigeria, especially Benue State, partnering closely with local farmers to deliver a wide range of high-quality produce to international markets.

Core Services & Operations
Ashidoo offers a full-spectrum agro-export service, handling everything from farm aggregation to global distribution. Its services include:

 1. Sourcing & Aggregation
Works with farmer cooperatives to aggregate export-ready crops.

Ensures fair trade sourcing and quality control at the farm gate.

Focus commodities: sesame, cassava, cocoa, ginger, coconut, charcoal, spices, and shea butter.

 2. Processing & Export Packaging
Facilities for cleaning, drying, grading, hulling, and oil extraction (e.g., coconut, sesame).

Custom packaging options: vacuum sealing, branded export packaging, jute bags, and food-grade sacks.

 3. Export Documentation & Compliance
Handles all regulatory and export documentation, including:

Phytosanitary Certificates

NEPC Export Licenses

Certificate of Origin

SONCAP and customs clearance documents.


Product Portfolio:
Ashidoo’s export commodities include:

Nuts & Seeds: Raw cashew nuts, sesame seeds, peanuts, soybeans

Spices & Produce: Dried split ginger, bitter kola, hibiscus (zobo), cocoa beans

Staple Crops: Yams, sorghum

Oils & Extracts: Palm oil, coconut oil 

Opportunities for Diaspora Collaboration
Ashidoo invites diaspora Nigerians and foreign investors to partner in scaling export operations through:

Export Volume Growth
Target: From 200,000 MT to 500,000 MT annually by 2029.
