Name: Little Stoney Acres Farm
Description:
Little Stoney Acres Farm | Premium Ontario Piedmontese Beef

At Little Stoney Acres Farm, we’re not just raising cattle — we’re redefining what premium red meat can and should be. Located in Blairhampton, Ontario, we specialize in purebred Piedmontese beef, a rare Italian breed known for its naturally lean, tender, and protein-rich profile. Scientifically backed and nutritionally superior, Piedmontese offers more protein, less fat, and significantly lower cholesterol than traditional beef — without sacrificing flavor.

Our commitment goes far beyond the cut. We believe in building a better food system rooted in transparency, ethical practices, and nutritional integrity. That means raising animals in low-stress environments, partnering with local Ontario breeders, avoiding shortcuts like hormones or antibiotics, and offering full traceability from pasture to plate.

We proudly serve a growing community of chefs, restaurants, wellness professionals, and conscious consumers who want more than just meat — they want meaning. Whether you’re plating a five-star dish or fueling a performance-focused lifestyle, our beef delivers clean, functional nutrition with a story behind every bite.

Little Stoney Acres Farm offers chef boxes, custom freezer orders, and wholesale partnerships across Ontario. If you're looking to elevate your menu, fuel your clients, or simply eat better — we’d love to connect.

Learn More About Us: https://linktr.ee/littlestoneyacresfarm

Name: Foster Honey Company
Description:
Fosters Honey Company is a family business owned and operated by Matthew and Katie Foster. We source our high grade mānuka honey from remote native forests in the far north of New Zealand. Our honey has a certified rating of UMF 10+ to UMF 30+. By trekking to secluded, rugged locations, we can bring you the strongest, most premium honey there is.
Passion and respect for bees is generational in our family. Matthew's grandfather was a beekeeper for a local company that pioneered the commercialisation and export of New Zealand mānuka honey. When a friend suggested Matthew get into the apiary industry, he jumped at the idea. “We started with a couple of hives and now have around 500.”
We’re dedicated to producing world-class honey and our craft has come from hard work, dedication and care. This hard work is matched by a natural buzz for the business for both Matthew and Katie. “There’s nothing more satisfying than seeing people enjoy our honey and understand its natural power.”
We cultivate strong, enduring partnerships with our customers around New Zealand and the globe. Collecting the highest grade manuka and ensuring every hive counts, we supply our premium honey in bulk drums or pack to individual customer’s unique requirements  and specifications. Get in touch to learn more about our honey and purchasing options.

Bienvenido a Mifra! Somos una empresa familiar con más de 100 años de historia y dedicación en la producción y venta al por mayor de fruta de hueso de calidad. 

Nuestro bisabuelo sembró el germen que, alimentado con esfuerzo y dedicación a lo largo de cuatro generaciones, ha evolucionado hasta convertir a Frutas Mifra en una empresa joven y dinámica referente en el sector. La familia es la esencia de nuestra empresa, criamos, recolectamos y seleccionamos con mimo y pasión.

Nuestras fincas situadas en la comarca de Valdejalón y en la Alta Montaña de Calatayud (Codos) suman más de 170 hectáreas de producción propia y son la combinación perfecta para nuestros cultivos.

Producimos una amplia diversidad de fruta de hueso:

 Cereza
 Melocotón
 Paraguayo
 Ciruela
 Albaricoque
 Nectarina
 Melocotón Rojo

En Mifra, nos aseguramos de que nuestra fruta llegue a su destino en las mejores condiciones. Tras una recolección manual muy cuidada, se transporta desde nuestras fincas ubicadas en un radio de 50 km hasta nuestra central donde se utilizan diversos métodos de envasado para asegurar la calidad de nuestros productos. Además, contamos con sistemas de protección de cultivos frente a heladas y mallas antigranizo. 

Nos enorgullece ofrecer fruta de hueso de alta calidad tanto en el mercado nacional como en el internacional. Nuestra larga trayectoria y experiencia en el sector nos permite asegurar que nuestros productos son de gran calidad y sabor.

Name: Agton
Description:
Jesteśmy profesjonalnym dystrybutorem białkowych surowców paszowych dla polskiego przemysłu paszowego. Dostarczamy najwyższej jakości śrutę sojową, słonecznikową i rzepakową z dostępem do pełnej oferty w portach Gdańsk, Gdynia i Szczecin.
Nasza misja: pomagamy klientom handlować inteligentniej — kupować i sprzedawać efektywniej, zabezpieczać ryzyko towarowe skutecznie oraz optymalizować przepływ produktów od pola, przez port, do zakładu produkcyjnego. Umożliwiamy naszym klientom analizę spreadów, jakości i timingu przez jedną zunifikowaną perspektywę.
Współpracujemy z największymi importerami i producentami w kraju i za granicą, co zapewnia dostęp do najlepszych źródeł surowców oraz stabilność dostaw. Zaufali nam hodowcy drobiu, firmy handlowe oraz mieszalnie pasz – od małych przedsiębiorstw po czołowych graczy rynkowych.
Nasz profil działalności:
•	Profesjonalne zarządzanie ryzykiem towarowym
•	Fizyczne dostawy białkowych surowców paszowych
•	Zaopatrzenie przemysłu paszowego w najlepsze surowce
•	Personalizowane oferty dostosowane do indywidualnych potrzeb klientów
•	Wsparcie w budowaniu długofalowej strategii zakupowej
Nasze ceny są pochodną najlepszych ofert na polskim rynku oraz skutecznego zarządzania ryzykiem towarowym dla naszych klientów. Każdy klient ma dostęp do raportów i analiz generowanych przez naszą spółkę analityczną SIGRUM, działającą w tej samej grupie właścicielskiej.
Na dzisiejszym trudnym rynku liczy się: prawidłowa i skuteczna interpretacja danych, wiarygodność i szybkość dostępu do informacji rynkowej oraz planowanie realizacji. Dopiero połączenie wszystkich tych elementów tworzy optymalną strategię zakupową.
Nasz zespół to osoby z wieloletnim doświadczeniem zdobytym w międzynarodowych firmach – liderach światowego rynku. Posiadamy wszystkie niezbędne certyfikaty: RedCert, GMP+, Licencję Przewoźnika Międzynarodowego.

Name: Tiberias Harvest
Description:
Tiberias Harvest built its sea farm from scratch in 2011, in the waters north-east of Pulau Ubin. The farm structure is a modular floating cube system with net-cages of different sizes. We grow a variety of local fishes – mainly sea bass (barramundi), snapper and grouper.

Tiberias Harvest believes in responsible farming and fish health management practices. This means ensuring food safety and growing fish less intensively. It also means being mindful of the impact on the sea environment that hosts our farm.

Tiberias Harvest relies on the sourcing of good quality fingerlings and feed, and careful husbandry, to grow healthy fish. We use no antibiotics or chemicals in growing our fish. It helps that the farm is located at a spot with fast-flowing waters essential to producing healthy, clean-tasting fish.

Tiberias Harvest uses solar power for a large part of our farm’s daily energy need. We recycle and re-use farm waste and materials whenever we can. Net-cages are maintained using a mix of natural and mechanical cleaning methods.  We do not use any anti-foulants. The charm and serenity of the waters around Pulau Ubin is a constant reminder for us to do our part for the environment.

Name: Digitool senegal

Chez Digitool, notre mission est de transformer le paysage agricole africain en connectant les agriculteurs directement aux marchés locaux, régionaux et internationaux. Nous utilisons la puissance de la technologie pour créer une plateforme numérique innovante qui facilite la commercialisation des produits agricoles, optimise la chaîne d'approvisionnement, et promeut la durabilité.
Pourquoi Digitool?
 Connectivité sans précédent : Notre plateforme permet aux agriculteurs de toutes tailles de se connecter directement avec les acheteurs, réduire les intermédiaires et augmentant ainsi les marges bénéficiaires.
 Transparence des prix : Avec des informations en temps réel sur les prix des produits, nos utilisateurs peuvent prendre des décisions éclairées et maximiser leurs revenus.
 Technologie avancée : Nous intégrons des technologies de pointe comme l'IA, la blockchain et les applications mobiles pour assurer la sécurité, la transparence et l'efficacité de chaque transaction.
 Soutien au développement durable : Nous offrons des ressources éducatives sur les pratiques agricoles durables et les techniques de gestion des cultures, contribuant ainsi à la préservation de l'environnement et à la résilience des communautés agricoles.
 Sécurité et Confiance : Avec des mesures de sécurité robustes, nous garantissons la confidentialité des données et la sécurité des transactions pour tous nos utilisateurs.
Nos Services
+Abonnements personnalisés : Choisissez parmi nos plans de base, standard et premium pour accéder à des fonctionnalités adaptées à vos besoins spécifiques.
+Outils de gestion des stocks et des commandes : Simplifiez la gestion de votre production et de vos ventes.
+Analyse de données et recommandations personnalisées : Utilisez nos outils analytiques pour optimiser vos opérations et vos stratégies de vente.
Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure pour bâtir ensemble une chaine de valeur agricole durale  en Afrique ! .

Name: Koperasi Desa Merah Putih Krasak Jatibarang
Description:
Tentang Koperasi Desa/Kelurahan Merah Putih
Undang-Undang 1945 Pasal 33 menegaskan bahwa perekonomian Indonesia disusun atas usaha bersama yang didasarkan pada asas kekeluargaan. Presiden Republik Indonesia sangat mendukung segala upaya untuk menggerakkan koperasi di seluruh Indonesia, mencerminkan komitmen pemerintah dalam memperkuat ekonomi kerakyatan.

Pembentukan Koperasi Desa/Kelurahan Merah Putih didorong oleh kebutuhan untuk meningkatkan kesejahteraan ekonomi masyarakat desa melalui pendekatan ekonomi kerakyatan yang berbasis pada prinsip gotong royong, kekeluargaan, dan saling membantu.

Dalam retreat kepala daerah di Akmil Magelang pada 21-28 Februari 2025, Presiden Prabowo menekankan pentingnya pembentukan Koperasi Desa sebagai upaya untuk meningkatkan ketahanan pangan.

Pada Rapat Terbatas di Istana Negara pada 3 Maret 2025, Presiden RI mengumumkan peluncuran 80.000 koperasi desa dengan nama Koperasi Desa/Kelurahan Merah Putih, dan akan dilakukan launching Koperasi Desa/Kelurahan Merah Putih bertepatan pada Hari Koperasi Nasional pada 12 Juli 2025. Inisiatif ini bertujuan untuk memperkuat ekonomi desa dan meningkatkan kesejahteraan masyarakat melalui koperasi.

Name: Densilar
Description:
Densilar was established in February 2017 by the dynamic husband and-wife duo, Khun Zaw and Nang Khin Kyi, who are passionate about growing the company. Under our corporate brand, we house three product brands: Spring Avocado, Hawkam Coffee, and Kham Loi Maw Green Tea. While avocado constitutes a substantial 55% of our sales, with other fresh fruits accounting for 30%, coffee 10% and tea 5%.

Our name, Densilar, draws its origins from the term used by the Pa-O ethnic group to refer to the month of March and this is when Pa-O National Day takes place. Having grown up in a family of farmers in the Southern Shan State’s Hopong region, our founder, Khun Zaw brings a profound understanding of agribusiness. 

We specialise in two primary product lines: avocados and coffee, complemented by two secondary offerings: seasonal fresh fruits and green tea. Since 2020, we have actively participated in border trade with Thailand and India, as well as proudly presenting Myanmar’s agricultural products at prominent expos like Asia Fruits Logistica Expo Bangkok 2022 and Cafe Show Seoul, Korea 2022.

The orchard is surrounded by a forest, which creates a unique and serene setting.

Name: Frutos del Sol S.A
Description:
Who we are

Founded in 2002, FRUTOS DEL SOL S.A. is an agri-food company based in Patagonia, in the Río Negro region of Argentina. We specialize in the production and export of pears and apples for both local and international markets.

On over 24 hectares of orchards, we grow premium-quality fruit with dedication and care, drawing on the ideal climate and fertile soils of the Río Negro Valley.

Certified by Global GAP, we also comply with GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices) and the standards of SENASA (National Service for Agri-Food Health and Quality), ensuring reliable logistics and full traceability.

We are present across Europe, North America, and South America, where we’ve built long-term partnerships with importers and distributors.

At FRUTOS DEL SOL S.A., our mission is to share the freshness and richness of Patagonia through fruit that reflects Argentine know-how and a deep respect for our land. We believe in strong relationships built on trust, transparency, and excellence.

#AgroExport #FreshProduce #MadeInArgentina #FruitIndustry #InternationalTrade

Name: MalkiA Gourmet Harvest
Description:
I started MalkiA Gourmet Harvest with a simple but powerful vision, to bring the same export-grade quality usually reserved for overseas markets directly into South Africa’s top kitchens.

What began as an opportunity to supply a small circle of chefs with premium baby vegetables, micro herbs, and edible flowers quickly became a trusted partnership network across Johannesburg’s most exclusive restaurants, hotels, caterers, and private chefs.

Every tray that leaves our packhouse carries more than just produce, it represents the story of careful planning, consistency, and pride in every detail. From our grow-to-order model to our cold-chain delivery, we ensure that every chef receives ingredients worthy of their plates.

I believe relationships grow businesses. That’s why I personally stay involved from planning to plating, helping clients forecast menus, secure reliability, and build confidence that what they order will arrive fresh, beautiful, and on time, every week.

Today, MalkiA Gourmet Harvest stands for authentic partnership, export-grade freshness, and reliability that chefs can build their menus around.

Let’s connect, whether you’re a chef looking for consistent premium supply, a distributor seeking quality you can depend on, or a partner who shares our belief that excellence starts at the source.

Fresh from our own land

Natural is responsible
Despite the fact that we have all been taught wrong by using artificial fertilizers, pesticides and sometimes antibiotics, we show that using only natural products leads to many solutions in a profitable way.

Belgian is sustainable and transparent

Name: Domaine Picoria
Description:
Au cœur de la Sierra Mágina, en Andalousie, cinq générations de la famille Martos Encinas perpétuent un art ancestral : transformer les olives Picual en or liquide.

Tout a commencé avec l'arrière-arrière-grand-père qui planta les premiers oliviers sur ces pentes escarpées. Chaque génération a apporté sa pierre à l'édifice : l'une perfectionna la récolte manuelle, l'autre maîtrisa l'extraction à froid, une autre encore s'engagea vers l'agriculture biologique.

Aujourd'hui, Marco Martos Encinas incarne cette cinquième génération. Héritier d'un savoir-faire unique, il a choisi de préserver les méthodes traditionnelles tout en obtenant la certification bio. Car pour lui, comme pour ses ancêtres, chaque olive récoltée à la main porte en elle l'âme de la Sierra Mágina.

Name: AquaBotanic Group Limited
Description:
Aquabotanic Group Limited: 
A Sustainable Paradigm in Aquaculture and Indoor Farming 

 Welcome to Aquabotanic Group Limited! 

We're paving the way for a sustainable revolution in aquaculture and indoor farming, aspiring to become industry leaders in eco-friendly practices.

 Our Focus: 
Pioneering intensive recirculation systems that nurture healthy prawn and tilapia. 

We harness the potential of recirculated effluent wastewater to cultivate an array of plants using innovative vertical and indoor growing methods.

 Fish and Prawn Nutrition: 
After being nourished with sustainably produced feeds from IPROTEIN, our prawn and tilapia thrive in a balanced and eco-friendly environment.

 Efficient Use of Resources: 
We maximise resource efficiency by utilizing fish and prawn wastewater as an organic fertiliser for growing micro herbs and various plants. 
It's a closed-loop system that utilises precious water whilst, minimises waste and promotes sustainable farming.

 From Tank to Table: 
Our dedication doesn't stop at thriving aquatic life. The fertilised wastewater nourishes plants suitable for human consumption, embodying a complete and sustainable cycle from aquaculture to fresh produce.

 Join the Sustainable Aquaculture Movement!: 
Stay connected to follow our journey, get insights into aquaculture innovations, and explore opportunities for collaboration.

 Let's Collaborate!: 
Interested in sustainable aquaculture, indoor farming, or sustainable food systems? 

Reach out and let's explore how we can work together to make a difference.

Wij geloven in helder communiceren, strakke planning en kwaliteit waarop je kunt bouwen. Van het eerste stekje tot een volle, bloeiende pot: we leveren wat we beloven – op het juiste moment, in de juiste vorm.

Als familiebedrijf staan we dichtbij onze klanten. We denken mee, schakelen snel en leveren maatwerk voor elke retailer, tuincentrum of groothandel die met kleur en kwaliteit wil werken.

Samen maken we het voorjaar, en elk seizoen, een stukje mooier.

 Bloemenkwekerij Hendrix-Jacobs – Vakmanschap dat bloeit.

Description:

We have developed and registered high-yield, disease-resistant varieties of corn and wheat that are now grown in various agro-climatic regions throughout Georgia.
Today, "Lomtagora" is one of the leading specialized enterprises in the country's sowing industry, with a growing range of activities. The company places significant emphasis on preserving and enhancing local wheat and corn varieties.

Alors que pour consolider le secteur de la transformation agroalimentaire de ces produits céréaliers (farine, pates alimentaire, biscuit...), voie vers l'avenir, il est indispensable de renforcer la production locale.
Chez ABS-Sahel, notre engagement est la production vers la transformation des produits céréalier pour pouvoir proposer aux consommateurs divers produits (bruts ou finis) de qualité conformes aux normes nationales et internationales. La mise en place de cette chaine de production agroalimentaire qui va de la grande culture de blé qualité au stockage en banque alimentaire à l'appui du secteur de l'agro-industrie. Un projet qui permettrait non seulement de contribuer à l'initiative d'une autosuffisance alimentaire de mon pays, mais aussi de valoriser le secteur de la production locale qui fait la fierté de la gastronomie tchadienne.

Name: Peru Corn
Description:
Perucorn es una empresa peruana dedicada a la producción y exportación de una amplia variedad de productos agrícolas, entre ellos el maíz blanco gigante, café verde, habas y superfoods. Fundada en 1996, la empresa ha logrado consolidarse como uno de los principales exportadores de productos agrícolas en Perú gracias a su compromiso con la calidad, la sostenibilidad y la innovación.

Perucorn se enfoca en la producción de productos agrícolas de alta calidad, utilizando prácticas agrícolas sostenibles y técnicas de procesamiento que garantizan la frescura y el sabor de sus productos. La empresa cuenta con certificaciones internacionales como GlobalGAP y HACCP, que aseguran que sus productos cumplen con altos estándares de calidad y seguridad alimentaria. El maíz blanco gigante es uno de los productos estrella de Perucorn. La empresa produce una variedad de maíz de alta calidad, cultivado en campos propios y procesado en instalaciones modernas y equipadas con tecnología de última generación. El maíz blanco gigante se exporta principalmente a mercados de todo el mundo, incluyendo Asia, Europa y América del Norte.

El café verde es otro de los productos destacados de Perucorn. La empresa produce café de alta calidad, cultivado en las regiones de Chanchamayo y Villa Rica en Perú. El café verde se procesa y empaca en instalaciones modernas y se exporta a mercados de todo el mundo, incluyendo Europa y América del Norte.

Las habas también forman parte del portafolio de productos de Perucorn. La empresa produce habas de alta calidad, cultivadas en campos propios y procesadas en instalaciones modernas. Las habas se exportan principalmente a Europa, donde son muy valoradas por su calidad y sabor.

Name: San Miguel Arcángel S.A.
Description:
La factoría San Miguel Arcángel S.A. se constituyó como  sociedad el día 20 de Junio de 1915, teniendo su sede social en la zona conocida por las Fuentecillas, a la salida de Villanueva del Arzobispo dirección a Albacete. En las antiguas instalaciones, se procesaba orujo de diferentes clases, de dos fases, tres fases y prensas.  Ya en la campaña 94/95 el proceso de las almazaras comenzó a renovarse aumentando de manera considerable el porcentaje de entrada de orujo de dos fases (orujo con el alpechín incorporado, conocido también como alperujo). Ello condicionó a la empresa a renovar y adaptarse a las exigencias, quedando incluso las instalaciones pequeñas.
En un principio estaba integrada por 33 socios, de los cuales la mayor parte eran cooperativas y algunos particulares.Las almazaras además de ser de Villanueva del Arzobispo, procedían de Villacarrillo, Sorihuela del Guadalimar, Iznatoraf, Beas de Segura, Santisteban, Quesada, Chilluevar, Torreperogil, entre otras poblaciones.
Hasta el año 2008 ha sido presidente del consejo de administración José María Pastor Bueno, que ha permaneció en el cargo más de cuarenta años. Actualmente lo es Cristóbal Gallego Martínez, presidente de la Cooperativa Nª Sª del Pilar de Villacarrillo.

Seit 20 Jahren gründet sich unser Erfolg im hohen Anspruch an Qualität, Know-how und dem Bestreben, uns künftig noch weiter zu entwickeln.

Our story is one of purpose and shared growth. Witnessing the challenges faced by many local farmers who struggled with prosperity, The Gap Supply was founded with a mission to create a symbiotic relationship. By working directly with farmers, we aim to not only offer top-notch spice products but also to contribute to the prosperity of these hardworking individuals. The goal is simple: to make farmers grow with us, fostering a sustainable and mutually beneficial partnership.

At The Gap Supply, professionalism in handling our operations is paramount. We believe that by ensuring transparency, efficiency, and reliability in our dealings, we can contribute to the success of both our company and the farmers we collaborate with. Name: Goldivanti Coffee
Description:
In Uganda's fertile land so bright,
Coffee beans grow, a precious sight.
But for the farmers, a struggle's real,
Low prices paid, their livelihoods to feel.

They toil and labor, day and night,
To bring forth beans, a shining light.
But fair prices, a distant dream,
Leaves them struggling, with a meager scheme.

Goldivanti Cocoffee, a company true,
Aims to help farmers, with a mission anew.
Fresh and red, their coffee's a delight,
But drying's art, is a crucial sight.

A process so fine, to bring out the best,
To make the coffee, that passes the test.
But knowledge's key, to unlock the way,
To produce quality, every single day.

Single-origin, a flavor so rare,
Unique and rich, beyond compare.
So let's teach everyone, the drying art,
To bring forth the best, in every coffee's heart.

For the farmers' sake, and the coffee's too,
Let's focus on quality, and see it through.
For a brighter future, where all can thrive,
Let's cherish the coffee, and the farmers who strive.

Name: Karland Agarprodukte GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
KARLAND Agrarprodukte GmbH & Co. KG ist ein privates, mittelständiges Familienunternehmen in Heichelheim bei Weimar und seit 1993 am Kartoffelmarkt tätig. KARLAND versteht sich als Dienstleister der Landwirtschaft mit dem Schwerpunkt in der Vermarktung von Speisekartoffeln und Speisezwiebeln. 

Mit seinen regionalen Vertragserzeugern arbeitet KARLAND Hand in Hand. Enge und gute Kooperationen mit den Landwirten gewährleisten beste Qualität und Arbeitsabläufe.
Durch die angewandte Sortenstrategie ist der Anbau hochwertiger Kartoffelsorten gegeben. Dieser kontrollierte Vertragsanbau auf den regionalen Anbauflächen in Thüringen, Sachsen und Sachsen-Anhalt unterliegt einem jährlichen kompletten Wechsel des zertifizierten Pflanzguts.  

Die Kartoffeln werden nach den Richtlinien des kontrolliertem Anbau produziert (regelmäßige Bodenuntersuchungen, Einhaltung der Fruchtfolge, optimierter Einsatz von Dünger und Pflanzenschutzmitteln), anschließend schonend und zum richtigen Zeitpunkt geerntet und in modernen Lagerhäusern eingelagert.

Die Vertragsanbau erfolgt mit ausgewählten Landwirten aus der Region mit entsprechend der Erfahrung in der Erzeugung von Speisekartoffeln und auf ausgewählten Standorten.

Name: EDA Cattle Ranch
Description:
Eda-livestock: Revolutionizing Japanese Wagyu Through Sustainable Practices 
In our pursuit of reshaping the livestock industry, Eda-livestock pioneers sustainable farming practices, ensuring the reliability, health, and deliciousness of our Japanese Wagyu. Our approach is rooted in innovation and a deep understanding of the challenges facing traditional practices.

 Circular Farming: A Commitment to Sustainability 
One key element that sets us apart is our dedication to circular farming. Unlike the conventional industry standard where feed is often imported from China, we've taken a different path. After visiting over 30 cattle ranches across Japan, we identified a gap in the industry – a gap that we bridge with our circular farming approach. We use cattle waste to cultivate crops, creating a self-sustaining ecosystem that not only minimizes waste but also produces high-quality, homegrown feed.

 No Hormones, No Antibiotics: Upholding the Highest Standards 
In our commitment to delivering health, safety, and taste, we reject the use of growth hormones and antibiotics. This natural approach ensures that our Wagyu is free from artificial additives, reflecting our dedication to providing a premium product that prioritizes your well-being.
Join us in our mission to transform the industry, where tradition meets innovation, and where the future of Japanese Wagyu is not just sustainable but exceptional.  

#CircularFarming #SustainableLivestock #EdaLivestockRevolution

Name: Eastern Plains Integrated Farms Ltd
Description:
Eastern Plains Integrated Farms Limited (EPIFL) is an integrated agribusiness enterprise located in Igbariam, Anambra State, Nigeria. The company is currently focused on large-scale poultry production, delivering high-quality poultry products to meet the growing protein needs of Nigerian households and businesses.

EPIFL’s operations are driven by a commitment to excellence, food security, and sustainable agricultural practices. With modern farming infrastructure, efficient production systems, and a dedicated workforce, the company ensures consistent quality and operational efficiency across all stages of its poultry value chain.

Looking ahead, EPIFL is strategically positioned to expand into other critical areas of agriculture, including processed chicken production, fertilizer manufacturing, and other agro-allied ventures. These initiatives are designed to deepen value addition, reduce post-harvest losses, and contribute to Nigeria’s broader agricultural and economic development goals.

Through innovation, strategic partnerships, and a strong focus on sustainability, Eastern Plains Integrated Farms Limited is poised to become a leading player in Nigeria’s agribusiness landscape, driving growth from farm to market.

Name: FB2W Trading
Description:
OUR INSPIRATION
FB2W recognizes that Brazil’s potential transcends its role as one of the world’s largest food producers. With this vision in mind, FB2W was founded to serve as a key facilitator in realizing Brazil’s agricultural calling, acting as one of the vital channels for global trade in this sector.

ABOUT THE COMPANY
FB2W Trading was established in 2019, driven by our passion and vision to leverage the immense potential within the Brazilian agro-sector. Together with a select group of strategic advisors specializing in business ventures and strategic management, we undertook a rigorous six-month market analysis and planning phase. This process confirmed the viability and promise of this project.
We officially launched our operations in November 2019, focusing on establishing partnerships with both sellers and enhancing our sales network. By January 2020, we began active market engagement, supported by key strategic partners. In 2023, we expanded our horizons by entering into a joint venture with a prominent commodities seller, solidifying our presence within the Brazilian market.
Today, FB2W Trading is part of the prestigious American Swiss Group, a global leader in financial services, and operates within both the commodity and financial services sectors, offering secure and profitable solutions across international markets.

Name: Hacienda Packing
Description:
Hacienda Packing was established in 1945 in Chimayo, New Mexico, and currently operates as a produce wholesaler in Albuquerque. Hacienda Packing sells a variety of produce including avocados, citrus, jalapeño peppers, squash, tomatoes, onions, and potatoes. Hacienda Packing specializes in the sourcing, packing, and distribution of a variety of potatoes including russets, sweet potatoes, fingerlings, yukon golds, and red potatoes.

Over more than 75 years of operations, Hacienda Packing has established itself firmly as the largest wholesaler of potatoes in New Mexico. Hacienda Packing is strategically located in Albuquerque, New Mexico in close proximity to many of its largest food service and grocery customers. Hacienda Packing sources the highest quality produce available, the majority of which comes from the potato farming community of Monte Vista, Colorado. The high plains valley of Monte Vista cultivates over 76,000 acres of potatoes and produces more than 23.8 million hundred-weight of potatoes annually. Hacienda Packing sources approximately 200,000 hundred-weight of russet potatoes annually from Monte Vista’s farmers for distribution in New Mexico and El Paso, Texas.

Name: Mesa
Description:
Mesa is the place where we get together to make it happen, it means Table in Spanish and Portuguese, we bring carbon emitters and removers to the same kitchen table. We aspire to be a place where carbon farmers, climate entrepreneurs, citizens and corporations can create genuine connections with each other to create a biodiverse and healthy world together. 

We regenerate land and oceans and this removes the surplus Co2 from the air. We believe that through this regeneration we will create and live in a biodiverse world with a healthy living standard. By scaling the regenerative practices of farmers and nature based carbon removal entrepreneurs.

Our aim is to help as many small scale farmers, starting at 0,5 hectares, to be able to join the voluntary carbon market, as many small lands together covers a lot of the lands and water on earth. Small farmers currently with little to no support provide 40% of our food with only 20% of the land, imagine what they can do with your support.

We facilitate the sales of their credits so that they can focus on what they do best. 
Store carbon, regenerate land and prevent climate change disasters from getting worse.

Name: Distillerie des Monts du Matin
Description:
La Distillerie des Monts du Matin est une entreprise familiale implantée depuis 1975 dans le nord de la Drôme. Forte de son ancrage agricole sur plus de 300 hectares, elle s’est spécialisée dans la culture de plantes aromatiques et médicinales.

Cette évolution a favorisé des partenariats durables avec des agriculteurs locaux partageant nos valeurs.

Producteur et distillateur, la distillerie élabore des huiles essentielles 100 % pures, naturelles et de haute qualité. Toutes nos huiles essentielles et hydrolats proviennent de cultures locales rigoureusement sélectionnées pour leur qualité, leur traçabilité et la stabilité de leur approvisionnement.

Le suivi qualité et la démarche HACCP sont assurés par un prestataire externe spécialisé.

Certifiée en agriculture biologique par ECOCERT (FR-BIO-01), la distillerie garantit des pratiques respectueuses de l’environnement.

Notre mission : produire durablement, avec exigence, passion et respect de notre territoire. N’hésitez pas à nous contacter pour en savoir plus. 

---
 
Distillerie des Monts du Matin is a family-owned business established in 1975 in the north of the Drôme region, in southeastern France. With over 300 hectares of agricultural land, the company has specialized in the cultivation of aromatic and medicinal plants.

This evolution has enabled long-term partnerships with local farmers who share our values.

As both producer and distiller, the company creates 100% pure, natural, and high-quality essential oils. All our essential oils and hydrosols come from local crops carefully selected for their quality, traceability, and consistent supply.

Quality control and the HACCP process are overseen by a specialized external service provider.

Certified organic by ECOCERT (FR-BIO-01), the distillery ensures environmentally responsible and sustainable practices.

Our mission: to produce with high standards, passion, and deep respect for our land and region.
Feel free to contact us for more information.

Name: Natu Agro Udyog
Description:
Nurturing a Sustainable Tomorrow through Rooted Innovation.

At Natu Agro Udyog, we believe that the future of global food security lies in our past. Founded on the vision of our co-founder, Milind Natu, we are dedicated to transforming agriculture into a sustainable, technology-driven profession. We bridge the gap between ancient indigenous wisdom and modern agricultural science to restore soil health, empower farmers, and nourish communities worldwide.

Our Mission To create a rooted agricultural ecosystem that revitalizes the earth. From our origins on a small Indian farm to managing global plantations, our mission remains fixed: Purity, Purpose, and Precision.

What We Do We specialize in high-quality, certified organic farming solutions designed to improve soil fertility and crop yield naturally. Our offerings include:

Precision Manure Solutions: Naturally bacterial and fungal-treated cow dung manure that restores essential microbial life to the fields.

Natural Soil Enrichment: Premium Vermicompost and bio-soil enhancers created through ethical, earth-friendly processes.

Natural Crop Protection: Fast-acting Vermi Wash Liquid that acts as a potent nutrient delivery agent and natural pest repellent.

Contract Farming & Land Management: Within a 50 km radius of Pune, we partner with landowners to transform underutilized land into thriving, eco-friendly plantations.

Why Natu Agro Udyog?  Global Footprint: We are a trusted export partner for high-quality organic inputs, serving markets in the USA, Maldives, Brazil, and beyond.  Innovation Meets Tradition: We leverage decades of agricultural expertise to ensure an optimal balance between traditional methods and the latest bio-technology.  Sustainability at Core: Every product we manufacture is a conscious effort to eliminate harmful chemicals and promote environmental stewardship.

Join the Green Revolution Whether you are a commercial farmer, a home gardener, or a landowner looking for sustainable development

Name: AQUATE.id
Description: Agriculture and Aquaculture using Aquaponics is an innovative industry that integrates the cultivation of crops and the farming of aquatic organisms in a symbiotic environment. In this system, plants and fish coexist, benefiting each other through a natural nutrient cycle. Waste produced by the fish provides essential nutrients for the plants, which, in turn, help purify the water for the fish. This sustainable and resource-efficient method not only enhances crop and fish yields but also minimizes environmental impact. The Agriculture and Aquaculture using Aquaponics industry represents a forward-thinking approach to food production, promoting ecological balance and increased productivity.

Name: Meegroeidijk Equipment (MGDE)
Description:
In Nederland staan we voor de uitdaging om onze dijken te versterken en te onderhouden, die ons beschermen tegen wateroverlast. Traditionele methoden van dijkverhoging schieten echter tekort op thema’s als duurzaamheid en kosteneffectiviteit. Het project Meegroeidijk biedt een innovatieve oplossing: het gebruik van slib uit de Waddenzee als ophoogmiddel, een concept dat ook wel bekend staat als ‘Building with Nature’.

Het doel van het MDGE-project is om een systeem te ontwikkelen dat slib slim en gecontroleerd op dijken kan aanbrengen zonder deze dijken te hoeven ontgraven of uitgebreide logistieke operaties op te moeten zetten voor de aanvoer van zand. De projectpartners Klaei B.V., teQ Services, Friese Draad, Waaksma, en stichting Deltares, hopen met dit project een werkend prototype te ontwikkelen dat op grote schaal kan worden toegepast. Het project wordt mogelijk gemaakt door de ‘Versnellingsagenda’, een subsidieregeling van de regio Noordoost Fryslân.

Met Meegroeidijk Equipment wordt een belangrijke stap gezet naar een duurzamere en effectievere aanpak van dijkversterking, waarbij innovatie en milieuvriendelijkheid hand in hand gaan.

Phonic Trap: Number 1 in soundproof ducts

Resulting from numerous research and patent applications, Phonic Trap effectively reduces the noise level of air flows (air extractor, ventilator, air conditioning, vacuum cleaner, etc.).

Concerned about environmental standards, High Pro Shop has sourced raw materials that respect the REACH standard.

In addition to respecting the European and environmental standards, the Phonic Trap sheath is 100% French made.

Name: Merkkado PH
Description:
Merkkado PH is a technology-based company that offers a platform for local farmers to sell their produce outside conventional markets.

The company's founders, who began their careers in the IT industry, started their IT company in 2013 and have since become innovators.

Merkkado PH was born from the founders' desire to create a solution for farmers who were being haggled and not receiving fair payment for their hard work.

The application provides a direct connection between farmers and consumers, enabling farmers to sell a variety of raw produce from meat to vegetables.

Merkkado PH eliminates food source issues, which makes food more accessible and cheaper for buyers while allowing farmers to sell their products at a fair price, thus benefiting the local economy.

The founders also allocate a portion of their revenue to supporting farmers by helping them start their own farms or funding projects and purchasing seeds.

Farmers can quickly sign up and start selling their products using Merkkado PH, which provides tools to manage sales, track inventory, and communicate with buyers.

The team behind Merkkado PH is dedicated to providing a user-friendly experience and works closely with farmers to understand their needs.

Merkkado PH is more than just a technology-based company it is a movement that helps bridge gaps and create a sustainable and equitable food system through innovation.

In Africa, nearly 80% of the population depends on agriculture, yet farmers remain poor due to unfair pricing and limited market access. Middlemen exploit them, while consumers struggle to find fresh, organic, and affordable food.

At Ekizochikko Harvests, we are revolutionizing agriculture by eliminating brokers and directly linking farmers with consumers through an online platform and delivery service.

Our Solution

 Empowering Farmers – Direct market access, fair prices, and real-time insights into demand, quality, and trends.
 Fresh & Healthy Food for Consumers – High-quality farm produce delivered affordably to doorsteps.
 Seamless Online Ordering & Delivery – A user-friendly platform for hassle-free shopping and farm-fresh deliveries.

This direct connection creates a sustainable food ecosystem, ensuring better income for farmers and healthier choices for consumers.

Join us in reshaping Africa’s food industry—where farmers thrive, and people eat better.

Name: Baumgartner-Pampigny
Description:
Fondée en 1976 par Roger Baumgartner, l’entreprise spécialisée dans l’univers des machines agricoles n’a cessé d’évoluer depuis 45 ans. De petite structure dédiée au conseil, au dépannage et à la vente, elle est devenue une société reconnue dans le milieu et s’est agrandie pour proposer un espace showroom de 150m2 et un atelier de 1000m2.


Un showroom de 150 m2 pour découvrir les machines
Notre espace d’exposition rassemble les derniers modèles de machines et matériels agricoles disponibles à l’achat, parmi un vaste de choix de grandes marques. Nos équipes sont formées pour répondre en détail et avec précision à toutes vos demandes, vous conseiller sur le choix de tel équipement et apporter l’éclairage nécessaire sur l’univers des espaces verts. Nous sommes à votre disposition, que vous soyez un professionnel ou un particulier.

Un atelier de 1000 m2 pour toutes vos réparations
La mécanique agricole est notre ADN. Depuis plus de 45 ans, nous entretenons, réparons, dépannons ces machines en constante évolution. Au fil des décennies, nous nous sommes adaptés aux nouvelles technologies et disposons aujourd’hui d’un atelier de 1000m2 et de l’équipement dernier cri nécessaire pour tous types de maintenances et réparations sur vos machines agricoles et outillages.

Banc de test de freins agréé
Nous avons acquis un banc de test de freins pour camions de transport et remorques agricoles agréé qui nous permet d’installer et de régler avec précision le système de freinage de vos machines. Les contraintes techniques sur ce point étant de plus en plus exigeantes au regard du trafic routier actuel, nous sommes équipés d’un matériel de pointe pour réaliser l’entretien de vos freins.

Global Structure: In 2020, we established Shanghai Nanzhuan Trading Co., Ltd., and Zhejiang Regent Food Technology Co., Ltd. These entities focus on international trade, e-commerce operations, and brand management, respectively, forming a complete farm-to-market industrial chain.
Direct Sourcing from Global Origins

Siamo i primi a studiare le esigenze della pianta per preparare le soluzioni ideali utilizzando principi attivi naturali immediatamente assimilabili dalla pianta.

Gli studi e le nostre conoscenze ci confermano come la pianta non riesca ad ottenere il massimo dei benefici somministrando semplici concimi inorganici e minerali.

I risultati che abbiamo ottenuto sono frutto di una continua ricerca, di una costante innovazione di processo e di prodotto, del rispetto, della cura e dell’attenzione verso l’ambiente.

La nostra solidità, la nostra credibilità e la nostra volontà di miglioramento continuo ci consentono di competere in Italia e all’estero offrendo ai nostri clienti reali possibilità di crescita economica e professionale.

Ciò che siamo si deve all’impegno, alla competenza e alla passione di tante persone che hanno lavorato per raggiungere un duplice obiettivo: fare di Naturaleza un’azienda solida e credibile e specialmente fare agricoltura in modo corretto, rispettando il rapporto che unisce l’uomo e la terra.

Name: Solar Farm Thailand
Description:
Solar Farm – Premium Cannabis Cultivation | EU GACP Certified | Export-Ready

At Solar Farm, we specialize in cultivating premium-grade cannabis under EU GACP-certified standards, ensuring consistency, compliance, and quality for the global medical and wellness market.

Located in Thailand, our fully indoor-controlled facility produces 150–200 kg of large flowers and 30–50 kg of by-products monthly, including trims and popcorn buds. Every plant is hand-inspected, grown under consistent light cycles, and managed by a skilled cultivation team committed to excellence from seed to final product.

Our sustainability focus includes 432 solar panels generating ~200 kWh of clean energy, soil recycling to support fruit trees such as mango and lemon, and community initiatives like providing free access to running and cycling tracks for locals.

With an export license and a proven track record of supplying international distributors—especially those serving Australia and other regulated medical markets—we are dedicated to delivering clean, lab-tested cannabis that meets the highest global standards.

What sets us apart:

EU GACP Certified & Export Licensed

Consistent quality backed by lab-tested compliance

Sustainability-driven operations

Skilled cultivation team with hands-on quality control

Proven experience in medical and export markets

Our Mission: To lead the way in sustainable, compliant cannabis cultivation in Thailand—bridging premium quality with responsible practices for the benefit of patients, partners, and our community.

Name: Los Greengos
Description:
Chez Los Greengos, nous avons développé une passion pour le cannabis depuis notre plus jeune âge, appréciant le goût, l'odeur et l'apparence des nombreuses variétés. Cette passion pour la culture du cannabis a été renforcée par nos nombreux voyages en Suisse et aux Pays-Bas, véritable hauts lieux de la culture du cannabis.

En fondant Los Greengos, nous avons voulu partager notre passion avec le plus grand nombre, en proposant des produits de qualité supérieure, cultivés avec soin et élaborés avec les meilleurs ingrédients. Nous sommes fiers de notre savoir-faire et de notre engagement à offrir les meilleures variétés de fleurs de CBD à nos clients.

Nous avons été fascinés par les nombreuses propriétés de cette plante et les différentes façons dont elle peut être utilisée pour améliorer la qualité de vie. Nous avons passé de nombreuses heures à explorer les différentes variétés, à apprendre sur les différentes méthodes de culture et à découvrir les différents usages médicaux et récréatifs de cette plante incroyable.

Nos voyages aux Pays-Bas nous ont donné l'opportunité de découvrir la culture du cannabis, de rencontrer les producteurs les plus talentueux et d'apprendre les meilleures pratiques en matière de production et de culture. Cette expérience nous a donné la confiance nécessaire pour fonder Los Greengos et partager notre passion avec le monde entier.

En fondant notre marque, nous avons voulu offrir des produits de qualité supérieure, cultivés avec soin et élaborés avec les meilleurs ingrédients. Nous sommes fiers de notre savoir-faire et de notre engagement à offrir les meilleures variétés de fleurs de CBD à nos clients. Nous croyons fermement en la puissance du CBD pour améliorer la vie des gens et nous sommes déterminés à partager cette connaissance avec le monde entier.

Los Greengos est une entreprise passionnée par la nature et le bien-être. Nous proposons une gamme de fleurs de CBD de haute qualité sous notre marque reconnue.

Dal 1972, coltiviamo la passione per il giardinaggio.

Terricci Mechelli è un'azienda italiana leader nella produzione di terricci e ammendanti di alta qualità. La nostra mission è offrire soluzioni innovative per la cura del verde, nel rispetto dell'ambiente e delle persone.

I nostri valori:

Qualità: Selezioniamo con cura le materie prime e controlliamo rigorosamente ogni fase del processo produttivo per garantire terricci e ammendanti di altissima qualità.
Innovazione: Ci impegniamo a ricercare e sviluppare nuove soluzioni per soddisfare le esigenze in continua evoluzione del mercato del giardinaggio.
Sostenibilità: Promuoviamo un giardinaggio responsabile e sostenibile, nel rispetto dell'ambiente e delle risorse naturali.
La nostra gamma di prodotti:

Terricci Mechelli offre una risposta completa per tutte le esigenze di giardinaggio:

Terricci universali: Adatti a tutti i tipi di piante, ideali per il rinvaso e la semina.
Terricci specifici: Per soddisfare le esigenze di diverse tipologie di piante, come ad esempio agrumi, acidofile, orticoltura e tappeti erbosi.
Ammendanti: Per migliorare la fertilità e la struttura del terreno.
Perché scegliere Terricci Mechelli:

Oltre 50 anni di esperienza: La nostra azienda vanta una lunga tradizione nel settore del giardinaggio, sinonimo di competenza e affidabilità.
Qualità garantita: Materie prime di alta qualità e rigorosi controlli di produzione garantiscono l'eccellenza dei nostri prodotti.
Vasta gamma di soluzioni: Offriamo una risposta completa per tutte le esigenze di giardinaggio, dai terricci universali a quelli specifici per le diverse colture.
Servizio clienti eccellente: Un team di esperti è a tua disposizione per consigli e supporto personalizzati.

Pacho Setas is an agro-food venture based in Pacho, Cundinamarca, dedicated to the 100% organic cultivation of functional mushrooms such as oyster mushrooms (Pleurotus ostreatus), lion’s mane (Hericium erinaceus), and reishi (Ganoderma lucidum).

For over 4 years, we’ve been promoting conscious and natural eating by offering products that are chemical-free, agroecological, and environmentally responsible.

In addition to our fresh mushrooms, we also transform our harvest into innovative and healthy food products:
- Dehydrated oyster mushrooms
- Oyster mushroom antipastos (preserved in jars)
- Oyster mushroom flour (perfect for gluten-free pasta, breads, and baking mixes)
- Lion’s mane mushroom flour, rich in bioactive compounds that support cognitive health

All our products are 100% natural, with no additives or preservatives, ready to be integrated into your daily diet in a functional and delicious way.

Name: Bäuerliche Bezugs- und Absatzgenossenschaft Rhedebrügge eG
Description:
Kompetent, zuverlässig und fest in der Region verwurzelt – und das seit über 120 Jahren:Das ist unsere Bäuerliche Bezugs- und Absatzgenossenschaft Rhedebrügge. Wir sind nicht nur ein verlässlicher Partner für die Landwirte in unserer Region, sondern auch ein regionaler Versorger mit einem vielfältigen Sortiment. Überzeugen Sie sich selbst in unserem vollständig renovierten Markt.
Bei uns finden Sie alles – vom Heimtierbedarf und Heimtierfutter über Werkzeug bis hin zu Düngemitteln und Pflanzenschutz. Darüber hinaus sind wir ein klassischer Landhandel: Mit unserem eigenen Sackwaren-Lkw und zwei weiteren Fahrzeugen für Futtermittel beliefern wir unsere Kunden zuverlässig direkt vor Ort.
Unsere Genossenschaft zählt mehr als 150 Mitglieder, die basisdemokratisch mitentscheiden, wie sich der Betrieb weiterentwickelt. Auch nach 120 Jahren sind wir noch eigenständig – das schafft Nähe und Vertrauen. Bei uns sind Sie nicht einfach nur eine Nummer. Sie finden immer einen persönlichen Ansprechpartner, der Sie individuell berät.

Name: Trà Phúc Sang
Description:
Công ty TNHH Trà Phúc Sang tự hào là đơn vị cung cấp nguyên liệu pha chế hàng đầu tại Việt Nam, đặc biệt trong lĩnh vực trà và cà phê. Với sứ mệnh mang đến những sản phẩm chất lượng vượt trội, Trà Phúc Sang luôn tinh chọn nguyên liệu từ các vùng đất nổi tiếng như Tây Nguyên – nơi hội tụ tinh hoa của thiên nhiên và con người. Chúng tôi cam kết đem đến sản phẩm chất lượng cao nhất, đồng hành cùng chủ quán trong hành trình tạo nên những thức uống hoàn hảo, khởi nghiệp F&B thành công.

Trà Phúc Sang | Sự lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho ngành F&B
Với danh mục sản phẩm đa dạng và chất lượng vượt trội, Trà Phúc Sang luôn là lựa chọn hàng đầu của các quán cà phê, trà sữa, và chuỗi cửa hàng thức uống tại Việt Nam:
- Trà cao cấp: Từ trà đen, trà xanh, đến trà ô long, mỗi sản phẩm đều được chế biến kỹ lưỡng để giữ trọn vẹn hương vị tự nhiên.
- Cà phê nguyên chất: Được rang mộc 100%, mang đến những nốt hương đậm đà, đắng dịu và hậu vị ngọt, chuẩn gu thưởng thức của người Việt.

Hành trình đồng hành cùng khách hàng
Tại Trà Phúc Sang, chúng tôi hiểu rằng mỗi khách hàng đều có nhu cầu và mong muốn riêng biệt. Vì vậy, chúng tôi không chỉ cung cấp sản phẩm mà còn hỗ trợ tối đa trong hành trình kinh doanh của bạn:
- Tư vấn lựa chọn sản phẩm phù hợp: Đội ngũ chuyên gia luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ bạn tìm kiếm nguyên liệu tối ưu cho từng món thức uống.
- Hỗ trợ khởi nghiệp ngành F&B: Chúng tôi cung cấp thông tin về nguyên liệu, công thức pha chế và bí quyết kinh doanh để giúp bạn thành công trong lĩnh vực này.
- Cam kết chất lượng: Tất cả sản phẩm của Trà Phúc Sang đều được kiểm định kỹ lưỡng, đảm bảo chất lượng đồng đều trong từng gói trà và từng hạt cà phê.

Name: Amara's Pure Earth
Description:
Welcome to Amara's Pure Earth, where nature's bounty meets sustainable living.

At Amara's Pure Earth, we are dedicated to bringing you the finest quality organic rice and millet straight from our farm to your table. Our journey began with a passion for organic farming and a commitment to preserving the Earth's natural goodness.

Nestled amidst serene landscapes, our farm is a testament to our belief in sustainable agriculture. We cultivate rice and millet using eco-friendly practices, ensuring that each harvest is abundant and free from harmful chemicals.

From the fertile soil to the golden fields, our farm is a sanctuary of purity, where every grain is grown with care and every crop is nurtured with love. Our commitment to organic farming extends beyond just a method; it's a way of life that respects the Earth and honors its gifts.

At Amara's Pure Earth, we believe in the power of nature to nourish both body and soul. That's why we offer a range of wholesome products, from organic rice and millet to artisanal goods crafted with care. Each item is a celebration of nature's bounty, meticulously grown and thoughtfully curated to bring joy to your plate.

Join us on our journey towards a greener, healthier future. Experience the goodness of Amara's Pure Earth and taste the difference that nature makes. Together, let's sow the seeds of sustainability and harvest a brighter tomorrow.

Name: MIEL DE MONTFORT
Description:
Beekeeper & Artisan Producer | Advocate for Biodiversity & Sustainable Beekeeping

We produce bold, characterful honeys and authentic treasures of the hive — harvested locally with deep respect for bees and biodiversity. 
Our honeys reflect the unique flora of the Gresivaudan Valley in the Alps, crafted without compromise.

Being a beekeeper is more than producing and selling honey. It’s a year-round commitment to the care of colonies, understanding natural cycles, monitoring ecosystems, and fighting threats like pesticides, parasites, and climate change. It's also about education, transmission, and promoting sustainability.

We believe in responsible beekeeping that preserves pollinator health and supports ecological balance. Every jar of honey we produce tells a story — of nature, patience, and purpose.

Let’s connect if you share a passion for sustainability, natural products, or the incredible world of bees.

mieldemontfort@gmail.com

Name: Marschallfeed
Description:
Seit 2012 produzieren wir bei [Ihr Unternehmen] Swiss Deluxe Haylage in praktischen 18-kg-Packungen. Unser Futter ist ein wahrer Genuss für Pferde und Pferdehalter gleichermaßen. Hier ist, was uns auszeichnet:

 Hoher Rohfaseranteil: Unsere Futtermittel fördern die Kautätigkeit und Speichelbildung bei Pferden, was sich äußerst positiv auf deren Verdauung auswirkt. Wir verstehen die Bedeutung einer gesunden Verdauung für die Leistungsfähigkeit und das Wohlbefinden Ihrer Pferde.

 Staubarmes Futter: Bei uns setzen wir auf staubarme Futtermittel, um die freie Atmung Ihrer Pferde zu unterstützen. Swiss Deluxe Haylage eignet sich sogar für Heuallergiker, sodass Sie sich keine Sorgen um die Gesundheit Ihrer Tiere machen müssen.

 Qualitativ hochstehende Nährstoffe: Unsere Futtermittel sind reich an essentiellen Nährstoffen, was Ihnen die Möglichkeit gibt, Kraftfutter einzusparen und gleichzeitig die Gesundheit Ihrer Pferde zu fördern.

Wir sind stolz darauf, hochwertige Futtermittel für Pferde herzustellen, die die Bedürfnisse Ihrer Tiere in den Mittelpunkt stellen. Unsere Swiss Deluxe Haylage ist nicht nur eine Nahrung, sondern ein Beitrag zur Gesundheit und Vitalität Ihrer Pferde. Kontaktieren Sie uns noch heute, um mehr über unsere Produkte und wie sie die Leistung und das Wohlbefinden Ihrer Pferde steigern können, zu erfahren.

Name: Retroaster
Description:
At Retroaster, we take pride in sourcing our exceptional coffee from the heart of Bangladesh’s Chittagong Hill Tracts. This unique region, encompassing the picturesque hill districts of Bandarban, Khagrachari, and Rangamati, provides the perfect environment for cultivating two renowned coffee varieties: Arabica and Robusta.

The favorable weather conditions and rich, fertile soil of these high-altitude areas result in coffee beans with distinct, rich flavors and aromatic profiles. By partnering with local farmers who employ sustainable and fair trade practices, we ensure that every batch of beans is harvested with care and respect for the land.

Our expert roasters then bring out the full potential of these beans, crafting a coffee experience that is both distinctive and exceptional. With Retroaster, you enjoy more than just a cup of coffee—you savor the essence of Bangladesh’s renowned coffee-growing regions in every sip.

Discover the vibrant flavors of Chittagong Hill Tracts with Retroaster, where tradition, quality, and passion come together in every brew.

Our products are carefully harvested and processed using traditional methods to preserve their natural properties and nutrients. We adhere to strict quality control standards to deliver a product that is both effective and beneficial for various applications.

We source our inputs from rural farmers and supply to urban cosmetic and hospitality companies and supermarkets within Africa and around the world. Our aim is to create efficiency within Ghana’s food supply chain by bridging the gap between rural production and urban demand through the supply of quality, traceable and safe agricultural products to our customers.

We work closely with a large network of smallholder farmers to supply our organic nut butters and oils which also include, Shea butter, Cocoa Butter, Kokum butter  as well as Coconut and Palmnut oil and sell to consumers at designated markets around the world.

Our vision is to create market solutions and build resilience for smallholder farmers in order to end food security challenges especially in the Northern parts of Ghana.

Name: Agrovitae Vof
Description:
Over Agrovitae:
Agrovitae is gespecialiseerd in de verkoop en het advies van bladmeststoffen en biostimulanten, gericht op het optimaliseren van de gezondheid en groei van fruitteelt- en boomkwekerijgewassen. Wij bieden telers hoogwaardige producten en deskundig advies om hun gewassen te ondersteunen, de opbrengsten te verhogen en een duurzamere teelt te realiseren.

Onze Producten & Diensten:

Bladvoeding & Biostimulanten:
 Agrovitae levert een breed scala aan bladmeststoffen en biostimulanten die bijdragen aan de gezondheid van de plant, de fotosynthese optimaliseren en de weerstand tegen plagen en ziektes verbeteren. Onze producten bevorderen gezonde bladontwikkeling, betere vruchtzetting en hogere vruchtkwaliteit.

Advies op maat:
 Wij bieden deskundig advies over de toepassing van bladmeststoffen en biostimulanten, afgestemd op de specifieke behoeften van uw gewassen en bedrijfsomstandigheden. Dit zorgt voor maximale effectiviteit en rendement.

Optimalisatie van teeltomstandigheden:Door middel van strategische bemesting en het gebruik van biostimulanten helpen wij telers om de bodemgezondheid te verbeteren en de groei van hun gewassen te ondersteunen, wat leidt tot hogere opbrengsten en een gezonde fruitteelt.

Training & Educatie:
 Agrovitae biedt trainingen aan over het gebruik van bladmeststoffen en biostimulanten, evenals de nieuwste trends in de agrarische sector. Dit helpt telers om geïnformeerde keuzes te maken voor hun teelt.

Productadvies en Demonstraties:
Wij bieden ook productdemo’s aan voor telers, zodat zij de effectiviteit van onze producten in hun eigen situatie kunnen ervaren voordat ze een keuze maken.

Waarom kiezen voor Agrovitae?
Met onze diepgaande kennis van de fruitteelt en ons uitgebreide aanbod van bladmeststoffen en biostimulanten, zorgen we ervoor dat uw gewassen de juiste voedingsstoffen ontvangen voor optimale groei en rendement. Onze producten zijn ontworpen om de efficiëntie van uw teelt te verhogen.

Description:
At BalramKrishna, we are passionate about promoting sustainable agriculture, preserving local cow breeds, and providing access to high-quality organic agricultural products and A2 milk/dairy. Our mission is to foster a healthier and more sustainable future by connecting consumers with the goodness of nature.

With a deep-rooted commitment to organic farming, we work closely with dedicated farmers who follow sustainable practices to cultivate a wide range of organic fruits, vegetables, grains, spices, and herbs. Our focus on quality ensures that our customers receive fresh and nutrient-rich produce that is free from harmful chemicals and pesticides.

In addition to organic agricultural products, we offer a selection of A2 milk/dairy products derived from Indian local cow breeds known for their A2 protein. These products, including milk, ghee, butter, and cheese, provide a wholesome and nourishing experience for our consumers.

What sets us apart is our dedication to the preservation of local cow breeds, which play a vital role in our cultural heritage and ecosystem. By supporting BalramKrishna, you are not only choosing healthier and sustainable products but also contributing to the conservation of these magnificent cow breeds.

We are committed to transparency, fair trade, and fostering strong relationships with our farmers and customers. Through our reliable supply chain, we ensure that our customers can access fresh and high-quality products conveniently, delivered right to their doorstep.

Join us on this journey towards a healthier lifestyle and a greener planet. Connect with us to stay updated on the latest news, product launches, and sustainable farming initiatives. Together, let's make a positive impact on our health, communities, and the environment.

#BalramKrishna #OrganicFarming #A2Milk #Sustainability #LocalCowBreeds

Name: Virdigrow international Ltd
Description:
Virdigrow International Ltd is a Nigerian agribusiness company engaged in the sourcing and export of raw and dried farm products to global markets. We work directly with local farmers and cooperatives to ensure access to clean, quality-assured agricultural commodities that meet export standards.

Our core offerings include dried split ginger, hibiscus flower, sesame seeds, chili pepper, and cassava-based products, all sourced responsibly from Nigeria’s rich agricultural regions. In addition to exports, we provide drying services for other suppliers and aggregators—helping them meet international quality and moisture specifications.

We are registered with the Nigerian Export Promotion Council (NEPC) and operate with a strong commitment to compliance, transparency, and sustainability. As we grow, our long-term vision is to move beyond raw commodity trade into direct agro-processing for consumer markets, enhancing value, shelf life, and market readiness of Nigerian farm produce.

At Virdigrow, we aim to be a reliable partner in the agricultural value chain—connecting Nigerian farmers to the world through integrity, quality, and innovation.

Name: Back Four Flower Farm
Description:
Back Four Flower Farm is a small but mighty you-pick flower farm in Lake Preston, South Dakota, growing joy one bloom at a time.

Founded and tended by Morgan Larson, our farm is rooted in a simple belief: something small and intentional can grow into something deeply meaningful. We grow a rainbow of blooms using sustainable, hands-on practices that care for the earth and our community.

From mid-July to early September, our fields open for you-pick nights where visitors can wander, cut their own bouquets, and take home a piece of the prairie. We also host private you-pick events for groups, celebrations, and company outings, as well as offer seasonal bouquets and farm stand arrangements.

The name “Back Four” is a nod to Morgan’s childhood on this very acreage, where the small pasture behind the barn was lovingly called “the back four” instead of the normal "back forty." After fifteen years away, she and her husband returned in 2024 with their son to grow something new in a place that was already home.

At Back Four Flower Farm, we are here to cultivate more than petals and stems. We are here to grow joy, connection, and beauty worth sharing.

VISI

Sehingga dapat meningkatkan perekonomian dan mewujudkan kesejahteraan bersama.“

MISI
1. Melakukan pengembangan sumber daya manusia secara kontinyu dalam upaya menciptakan karyawan yang berkulaitas dan profesional di bidangnya.
2. Melakukan upgrade teknologi pertanian dan peternakan untuk meningkatkan kualitas dan kuantitas hasil panen.
3. Menyediakan produk-produk berizin dengna kualitas terbaik.
4. Melakukan komunikasi secara aktif dengan petani dan peternak dalam rangka mencari solusi terbaik terhadap permasalahan yang dihadapi.
5. Menyediakan sistem informasi canggih yang mudah diakses klien dengan manajemen terbuka.
6. Mengedepankan program padat karya demi kesejahteraan bagi seluruh rakyat Indonesia.
7. Memberikan kesempatan kepada semua lapisan masyarakat untuk mendapatkan pasif income dari bisnis pertanian dan peternakan.
8. Mendistribusikan produk pertanian dan peternakan secara cepat dan tepat kepada konsumen.
9. Menghadirkan Klinik Pertanian dan Peternakan di semua wilayah sebagai tempat penyediaan produk dan rujukan pertama untuk berkonsultasi serta memberikan pendampingan gratis kepada petani.

Name: Good Market
Description:
Farm-to-Kitchen Sourcing System von überschüssigem Bio-Gemüse für professionelle Großküchen in der Schweiz.

Was wir machen? Wir SYSTEMATISIEREN das Finden.

 30% jeder Ernte bleibt auf Schweizer Höfen liegen. Zu groß. Zu klein. Zu krumm. Überschüssig.

 Wir gehen zu den Bauern, aggregieren dieses Volumen (Fokus Bio) und liefern es Just-in-Time in professionelle Großküchen.

DAS ERGEBNIS FÜR CONTRACT CATERER

1 ESG-REPORTING & STORYTELLING 
Wir schließen die Datenlücke in Ihrer Supply Chain: → Konkrete CO2-Einsparung pro Lieferung → Regionale Beschaffungsquote (Zürich) → Authentische Story für den Gast ("Von Bauer X, statt aus dem Grosshandel")

2 KOSTENEFFIZIENZ 
Wir machen Bio für Grossküchen endlich wirtschaftlich. Anstatt teurer Premium-Ware nutzen wir optisch nicht-normiertes Gemüse ("Food Save"). Das Ergebnis: Sie senken Ihren Wareneinsatz um ca. 15% gegenüber dem klassischen Bio-Grosshandel – ohne Kompromisse bei Geschmack oder Nährwerten.

3 SKALIERBARKEIT 
Kein Einzelkämpfer-Tum. Wir bündeln die Region für Sie. Wir haben das Modell bereits validiert (z.B. Eldora, ZFV Mensa Uni Irchel) und skalieren nun für 2026.

 "Das Sustainable Development Goal [...] konnte im Gastronomiesektor allein nicht erreicht werden, aber mit der zusätzlichen Verwertung von nicht-verkäuflichem Gemüse schon." – C. Beretta, ETH Zürich (Diss. No. 25648)

 Lassen Sie uns sprechen. Ich vergebe aktuell die Slots für unseren Region Zürich Pilot 2026 (12 Betriebe).

 WAS KUNDEN SAGEN
„Als Großbetrieb in der Stadt Zürich sind wir stolz darauf, jede Woche saisonales Gemüse beziehen zu dürfen [...] Saisonalität und Regionalität sind wichtiger denn je. Durch die Zusammenarbeit mit Good Market haben wir wirklich eine Win-Win-Win-Situation für alle.“ - Manuel Caprez, Head of Gastronomy, Eldora Quai Campus Zurich, 2024

Description:

Al de producten die door Pro4Feed worden geleverd zijn GMP+ gewaarborgd. Daarnaast worden naast de wettelijke frequenties extra analyses gemaakt zodat u kan vertrouwen op de topkwaliteit die u van Pro4Feed mag verwachten. Tevens zijn wij sterk en flexibel in de levering van onze producten. Of u nou een grote of kleine bestelling plaatst Pro4Feed zorgt voor een goede en snelle levering zodat uw productie niet stil komt te liggen.

Scherpe Tarieven
Door de lage overheadskosten van Pro4Feed realiseren wij voor u scherpe tarieven zodat u en uw klant daarvan mee kunnen profiteren. Uw klanten willen het beste voor uw dieren en Pro4Feed het beste voor uw klanten. Door samen aan de toekomst te bouwen ontstaat er commitment en die koestert Pro4Feed.

Snelle Levering
Mineralen inzetten als drager of additief in uw product is noodzakelijk en wordt reeds door velen toegepast. Maar waar zijn deze nu verkrijgbaar?
Bij Pro4Feed kunt u terecht voor alle mineralen en voor elke toepassing bieden wij een oplossing. Pro4Feed onderscheidt zich door top kwaliteit te leveren tegen een concurrerende prijs.

Name: SOAGRICO
Description:
SOAGRICO es una startup nacida en Tucuman con el propósito de ponteciar el comercio agroalimentario, junto con la logística y la contratación de servicios rurales. Soagrico surge de ver las dificultades que las pequeñas pymes, cooperativas rurales, familias rurales, mujeres rurales, etc padecen a la hora de poder producir y comercializar de forma rentable ya sea por la falta de infraestructura, logística, conocimiento de mercado, falta de información, etc. todo esto sumado a que tenemos una cadena de valor en la cual no se valora a los que realmente corren con todos los riesgos. Viviendo esto en carne propia nace soagrico (soluciones agrícolas comerciales), donde buscamos que los que producen se pongan en contacto con los demandantes de mercadería, cualquier tipo de producto de agricultura o ganadería e  industrializados y donde también tienen lugar los transportistas y los contratistas rurales que son los 3 actores necesarios para producir y realizar la logística. 
No nos olvidemos que estamos hablando de alimento y que hoy el 60% de lo que se consume en una mesa de un hogar es producido por un pequeño productor entonces poder crear un espacio de comercio más justo es determinante!

We believe in the power of business to enact positive change, and our commitment to excellence extends from the pasture to your plate. By choosing pasture-raised eggs from us, you're not only supporting sustainable agriculture but also embracing a lifestyle that promotes health and wellbeing.
Our ethos is grounded in fostering innovation, whether it's through refining traditional farming methods or introducing new, sustainable practices. We encourage curiosity, challenge the status quo, and strive to make a meaningful impact through every egg we produce.
At Pasture Raised Farm, every member of our team is valued for their unique contributions and encouraged to pursue their passions. Whether you're a seasoned leader or a newcomer to the industry, you'll find mentorship, inspiration, and a supportive community to help you thrive.
Join us in making a real difference, one egg at a time. Together, we'll grow, innovate, and create a brighter future for generations to come.

Name: L'Arcobaleno sca Coltivazione Biologica
Description:
La nostra Cooperativa è una delle primissime aziende siciliane che nasce abbracciando esclusivamente la coltivazione con metodo biologico dal 1988  quindi da oltre 30 anni. I nostri Produttori decidono di unirsi grazie alla condivisione di un sogno: il rispetto della natura e un’alimentazione sana per tutti. Ricadendo nel comprensorio della DOP aderiamo al Consorzio di tutela “Arancia di Ribera DOP” (unica arancia Dop in tutta Europa ) per la commercializzazione di arance esclusivamente prodotte nell’Area Geografica Protetta , conforme ai parametri analitici , dove viene effettuato un attento riscontro dei requisiti organolettici e qualitativi. Il territorio a cui apparteniamo grazie alle sue caratteristiche pedoclimatiche e ai nostri coltivatori attenti si distingue per l’ottima qualità di questo prodotto: un’arancia di succo abbondante con sapore gradevolissimo, contiene oltre 100milligrammi di vitamina C, cioè l’equivalente del fabbisogno quotidiano di una persona. Antinfluenzale, antitumorale, antiossidante ed un elevato contenuto di Sali minerali ; contribuisce al potenziamento del sistema immunitario, facilmente digeribile e con le componenti nutrizionali equilibrate . L’ Arancia può essere consumata come semplice frutto oppure spremuta oltre che utilizzata come insalata ( insaporita con olio extra vergine di oliva). E’ utilizzata anche nei dolci insaporendo i panettoni o deliziandosi con le scorza d’arancia candita perchè edibile.
-
La Cooperativa dispone di 300 ettari di agrumeto nel territorio di Villafranca Sicula e Caltabellotta nella provincia di Agrigento con una capacità produttiva pari a 2500 tonnellate di prodotto a polpa bionda varietà Navel e Washington Navel. Il nostro stabilimento sito in C/da Martusa di Caltabellotta ha una superficie coperta di 1000 mq e scoperta di 3000 mq , attrezzato con linee di lavorazione , impianti e sistema di confezionamento. Siamo certificati azienda biologica  -Controllato da ICEA-; GLOBAL GAP ; IFS food; e HACCP .

Description:
Bendek Farms and Logistics a été crée dans le but de répondre aux différents besoins énormes des secteurs de l’Agriculture, de la pisciculture, de l’élevage et de la mine, en Afrique. En effet, cette entreprise est née de l’idée de pouvoir apporter des solutions de production et logistique dans ces secteurs, dans un contexte mondial de digitalisation des activités. 

Nous exerçons dans deux pans d’activités que sont : 
  • La production et commercialisation des produits bruts issues des secteurs de l'agriculture, de la pêche et de l'élevage.
  • L’apport de solutions logistiques et technologiques appliquées aux secteurs de l’agriculture, de la pêche, de l’élevage et de l’industrie minière. 

BENDEK existe dans le But de pouvoir apporter une réponse aux besoins immenses des producteurs industriels en termes de denrées brutes issus du secteur primaire. 

Nous proposons des solutions spécifiques adaptées aux besoins de nos clients et traitons de façon particulière chaque demande.  

Nous disposons des moyens logistiques, technologiques et une capacité de production adaptative nous permettant de nous déployer et de pouvoir servir l'ensemble de nos clients. 

Nos valeurs reposent principalement sur le service, la disponibilité permanente des ressources, la satisfaction de nos clients et l'impact positif apporté à nos clients. 

Nous nous voyons comme une entreprise apporteuse de solutions pour booster ou optimiser les activités de nos clients. C’est dans cette perspective que nous nous fixons les objectifs ci-dessous : 
• Devenir l’un des leaders de la production des denrées bruts agricoles tels que : Le Manioc, Le plantain, le Maïs et le piment. 
• Devenir le principal référent technique des solutions logistiques et technologiques des secteurs de l’Agriculture, de la pêche , de l’élevage et des mines. 
• Créer plus de 20 000 emplois directs en Afrique et 500 000 emplois indirects

Qui garantiamo reattività, rotazione continua delle merci e presenza diretta in uno dei principali hub agroalimentari italiani.

La sede di 𝗔𝗿𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗲 è il nostro polo industriale e logistico. Ospita le attività di 𝗹𝗮𝘃𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲, 𝘀𝗲𝗹𝗲𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 e 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗳𝗲𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗼 𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗲 𝗽𝗮𝘁𝗮𝘁𝗲, supportate da sistemi di 𝗳𝗿𝗶𝗴𝗼𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 e ambienti dedicati allo 𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗰𝗰𝗮𝗴𝗴𝗶𝗼 a temperatura controllata. Name: OrganoCaps
Description:
OrganoCaps is a small but passionate initiative focused on bringing the power of medicinal mushrooms to the people of Andhra Pradesh. We believe these mushrooms—like reishi, lion’s mane, and cordyceps—can improve health and well-being in natural ways. But more than that, we want to create opportunities for farmers and rural workers by helping them grow these valuable crops.

Our goal is simple: to make medicinal mushrooms available locally, raise awareness about their benefits, and support people who want to start their own mushroom farms. We offer guidance, basic training, and encouragement to those who are ready to take a step into this growing space.

By focusing on both health and livelihood, OrganoCaps hopes to build a small network of farmers and sellers who work with us not just for profit, but to bring wellness into their communities. Alongside medicinal mushrooms, we also grow edible mushrooms on a small scale to meet local needs.

This journey began with a simple wish—to see people around us grow healthier and earn better. OrganoCaps is still growing, but our heart is in the right place, and we’re here to grow it together.

Name: Cofed India
Description:
Cofed India operates a structured, field-led organic agriculture and dairy ecosystem built on discipline, verification, and process control. The organisation works directly at farm level to establish standardised systems for animal management, clean dairy practices, and certified organic production. Operations are designed around consistency rather than scale, with defined protocols covering feeding cycles, housing conditions, hygiene routines, health monitoring, and preventive care for free-grazed cows and buffaloes.
Cofed functions through a verified farmer network where every participating farm is identified, trained, and monitored. Farmer onboarding is system-based, supported by on-ground training, regular field supervision, and digital documentation. Traceability is embedded at the source, enabling each stage—from animal care to handling and aggregation—to remain accountable and transparent. Certification under recognised organic standards applies to processes, not labels, ensuring credibility across institutional and wholesale supply chains.
A core focus of Cofed India is women-led participation in agriculture and dairy operations. Through structured collectives and shared systems, women farmers are integrated as stakeholders, strengthening operational ownership and income stability at the village level. The organisation also supports conservation and organic farming practices that reduce dependency on cost-intensive inputs while maintaining production reliability.
Cofed India positions itself as a system builder rather than a consumer-facing brand. Its work prioritises clean, safe, and standardised outcomes supported by certification, traceability, and field execution. The objective is to create an agri and dairy supply chain that is reliable, transparent, and resilient—built to function consistently over time, independent of seasons, trends, or promotional cycles.

Name: Gopal Gir Farm
Description:
At Gopal Gir Farm, we don’t just produce ghee — we preserve a legacy.

Rooted in Bhavnagar, Gujarat, with over 190 years of ancestral heritage, our brand is committed to delivering purity, wellness, and authenticity through our Premium A2 Gir Mother Cow Bilona Ghee and limited-edition Purnima Ghee.

We follow the ancient Vedic bilona method, where ghee is hand-churned from curd made using A2 milk of indigenous Gir cows — ensuring maximum nutritional value, digestibility, and spiritual integrity. No shortcuts. No machinery. Just timeless tradition.

Our Purnima Ghee, prepared only once each month on the full moon (12 times a year), is crafted with heightened reverence — using Vedic rituals, mantra chanting, and precise lunar alignment. This isn’t just ghee; it’s a sacred preparation meant to nourish body, mind, and soul.

What defines our brand:

A2 Milk from Indigenous Gir Mother Cows

Authentic Bilona (Hand-Churned) Method

Zero Preservatives, Additives, or Industrial Processing

Limited-Batch Purnima Ghee Crafted with Vedic Precision

190+ Years of Family-Led Legacy & Knowledge

We believe in conscious consumption — where every spoonful carries purpose, purity, and provenance. Our ghee is ideal for health-conscious individuals, wellness practitioners, Ayurvedic doctors, and anyone seeking to integrate traditional wisdom into modern lifestyles.

As a brand, we stand at the intersection of heritage and holistic wellness. We are not just reviving India’s ancient practices — we are scaling them with integrity for today’s discerning consumer.

Join us in this journey of mindful nourishment. Discover ghee as it was meant to be — sacred, seasonal, and full of life.

Name: MISKI YAKU AGROINDUSTRIAL
Description:
En MISKI YAKU AGROINDUSTRIAL S.A.C., transformamos la riqueza de la selva central peruana en productos agrícolas de alta calidad para el mundo. Somos una empresa dedicada a la comercialización y exportación de productos como jengibre (kion), naranja, cacao, cúrcuma y café, promoviendo el desarrollo sostenible de las comunidades con las que trabajamos.

Nacimos en el corazón de la selva central peruana, en Pichanaqui, provincia de Chanchamayo, departamento de Junín. Nuestro compromiso social y ambiental nos impulsa a colaborar estrechamente con comunidades nativas como los Asháninka y Campa, quienes desempeñan un papel fundamental en la producción de nuestros cultivos.

El nombre MISKI YAKU proviene del quechua y significa "agua dulce" o "agua rica", simbolizando nuestra conexión con la tierra, las personas y los recursos naturales de nuestra región.
